I wanted to personally reach out to share Ritchie’s story with you and talk about how proud I am of him.

I raised Ritchie all by myself in Throggs Neck Houses – a public housing project in the Bronx – on jobs that barely paid the minimum wage.

He’s no stranger to the struggle and poverty that so many in the South Bronx experience. It’s these hardships that have guided Ritchie his entire life and inspired his career as a public servant.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we lived them ourselves.**

[**I’m so proud of Ritchie every day, and I hope as your Congressman he makes you proud too, Peter. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68313574/422638583/-717493931?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=RTFC_20230818_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmNkZjI1Ny0yMzNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JSWoy1SbSp5ZV-tseVzjc3j71xRjfxpluG531x1nP6k=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

The Liberal Democrats are determined to destroy Senator Ted Cruz, so we must be UNITED to stop them. Senator Ted Cruz is one of the most influential Conservative Senators in the country.He’s always fighting for AMERICA FIRST, and the Democrats HATE him for it. They want to make TEXAS BLUE to ensure their far-Left agenda is cemented forever. We cannot let it happen. The Democrats' ANTI-TED CRUZ SUPER PAC is already spending money against Ted. We must have a massive show of force from our top grassroots supporters like you to show the Democrats they will NEVER turn TEXAS blue. Can we count on a top patriot like you, Peter? name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Maher?=
subject: The Reedley bio lab threat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/desantis-trump-and-scott-all-together-in-ca-12764789?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=204fbc5345&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
Friend,

Many of you know that I am a former FBI Special Agent. I mainly worked in national security and counterterrorism.

Without divulging sensitive information, I can tell you that our nation faces tremendous threats—externally from countries like China, Russia, and Iran and internally from got-aways on the terrorist watch list and other extremists inside our homeland.

The recent discovery of the illegal bio-lab in Reedley and reports of Chinese entities purchasing land around our military bases place a bright spotlight on our need to be vigilant and protective.

In the FBI, I initiated and led a National Security Enterprise investigation into a hostile foreign government controlled company expanding in the United States. I led the nomination for the company's removal to the Committee on Foreign Investment based on serious national security concerns.

At the state and national levels, our elected leaders are too comfortable acting after the fact rather than taking action early to prevent security lapses.

To be blunt, Congress needs my national security, threat prevention, and counterterrorism expertise. I’m concerned for our nation. As your Congressman, I will push for new approaches—engaging both sides of the aisle—to protect our country.

However, I need your help to get to Congress.

Consider helping our $5 Friday effort and committing to a $5 weekly contribution today.
---
| [$5 Friday](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=711b3d5c34&e=1722d05e10 "$5 Friday")
---
| Or you can make a difference with a [one-time donation of $20, $50, or $100](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=37a5f12f8e&e=1722d05e10).
---
| [Donate Now!](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=7af85ae133&e=1722d05e10 "Donate Now!")
---
| Thank you in advance. Let’s begin to be proactive in securing our nation from threats like this Reedley biolab rather than reactive.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

clean_body: Democrats in Wisconsin just got some major news: A new lawsuit challenging the state’s rigged maps has been filed. | | | | | 🚨Democrats in Wisconsin just got some major news: A new lawsuit challenging the state’s rigged maps has been filed. And with a newly-won liberal majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, this case could change everything. All 132 seats in the legislature could be on the ballot NEXT YEAR. A win in this case could give Democrats a fighting chance at controlling the legislature and breaking up this GOP stronghold. But this is only the beginning – defeating right-wing Republicans in states like Wisconsin takes a strong team, strategic investments, and most importantly, time. Republicans will do ANYTHING to hold onto power – that’s why it’s critical that we mobilize now to lay the groundwork for Democratic victories in states like Wisconsin in 2023, 2024, and beyond. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let’s do this. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: the indictments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
This week, the former president received his fourth criminal charge of the year.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68314403/422660414/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230818-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2Q0YTMzMy0yYTNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Weiu6Qr8UeH0OtXfzaSVxvRg_epPs7EqtPbMhGa-zmc=)
---
| Hi there,

_**This week, the former president received his fourth criminal charge of the year.**_ These indictments now seem as commonplace as a weather report or sports update when they constantly pop up on the news. I am deeply saddened for our country. The complete failure of the former president to lead this country and lead with respect for what is right is devastating.

_**As a mother, I fear what our younger generations are learning from so-called ‘leaders’ like Donald Trump.**_ If you don’t get your way, threaten and manipulate innocent people. If you are held accountable, point fingers. The sanctity of our democracy is being shredded to bits every time Trump spreads lies about the 2020 election and inches closer to returning to the White House.

For so long, national Republicans have claimed a moral high ground based on their Christian beliefs and values. Well, as a devout Christian, I look at Trump’s fourth indictment and think national Republicans have no claim to morality if this is who they choose to lead them.

My faith guides me every day to do what is right. In Congress, I bring these values with me every day as I lead with empathy and grace. I believe we as a country can do better than this. We can’t let leaders like the former president come back into power.

[_**If you believe we should elevate those who lead through faith and conviction, not selfishness and arrogance, I hope you will consider contributing to my campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68314404/422660415/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230818-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2Q0YTMzMy0yYTNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Weiu6Qr8UeH0OtXfzaSVxvRg_epPs7EqtPbMhGa-zmc=)

clean_body: This week, the former president received his fourth criminal charge of the year. | = | Hi there, This week, the former president received his fourth criminal charge of the year. These indictments now seem as commonplace as a weather report or sports update when they constantly pop up on the news. I am deeply saddened for our country. The complete failure of the former president to lead this country and lead with respect for what is right is devastating. As a mother, I fear what our younger generations are learning from so-called ‘leaders’ like Donald Trump. If you don’t get your way, threaten and manipulate innocent people. If you are held accountable, point fingers. The sanctity of our democracy is being shredded to bits every time Trump spreads lies about the 2020 election and inches closer to returning to the White House. For so long, national Republicans have claimed a moral high ground based on their Christian beliefs and values. Well, as a devout Christian, I look at Trump’s fourth indictment and think national Republicans have no claim to morality if this is who they choose to lead them. My faith guides me every day to do what is right. In Congress, I bring these values with me every day as I lead with empathy and grace. I believe we as a country can do better than this. We can’t let leaders like the former president come back into power. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . [Hillary Strikes Again](https://substack..jjaiknR23gqmvdBfdhuWMCyhR1S7mkhK4gEXs8jY7go?)
The first hurricane to hit California in nearly a century is conveniently already named after a symbol of the Democratic Party's hubris
| | [Listen to preview](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136209308&utm_source=podcast-email&play_audio=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MjA5MzA4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTI0MDgxMzQsImV4cCI6MTY5NTAwMDEzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ipPsfm8kqaFspmoe-h_a9gOwCSf7ACNAvve_Yw1Yo7A&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email#play)|
---|---|---
---
---
[](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | Shahid Buttar| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136209308&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MjA5MzA4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5MjQwODEzNCwiZXhwIjoxNjk1MDAwMTM0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xZ3Tp0n6bojIhycEyS_Ra41LTvwxe8XQXlgai1RsWTY&utm_medium=email&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136209308&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MjA5MzA4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTI0MDgxMzQsImV4cCI6MTY5NTAwMDEzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ipPsfm8kqaFspmoe-h_a9gOwCSf7ACNAvve_Yw1Yo7A&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136209308&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MjA5MzA4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTI0MDgxMzQsImV4cCI6MTY5NTAwMDEzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ipPsfm8kqaFspmoe-h_a9gOwCSf7ACNAvve_Yw1Yo7A)
It grows increasingly impressive each day to watch Democratic Party loyalists contort themselves to avoid acknowledging the mounting failures of the Biden administration. It's almost like they've had years of practice.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5fdd2c7d-929f-48bf-9606-630be2ecd51b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### Gaslighting the public
Earlier this week, President Biden threw down a gauntlet of sorts, displaying fascinating bravado by [inviting critics](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e4e014fc-6743-425a-bc21-65a324392463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to "Name me a single objective that we've ever set out to accomplish that we've failed on! Name me one," he said.
One of his opponents in the Democratic primary [answered the call](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5c57ffc6-99ce-4ccc-93c8-dfad720e2204?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), exposing not only various examples of Biden's hypocrisies. but also the institutional weakness of legions of journalists who routinely fail to demonstrate similar independence.
I offer my thoughts to educate, inform, and inspire readers. This post is public, so feel free to share it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136209308&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MjA5MzA4LCJpYXQiOjE2OTI0MDgxMzQsImV4cCI6MTY5NTAwMDEzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ipPsfm8kqaFspmoe-h_a9gOwCSf7ACNAvve_Yw1Yo7A)
Many of the same journalists who lack the insight and rigor to fact check the President's lies have also taken the further step of [demeaning](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/24edc1a8-774e-436e-a545-3e6575590b8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Marianne Williamson in the past. Some have described her in [marginalizing](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/81533cc7-96dc-4f4f-9334-ce344f701bec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) terms, others have [ignored](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a363d88d-1b9c-4ef7-83c2-8ffeb2deba5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) her entirely, and every one of them has refused to engage with her positions and proposed policies.
The only thing better than suppressing the truth is smearing the people who dare speak it.
Having myself proposed policies poised to address the failures of corporate Democrats, only to watch journalists smear me based on the self-serving lies of figures building careers in the Democratic Party, I feel some empathy for Williamson, as well as a sense of deja vu as her campaign continues to be treated like a piñata by observers unwilling to consider her sacrifices.
I'm quite proud to have been [supported](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ddabc742-c591-4f2a-9bff-943380ba8156?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Marianne Williamson in the past, and to support her voice in the 2024 Democratic primary (although my experience as a Democrat has led me to currently plan to vote in the general election for the Green Party's nominee, [Cornel West](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5cc1edb5-c430-4313-a7e1-94329ec97a9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
### Poetic injustice
Among the many failures observed by Williamson is Biden's fealty to the fossil fuel industry, and his record of [accelerating](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/47a72d17-d6b0-4fc9-8459-5b6a88d37cb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) fossil fuel production even in an era of industry-driven climate chaos that continues to kill Americans en masse.
[I almost described his dedication to industry as a "capitulation," before realizing that would be too generous to Biden by implying that he at one point claimed independence from Big Oil, which he has always happily served, along with the rest of Wall Street.]
Want to learn more about corruption in Washington? Subscribe, whether on a free or paid basis.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..rTVWtwcozCYFrJG4gJjfS2NfnTkSv-M2sTBbD_kgwKk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=136209308)
It is fitting that the next natural disaster driven by climate chaos already has the name of a previous corporate Democrat whose obliviousness helped contrive it.
Hurricane Hillary is poised to be the first hurricane to hit California in nearly a century.
It is poised to flood parts of Southern California starting this weekend, with [forecasted precipitation levels](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d3ab5aa8-2cf1-466a-b4a1-2e51aa46fd7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in some areas amounting to several years' worth of rain. While rain in the desert might sound like a good thing, [desert soil poorly absorbs moisture](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f88359c7-dbef-4345-be99-efbf9f9d3a4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), setting the stage for predictable flash floods that could bring devastation to vulnerable communities across the Southwest.
The name of the hurricane, to say the least, is ironic. As a Senator, Secretary of State, and Democratic Party nominee for the presidency, Clinton's invitations to climate chaos ranged well beyond the examples I compiled below...

clean_body: Listen now (5 mins) | The first hurricane to hit California in nearly a century is conveniently already named after a symbol of the Democratic Party's hubris | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? | | Aug 19 ? The first hurricane to hit California in nearly a century is conveniently already named after a symbol of the Democratic Party's hubris | | | ---|---|--- | | Shahid Buttar| | | | | | It grows increasingly impressive each day to watch Democratic Party loyalists contort themselves to avoid acknowledging the mounting failures of the Biden administration. It's almost like they've had years of practice. | | ---|---|--- Gaslighting the public Earlier this week, President Biden threw down a gauntlet of sorts, displaying fascinating bravado by to "Name me a single objective that we've ever set out to accomplish that we've failed on! Name me one," he said. One of his opponents in the Democratic primary , exposing not only various examples of Biden's hypocrisies. but also the institutional weakness of legions of journalists who routinely fail to demonstrate similar independence. I offer my thoughts to educate, inform, and inspire readers. This post is public, so feel free to share it. Many of the same journalists who lack the insight and rigor to fact check the President's lies have also taken the further step of Marianne Williamson in the past. Some have described her in terms, others have her entirely, and every one of them has refused to engage with her positions and proposed policies. The only thing better than suppressing the truth is smearing the people who dare speak it. Having myself proposed policies poised to address the failures of corporate Democrats, only to watch journalists smear me based on the self-serving lies of figures building careers in the Democratic Party, I feel some empathy for Williamson, as well as a sense of deja vu as her campaign continues to be treated like a piñata by observers unwilling to consider her sacrifices. I'm quite proud to have been by Marianne Williamson in the past, and to support her voice in the 2024 Democratic primary (although my experience as a Democrat has led me to currently plan to vote in the general election for the Green Party's nominee, ). Poetic injustice Among the many failures observed by Williamson is Biden's fealty to the fossil fuel industry, and his record of fossil fuel production even in an era of industry-driven climate chaos that continues to kill Americans en masse. [I almost described his dedication to industry as a "capitulation," before realizing that would be too generous to Biden by implying that he at one point claimed independence from Big Oil, which he has always happily served, along with the rest of Wall Street.] Want to learn more about corruption in Washington? Subscribe, whether on a free or paid basis. It is fitting that the next natural disaster driven by climate chaos already has the name of a previous corporate Democrat whose obliviousness helped contrive it. Hurricane Hillary is poised to be the first hurricane to hit California in nearly a century. It is poised to flood parts of Southern California starting this weekend, with in some areas amounting to several years' worth of rain. While rain in the desert might sound like a good thing, , setting the stage for predictable flash floods that could bring devastation to vulnerable communities across the Southwest. The name of the hurricane, to say the least, is ironic. As a Senator, Secretary of State, and Democratic Party nominee for the presidency, Clinton's invitations to climate chaos ranged well beyond the examples I compiled below... Listen to this episode with a 7-day free trial Subscribe to Shahid's Thoughts to listen to this episode and get 7 days of free access to the full post archives. A subscription gets you: | Access to full-text of each post & podcast, plus the complete archive ---|--- | Post comments and join the community! | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Shahid Buttar P.O. Box 14548, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96151 ? ?

body:

---
| | Dear friend:

Despite being outspent 7 to 1 by the corporate-backed incumbent, I received an incredible 49% of the general election votes in 2022. My vision to win power back for the people has received amazing grassroots support, and once again I'm standing up against the corporate-backed incumbent that is complicit with the status quo. Together, we can win big in 2024 and make a difference for the betterment of our community through concrete actions – like signing the CalCare pledge.💙🗳
---
| [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=5b7ce2d29b&e=fee98d637f)
---
| **WE CAN CHANGE THINGS!💪✨**
---
| I signed the CalCare Pledge! That means that I am committed to fighting alongside the California Nurses Association for health care as a right to all Californians. CalCare is important because it will allow every Californian – regardless of race, immigration status, or income – access to comprehensive and high-quality health care. It is the solution we need to fix our broken health care system. By pledging, I vowed to advocate for CalCare both now and once I am in office. While the democratic majority in the California state legislature claims to believe in health care as a human right, nothing has been passed – with our pledges, we are holding ourselves accountable to keeping our promise to ensure action is finally taken. With my help, California can help lead the way for Medicare for All across the country.
---
| **DONATE!⚡️**
---
| We will never achieve healthcare for all, if we are governed by politicians who take money from Big Pharma. Our grassroots campaign is powered by 100% clean money, which means we will never take contributions from corporate PACs. That’s why we need your help. Please consider donating today! Every donation takes us closer to achieving our goal of making a positive difference in our community. Become a $34 monthly donor and help us sustain our movement.
---

---
| Let’s unite and reclaim power for the people!
---

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Joe Biden made this bald-faced lie that will fill you with rage
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 19, 2023

Joe Biden made this
bald-faced lie that will fill you with rage
It seems nearly impossible
for the President to keep his foot out of his mouth. But no one
expected him to say this.

And Joe Biden made this
bald-faced lie that will fill you with rage.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Trump's possible pick for
Vice President will leave you speechless

Running side by side
with a leading candidate like former President Trump is no easy
task. But this politician believes they have what it takes.
➞ Continue Reading

Hillary Clinton went into
hysteria trying to censor this incriminating video

Two-time failed
candidate Hillary Clinton has been a thorn in America's side for
decades. But this could be the end of the line for her.
➞ Continue Reading

This stunning statement
from Biden left millions of Americans seeing red

It's no secret that
President Biden has been dealt a fair share of crises during his
presidency. His completely incompetent administration only ever
makes each one of them worse.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaahjttetmkef2hh2ea686t2r5og8m24n79fitpg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5j69oj1c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3iuktvtn7ar9nk1bar2m5d4r3oj1bm5peh5b2to_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5j69oj1c9h2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z82inpnh89sg02k5igfqsns5hmv081esbrl1k7v0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5j69oj1c9h2bs)**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrudmef4veuhbum2ce51u1fv49jg106ufd8nor9g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8o34cth2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zknqibl8m9jmvo65dmg5p99gu18q3n2vhibsanl0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8o34cth2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za2h30mi03aue7r62ou5ff3hvbj0arbfrud5ilv8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8o34cth2bs)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664167%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=db4fEFZQwiEvs592Xu9agQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664167%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=db4fEFZQwiEvs592Xu9agQ&sysid=1)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664168%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y517yySZ%2b07i2mq1WUMyHA&sysid=1)**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Can I loop you in?
body:
I knew it wouldn’t be easy

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztdk5dflp63f008s2mgggfi79kndl8ks351p65eg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8p76c5h2bs "New Message From: Riley Gaines")
---

_**[Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women's sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znqjd6glo5atn3kfaksg5q6coq7g1fh72maocih0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8p76c5h2bs "Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women’s sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn. ")**_

I grew up swimming and was blessed to receive a scholarship to the University of Kentucky. It was all a dream come true... _Until it wasn 't._

When a 6'4 male walked into our locker room. Myself and other young women were expected to carry on business as usual, but I didn't stand for it.

I immediately left the locker room and asked a pool official how it was allowed to happen. I was told they "got around that," and it was okay. **That 's where my outrage began.**

Any man, coach, or official could have full access by making the locker rooms unisex. We weren't warned. We were subjected. And to rub salt into the wound, I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I've experienced the fear. I've experienced the sadness. I've experienced what Democrats think is "no big deal." And now, because I didn't stand for it and spoke up for women and girls everywhere, I have a target on my back.

Unfortunately for them, it has only empowered me. _**[My mission to save women's sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what's happening in women's sports is only the beginning.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq790m6i3div13gpn49ibuohgso2msinoevqnsr8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8p76c5h2bs "My mission to save women’s sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what’s happening in women’s sports is only the beginning.")**_

The woke, transgender agenda won't stop.

I refuse to let this journey end. I refuse to bow down because they want me to. _**[I'm asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women's sports.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zieacuvbls41p4c17d12tse4o24b38nbadec3qk8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8p76c5h2bs "I’m asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women’s sports.")**_

Can I count on you?

Thank you,

Riley

---
| |

* * *
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z51d3g4suiuir7loe0htv42qfaihnelavd4ufp90_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8p76c5h2bs "Marsha Image Footer")
---
| |
_A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdmfgjktl4gg6vrl0qedjmbbfg8cfhus1a6d107o_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm8p76c5h2bs "please, click here to support my efforts if you can.")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter,

Marsha Blackburn
---

name: Your America
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
omething strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> “We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years...”
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21876%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LZci5HRrJwy%2bDegplpjNPg&sysid=1) Dr. Prins says:
> ** “This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result.” **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a ‘reset’ to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21877%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pxy6gDWOnzBTvwE4yOedAg&sysid=1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21878%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YZguSumTsv8eTHl7%2bH5%2fQg&sysid=1)
---

Your America News

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: C.S. Lewis is now available on DVD
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-rg)Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author-C.S. Lewis.In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://trk.secureandprosper._6YYYVhY3wzOIA)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.secureandprosper._J7330U_0aIffqub0XPQ9g)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings.[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.secureandprosper._Wo6CMPcT0oXe4Q)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last:[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) Warm regards, Bill GrayClass of 2001Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d598cd5-35d6-421f-8f96-40ed58f15758/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z92h8etf5lmd5flf0j4bvofq6hl9i4bt307mjlmg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm6ob4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaski2l7nklsegkngbio657hf3l2thh58ge8vcko_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm6ob4clh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo4s2prq4qh77aaqnran8gfgn86aje42q26nlj08_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm6ob4clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkrc7hkadflkvj3uovmrgup6hmtiio1nok4ajhlo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm6ob4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chim2p34c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4gvdnjh9lvem19vuljsh8dufrmnma7nea65t3c0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5gm6ob4clh2bs)_

Our freedoms are no more.

_**The Far-Left has just indicted President Trump on racketeering charges & is on the verge of throwing him behind bars for the rest of his life.**_

Democrats under Joe Biden are everything Trump told you they were; authoritarian dictators hell-bent on complete political power.

And they're about to get away with the biggest abuse of power in American history...

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Dan Bongino shares tragic news with his audience
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 19, 2023

Dan Bongino shares
tragic news with his audience
Podcast host Dan Bongino is
a beloved voice for conservatives. It's with a heavy heart that
he opened up about this.

And Dan Bongino shared this
tragic news with his audience.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden made this
bald-faced lie that will fill you with rage

It seems nearly
impossible for the President to keep his foot out of his mouth.
But no one expected him to say this.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump's possible pick for
Vice President will leave you speechless

Running side by side
with a leading candidate like former President Trump is no easy
task. But this politician believes they have what it takes.
➞ Continue Reading

Hillary Clinton went into
hysteria trying to censor this incriminating video

Two-time failed
candidate Hillary Clinton has been a thorn in America's side for
decades. But this could be the end of the line for her.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: CIA Helped Biden Election?
body:
New Lawsuit Update!

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Sues CIA Over Pre-Election Letter Attacking Hunter
Laptop Story

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=30052&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1JUzZOWE5lYVpYWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e966c6a99c2b87a3aea238cedf27d3fdd8bfde24d9addec266266a6b935fc4a4]

Acting CIA Director Michael Morell was up early on October 19, 2020,
furthering a scheme that would significantly affect the outcome of the
presidential election.

U.S. House investigators are quite curious about that, and so are we.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the CIA
for all communications of the spy agency’s Prepublication
Classification Review Board (PCRB) regarding an October 19, 2020,
email request to review and “clear” a letter signed by 51 former
intelligence community officials characterizing the Hunter Biden
laptop story as having “all the earmarks of a Russian disinformation
campaign” (_Judicial Watch v. Central Intelligence Agency_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=30053&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtY2lhLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1sYXB0b3AtbGV0dGVyLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTg0NC9dXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=899d3ff6422b557c605cb0e7f571026c16d0a37ec78f3cbda22d010fe793e71f
_(No. 1:23-cv-01844)).

In October 2020, in the run-up to the presidential election, the _New
York Post_ reported that Hunter Biden’s laptop
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=28754&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjAvMTAvMTQvZW1haWwtcmV2ZWFscy1ob3ctaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludHJvZHVjZWQtdWtyYWluaWFuLWJpei1tYW4tdG8tZGFkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9d97eafdff47932cce6d5dcd720f7cf141ab201b8c0ee69fdde50ad8feb96916],
which
was abandoned at a Delaware computer shop, contained embarrassing and
possibly incriminating information about the Biden family. In a May
10, 2023, report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=30043&F=T&&hash=15ac6d5f5509fe2c680aedf31b133d12475bdf3b8a752a5638b1b94cbf3d1c78]
the
House Judiciary Committee revealed that on October 19, 2020, three
days before the second presidential debate between President Donald
Trump and Democrat candidate Joe Biden, then-acting CIA Director
Michael Morell sent the PCRB the finalized letter for review, calling
it a “rush job,” and quickly secured its approval.

We sued after the CIA failed to respond to a May 11, 2023, FOIA
request for:

> Records and communications of the Prepublication Classification
> Review Board, Central Intelligence Agency, including emails, email
> chains, email attachments, text messages, cables, voice recordings,
> correspondence, statements, letters, memoranda, reports,
> presentations, notes, or other form of record, regarding an October
> 19, 2020, email request to review and “clear” a letter involving
> the Hunter Biden laptop story potentially having Russian involvement
> or being a Russian disinformation plot.
In a May 16, 2023, letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=30044&F=T&&hash=f084c5716b291ab97ad6bcf018684c65ec58d4b9985d3b57abaee9d8424c4940]
to
CIA Director William Burns, House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim
Jordan and House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Chairman
Michael R. Turner stated that the committees were conducting oversight
of the October 2020 “Public Statement on the Hunter Biden Emails”
signed by 51 former intelligence community officials.

Jordan and Turner wrote:

> The CIA has documents responsive to our requests and necessary to
> our oversight. On October 19, 2020, at 6:34 a.m., Morell submitted
> the statement to the CIA’s Prepublication Classification Review
> Board (PCRB), instructing it was “a rush job, as it needs to get
> out as soon as possible.” The PCRB staff responded at 7:11 a.m.
> that it had received the statement, and cleared it for publication
> at 12:44 p.m. on the same day.
>
> Morell speculated that the quick turn-around from the PCRB was
> because “[t]hey are probably afraid I’m coming back” as CIA
> director. On May 9, 2023, the CIA produced to the Committees two
> emails: Morell’s email to the PCRB early on October 19, 2023, and
> the PCRB’s response at 12:44 p.m. However, the Committees have
> reason to believe additional documents remain in the possession of
> the CIA.
>
> The Committees have received evidence that the CIA, or at least an
> employee of the CIA, may have helped to solicit signatories for the
> statement about Hunter Biden. According to former CIA employee David
> Cariens, he spoke with the PCRB in October 2020 regarding the review
> of his memoir and during that call a CIA employee “asked” him if
> he would sign the statement. As Cariens explained:

When the person in charge of reviewing the book called to say it was
approved with no changes, I was told about the draft letter. The
person asked me if I would be willing to sign. . . . After hearing the
letter’s contents, and the qualifiers in it such as, “We want to
emphasize that we do not know if the emails provided to the New York
Post by President Trump’s personal attorney, Rudy Giuliani, are
genuine or not and that we do not have evidence of Russian involvement
. .’ I agreed to sign.

> If accurate, this information raises fundamental concerns about the
> role of the CIA in helping to falsely discredit allegations about
> the Biden family in the weeks before the 2020 presidential election.
A House Judiciary Committee report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=30045&F=T&&hash=7672c0bd70fa74b56415dde2f443a16b00ba7595341eb684e229d57776d19a07]
details
the testimony of former CIA officer Marc Polymeropoulos and criticized
the CIA’s handling of the letter:

> Q. Does what [Former CIA official David Cariens] described there,
> that interaction with the [Prepublication Classification Review
> Board], sound like a quid pro quo to you?
>
> A. I can’t comment on this. This is—to me, this is something
> that the [Prepublication Classification Review Board] in my
> experience would never engage in something like that. They are just
> straightforward back and forth in terms of approval. The idea they
> would have a comment on any other thing that they were working on,
> that to me is not even close to what I’ve experienced with them.
>
> Q. Does that concern you?
>
> A. If it’s true, it would concern me, for sure. But I just—I
> have a hard time believing that occurred. If it did, that’s
> incredibly unprofessional.
Congressional testimony
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=30046&F=T&&hash=f361616e866d0b742649719bc0aa60e87c4fa5afc572be9ef5697e5a6680b578]
also
confirms that the Biden campaign was behind the creation of the
infamous Hunter laptop letter promoted by the CIA.

The Deep State CIA, it seems, engaged in election interference and a
political operation against the American people to help Joe Biden and
hurt Trump. And now the CIA is ignoring FOIA law to cover up its role
in the scandal, censoring and suppressing the Hunter Biden/Joe Biden
laptop story just before the presidential election.

We have multiple federal lawsuits focused on Biden family corruption:
In July, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=29953&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWlycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=44eefc01a09f258a938e7498d8b2a79d5efd46fbf89b73169d2981b46c31fa48]
the DOJ for records
from the Office of the Attorney General and Office of the Deputy
Attorney General regarding the Internal Revenue Service investigation
of Hunter Biden.
In June 2023, we filed a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=29768&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW5zLWJyaWJlcnktc2NoZW1lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e0498648cd133fa084f405dceb06313f68a82758b653a22efbd67b36b34511db]
against the
Department of Justice for a copy of the FBI FD-1023 form that
describes “an alleged criminal scheme involving then-Vice President
Biden and a foreign national relating to the exchange of money for
policy decisions.” Judicial Watch also asked for communications
about the FD-1023.

In May 2023, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=29593&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tZmFtaWx5LWJ1c2luZXNzLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6f4c28c98451c1f693bfb095bb580659d3b9ecca97b3b14ff16115e66a68d0a5]
against
the National Archives for Biden family records and communications
regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications
between the Bidens and several known business associates.

On October 14, 2022, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=28275&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3c88978a863b53e44b2996be0f3a49822e4acba4643c8324b248d5f1a522281d]
DOJ for
all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst
Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members
of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA)
raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the
senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden.

We filed a lawsuit against the U.S. State Department on April 20,
2022, for messages sent through the SMART
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=27224&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1mb3ItaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWRvY3VtZW50cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=27e6a654e64382a73677b9046b488088cece1c13fbd323574a7b6ac2d845e387]
(State
Messaging and Archive Retrieval Toolkit) system that mention Hunter
Biden.

In December 2020, State Department records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=27185&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYnVyaXNtYS1pbXBlYWNobWVudC15b3Zhbm92aXRjaC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=368867d0a45f4719f51013766e4ccb54c8da4b6a5b7cfadd4d72e3f12725061b]
obtained
through our FOIA lawsuit showed that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine
Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about
corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings.

In October 2020, we forced the release of State Department records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64681&L=28125&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVtLWxvYmJ5aW5nLWZpcm0tdWtyYWluZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b13ffce6c1c110908509d37bbb0d971e61d62a1f2c9bc9f4224a75020548661e]
that
included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv
between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally
Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star
Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma
Holdings to combat corruption allegations. At the time of the meeting,
Hunter Biden was serving on the board of directors for Burisma
Holdings.

I’ll be sure to let you know if and when the CIA ponies up any
documents on this Biden election scandal, so be sure to check back
here for updates on this and all our other cases.

MAXINE WATERS CELEBRATES HIP HOP MUSIC PROMOTING VIOLENCE, MISOGYNY,
DRUGS

The drug-fueled violence in our inner cities is often reflected in
“Hip Hop” music, which is known for graphic lyrics promoting
violence and the abuse of women. Yet, we have a congresswoman praising
this music, as our _Corruption Chronicles _blog reports

clean_body: New Lawsuit Update! [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Sues CIA Over Pre-Election Letter Attacking Hunter Laptop Story [] Acting CIA Director Michael Morell was up early on October 19, 2020, furthering a scheme that would significantly affect the outcome of the presidential election. U.S. House investigators are quite curious about that, and so are we. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the CIA for all communications of the spy agency’s Prepublication Classification Review Board (PCRB) regarding an October 19, 2020, email request to review and “clear” a letter signed by 51 former intelligence community officials characterizing the Hunter Biden laptop story as having “all the earmarks of a Russian disinformation campaign” (Judicial Watch v. Central Intelligence Agency [ (No. 1:23-cv-01844)). In October 2020, in the run-up to the presidential election, the New York Post reported that Hunter Biden’s laptop [], which was abandoned at a Delaware computer shop, contained embarrassing and possibly incriminating information about the Biden family. In a May 10, 2023, report [] the House Judiciary Committee revealed that on October 19, 2020, three days before the second presidential debate between President Donald Trump and Democrat candidate Joe Biden, then-acting CIA Director Michael Morell sent the PCRB the finalized letter for review, calling it a “rush job,” and quickly secured its approval. We sued after the CIA failed to respond to a May 11, 2023, FOIA request for: Records and communications of the Prepublication Classification Review Board, Central Intelligence Agency, including emails, email chains, email attachments, text messages, cables, voice recordings, correspondence, statements, letters, memoranda, reports, presentations, notes, or other form of record, regarding an October 19, 2020, email request to review and “clear” a letter involving the Hunter Biden laptop story potentially having Russian involvement or being a Russian disinformation plot. In a May 16, 2023, letter [] to CIA Director William Burns, House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan and House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Chairman Michael R. Turner stated that the committees were conducting oversight of the October 2020 “Public Statement on the Hunter Biden Emails” signed by 51 former intelligence community officials. Jordan and Turner wrote: The CIA has documents responsive to our requests and necessary to our oversight. On October 19, 2020, at 6:34 a.m., Morell submitted the statement to the CIA’s Prepublication Classification Review Board (PCRB), instructing it was “a rush job, as it needs to get out as soon as possible.” The PCRB staff responded at 7:11 a.m. that it had received the statement, and cleared it for publication at 12:44 p.m. on the same day. Morell speculated that the quick turn-around from the PCRB was because “[t]hey are probably afraid I’m coming back” as CIA director. On May 9, 2023, the CIA produced to the Committees two emails: Morell’s email to the PCRB early on October 19, 2023, and the PCRB’s response at 12:44 p.m. However, the Committees have reason to believe additional documents remain in the possession of the CIA. The Committees have received evidence that the CIA, or at least an employee of the CIA, may have helped to solicit signatories for the statement about Hunter Biden. According to former CIA employee David Cariens, he spoke with the PCRB in October 2020 regarding the review of his memoir and during that call a CIA employee “asked” him if he would sign the statement. As Cariens explained: When the person in charge of reviewing the book called to say it was approved with no changes, I was told about the draft letter. The person asked me if I would be willing to sign. . . . After hearing the letter’s contents, and the qualifiers in it such as, “We want to emphasize that we do not know if the emails provided to the New York Post by President Trump’s personal attorney, Rudy Giuliani, are genuine or not and that we do not have evidence of Russian involvement . .’ I agreed to sign. If accurate, this information raises fundamental concerns about the role of the CIA in helping to falsely discredit allegations about the Biden family in the weeks before the 2020 presidential election. A House Judiciary Committee report [] details the testimony of former CIA officer Marc Polymeropoulos and criticized the CIA’s handling of the letter: Q. Does what [Former CIA official David Cariens] described there, that interaction with the [Prepublication Classification Review Board], sound like a quid pro quo to you? A. I can’t comment on this. This is—to me, this is something that the [Prepublication Classification Review Board] in my experience would never engage in something like that. They are just straightforward back and forth in terms of approval. The idea they would have a comment on any other thing that they were working on, that to me is not even close to what I’ve experienced with them. Q. Does that concern you? A. If it’s true, it would concern me, for sure. But I just—I have a hard time believing that occurred. If it did, that’s incredibly unprofessional. Congressional testimony [] also confirms that the Biden campaign was behind the creation of the infamous Hunter laptop letter promoted by the CIA. The Deep State CIA, it seems, engaged in election interference and a political operation against the American people to help Joe Biden and hurt Trump. And now the CIA is ignoring FOIA law to cover up its role in the scandal, censoring and suppressing the Hunter Biden/Joe Biden laptop story just before the presidential election. We have multiple federal lawsuits focused on Biden family corruption: In July, we sued [] the DOJ for records from the Office of the Attorney General and Office of the Deputy Attorney General regarding the Internal Revenue Service investigation of Hunter Biden. In June 2023, we filed a lawsuit [] against the Department of Justice for a copy of the FBI FD-1023 form that describes “an alleged criminal scheme involving then-Vice President Biden and a foreign national relating to the exchange of money for policy decisions.” Judicial Watch also asked for communications about the FD-1023. In May 2023, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the National Archives for Biden family records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates. On October 14, 2022, we sued [] DOJ for all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden. We filed a lawsuit against the U.S. State Department on April 20, 2022, for messages sent through the SMART [] (State Messaging and Archive Retrieval Toolkit) system that mention Hunter Biden. In December 2020, State Department records [] obtained through our FOIA lawsuit showed that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. In October 2020, we forced the release of State Department records [] that included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations. At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings. I’ll be sure to let you know if and when the CIA ponies up any documents on this Biden election scandal, so be sure to check back here for updates on this and all our other cases. MAXINE WATERS CELEBRATES HIP HOP MUSIC PROMOTING VIOLENCE, MISOGYNY, DRUGS The drug-fueled violence in our inner cities is often reflected in “Hip Hop” music, which is known for graphic lyrics promoting violence and the abuse of women. Yet, we have a congresswoman praising this music, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [ Keeping with her history of poor ethical and moral fitness, a veteran congresswoman who has publicly encouraged violence against presidential cabinet members and among police protestors is proudly commemorating [ 50th anniversary of Hip Hop and rap, music famous for glamorizing violence, misogyny, drugs and lawlessness. Celebrating the milestone, California Democrat Maxine Waters claims that Hip Hop is an international culture-shaping force with a growing role in politics. “When I was elected to Congress in 1991, many politicians, including Black politicians, were either distancing themselves from Hip Hop artists altogether or trying to censor rap music,” the lawmaker says in the tribute statement issued this month. “Coming from one of the epicenters of this creative creation, Los Angeles, California, I saw the value in the artistry early on. These young people were a sight to behold as they were making art out of themselves and their conditions.” Waters has long celebrated Hip Hop, a predominantly African American brand well known for graphic lyrics involving urban violence and the abuse of women. Songs often include profanity, offensive descriptions of women, gun violence and some encourage defying or attacking police. Among the most famous hits are tunes that brag about street warfare, promiscuity and the use of illicit drugs. Others incite hatred or violence. Some of the most famous Hip Hop artists in the U.S. have made headlines for domestic violence and sexual assault, offenses that seem to be widely accepted in the industry. One renowned singer, known as XXXTentacion, was charged with aggravated battery and false imprisonment against his pregnant girlfriend. Another artist, known as Fabulous, was slapped with multiple felony domestic violence charges after punching his longtime girlfriend in the face and knocking out two of her teeth. Other rap stars have been embroiled in serious criminal behavior involving guns and drugs. One highly popular singer, known as Tekashi69, was convicted of nine federal crimes, including racketeering and drug charges. A popular online news publication proclaims in a story [] that Hip Hop rewards rappers for abusing women. This has not stopped Waters from adorning the artists and their peculiar brand of music. “These are our children and they’ve invented a new art form to describe their pains, fears and frustrations with us as adults,” according to the legislator, who has been embroiled in a multitude of controversies and ethics scandals throughout her tenure in the House of Representatives. “Just because we don’t like the symbols they use or the way they look, we should not allow that to cause us to embark on a course of censorship.” When some members of Congress tried to crack down on Hip Hop music decades ago, Waters encouraged colleagues to listen closely to rap lyrics assuring that they would hear “profound” words that tell a story of pain. “Rap was criticizing the way America treated its poor,” the congresswoman told fellow lawmakers. “Rappers were singing about poverty, police abuse, incarceration and other facets of their conditions. As legislators, these were the issues we should have been focusing on, not censorship.” Waters is a divisive figure that has long abused her power to enrich family members and even got a communist dictator to harbor a cop-murdering Black Panther fugitive still wanted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). The scandal-plagued politician sank to a new low by publicly encouraging violence [] against Trump administration cabinet members as well as anti-police protestors in an attempt to intimidate the jury in the trial of Derek Chauvin. “If you see anybody from that Cabinet in a restaurant, in a department store, at a gasoline station, you get out and you create a crowd and you push back on them and you tell them they are not welcome anymore, anywhere,” Waters said at a summer rally in Los Angeles, referring to members of the Trump administration. Judicial Watch filed a House ethics complaint against Waters for inspiring violence against members of a presidential cabinet. During the Chauvin trial the congresswoman urged protestors to “get more confrontational” if the officer was not found guilty in the George Floyd case. “Well, we’ve got to stay on the street and we’ve got to get more active, we’ve got to get more confrontational,” Waters declared. “We’ve got to make sure that they know that we mean business.” Judicial Watch also filed a complaint [] against Waters for violating House ethics rules in the Chauvin case.
