In just 20 years, one of our country’s most populous species of bumblebee, the Western Bumblebee, __plummeted by 93%.__ Pollinators like bees are responsible for every 1 in 3 bites of food we eat. But they are being killed by MILLIONS OF POUNDS of Big Ag’s deadly pesticides each year.
**Without action, you and I could be part of the last generation to share the planet with many vital bee species. **
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1936402?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
On top of everything else, pesticides have been found in the very food we eat -- and many of them can’t be washed off. That’s particularly concerning knowing that many pesticides are associated with harm to human health. They’ve been linked to health impacts like **cancer, reproductive problems, and damage to children’s developing brains.**
Friends of the Earth is fighting to stop Big Polluters, save our pollinators, and protect our planet. **But we are falling short of our National Honey Bee Day fundraising goal.**
Thankfully, a generous group of donors is still _**MATCHING ALL GIFTS up to our $107,000 goal, but only until midnight TONIGHT.**_
Donate now and your membership gift will have _DOUBLE the impact on our work_ to save pollinators and the planet!

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | BEES ARE DYING AND TIME IS RUNNING OUT TO SAVE THEM. Make a membership donation now that will go TWICE AS FAR in saving our pollinators and the planet: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == In just 20 years, one of our country’s most populous species of bumblebee, the Western Bumblebee, plummeted by 93%. Pollinators like bees are responsible for every 1 in 3 bites of food we eat. But they are being killed by MILLIONS OF POUNDS of Big Ag’s deadly pesticides each year. Without action, you and I could be part of the last generation to share the planet with many vital bee species. == On top of everything else, pesticides have been found in the very food we eat -- and many of them can’t be washed off. That’s particularly concerning knowing that many pesticides are associated with harm to human health. They’ve been linked to health impacts like cancer, reproductive problems, and damage to children’s developing brains. Friends of the Earth is fighting to stop Big Polluters, save our pollinators, and protect our planet. But we are falling short of our National Honey Bee Day fundraising goal. Thankfully, a generous group of donors is still MATCHING ALL GIFTS up to our $107,000 goal, but only until midnight TONIGHT. Donate now and your membership gift will have DOUBLE the impact on our work to save pollinators and the planet! name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj58k09n1v2grigft6gs0bo0a171toj8dm4lvago_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im0o35clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnoqg7t86bt60im0hjv06h6nukj4ksp85ib01lg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im0o35clh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0bkljbjd2gj1hj7fp8joch6fpq7et0s5jssferg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im0o35clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrcp8ncjgsrea454mrbm9e474jjraugsckddue8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im0o35clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34clgm4p77c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbg8fe63bhpt7a2hgehik066fs8f2i8efinvm2sg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im0o35clh2bs)_

name: American Briefing
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsfh5taqvramvqaj2sfklh14jfh4rjelp3hpb16g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im8o74c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs4f30is51indl7d5qavc23mb8pm4a5kfaq2a3m0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im8o74c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4rqgfnu1bcn4i4r4fm4bf803dsu2ukvgs71una8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im8o74c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj0jss0pf7en9fouq98reohun4emhbushlko27h0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im8o74c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z89eoffcr52he9k626fm2m1gupk9b9ao6cj73hlg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im8o74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68pb1cpi60oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z21qo2og7snhtsj3ark42d38eghtig9mluuhn378_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5im8o74c3h2bs)_

body:

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

Trump is already launching false attacks on Fulton County DA Fani Willis, who just indicted him on felony racketeering and conspiracy charges last night.

[Please pitch in a split donation between DA Fani Willis and Blue Amp Action right now – we’re trying to raise $25,000 before midnight for our “Protect Fani Willis” fund.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T314e98d4-d687-49fe-b7e3-23392d776270/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Peter, Are you ready for the trial of the century? Late last night, Fulton County DA Fani Willis indicted President Donald Trump and 18 of his co-conspirators on felony racketeering and numerous conspiracy charges for their attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 Presidential election in Georgia. We knew this was coming. Trump knew this was coming. Earlier this week, his campaign released a racist, sexist, attack ad slandering “Phoney Fani.” Here’s what Trump has said about the public servant who just indicted him last night: “They say there’s a young woman, a young racist in Atlanta. She’s a racist. And they say, I guess they say that she was after a certain gang and she ended up having an affair with the head of the gang or a gang member,” Trump said in his remarks. “And this is the person that wants to indict me. She’s got a lot of problems.” Actually, President Trump – now you’ve got a lot of problems. 4 indictments worth. [We see right through your attempts to tear down the Black woman who just indicted you, and we’re going to help her fight back against the many more right-wing attacks that are sure to be coming in the next few weeks and months. Please pitch in a split donation between DA Fani Willis and Blue Amp Action right now – we’re trying to raise $25,000 before midnight for our “Protect Fani Willis” fund.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2af83104-2a99-4b09-b699-530e0e37fd25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2010c38e-8622-47a9-a47b-89ddc509fe0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

She’s got a lot of problems.” Actually, President Trump – now you’ve got a lot of problems. 4 indictments worth. | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thanks for taking action today to help Fani Willis fight back against these unsubstantiated, racist, and sexist attacks. – Blue Amp Action | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Chris Christie doesn’t take me "seriously."
disclaimer_text: paid for by Super
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsBFVIqD6N

Vivek 2024

The D.C. Establishment is afraid of our movement. They
don't want to disrupt the status quo.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBFVIqD6N

Chris Christie, former Republican
Joe Scarborough, and Mika Brzezinski all had a lot to say about
me and this movement we're creating.

Fellow American, they can preach
to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop
me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want
you to hear.

Their name-calling won't stop me.

Will you stand with me, Fellow
American?

Chris Christie's interview on
MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or
a D next to your name, the "New Establishment" all share the same
things:

Pro-war in Ukraine
Fine with political opponents
getting arrested
Anti-free speech
Bought & paid for by Super
PACs
Pretends to be
anti-establishment

It's laughable that MSNBC will
trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign
"bipartisanship" while still totally hiding from direct debate
with me.

I won't ever back down from
speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream
media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican
Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to
secure a center spot on stage.

Will you chip in $5 or even $50
today?

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $10 ➔

Chip in $24 ➔

Chip in $50 ➔

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

JOIN OUR TEAM →

GET
TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
omething strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57889c35ad2447619c2c8687c7c8bb30&_e=JodvG7z-pUJhrCGwcF47g3GCzRPTGnSMNTkaxtsgsCYrPllOohudgIr90doRf2YIbVYNy7AuwYhvLfvQlc_mkiS7h8Xp9ze4o_hK3_gNzX91L_USFWPjge2O5UOr91ba5qlD9koy_O7hwCUCMf-7z7-KaAZpSa-ABkdYwhDipoAZI1lKaNTBCmghBa1zizQtGdU8aoWgOnnACykBMB3AIxJ5raR7VshHpHdHuBcQdvORTM7qZLLG8U0sE5YA8t85ErIf51P-4DL1hLdHo6dPBiFAC-2_vfFm-8Eg0a5PF14%3D) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57889c35ad2447619c2c8687c7c8bb30&_e=JodvG7z-pUJhrCGwcF47g3GCzRPTGnSMNTkaxtsgsCYrPllOohudgIr90doRf2YIbVYNy7AuwYhvLfvQlc_mkiS7h8Xp9ze4o_hK3_gNzX91L_USFWPjge2O5UOr91ba5qlD9koy_O7hwCUCMf-7z03lrkD0BbRkPj0qLZr6ZtXJWctcIoimJRNEunnaQWpzbBwXu9yzRBALtJoR_djMZUIGLxZ4hEWCcv61djSXZsqHtZHsLLC_1miXvbs1-3bi30rQYFkGjbu7xdOrhrwlTARbpnjGYj_semu4RsNOTVw%3D) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=57889c35ad2447619c2c8687c7c8bb30&_e=JodvG7z-pUJhrCGwcF47g3GCzRPTGnSMNTkaxtsgsCYrPllOohudgIr90doRf2YIbVYNy7AuwYhvLfvQlc_mkiS7h8Xp9ze4o_hK3_gNzX91L_USFWPjge2O5UOr91ba5qlD9koy_O7hwCUCMf-7z8uQyIuOEO83ZdmrvXlQ-eY4UY3zQJvDKCmp3efgZ8m3tfilmZNmzA1gXyupjCy15fVM5ie5suv24D8u2Yzy69nH3m2or3ouMqesxF8mrU913IsnSJDqzGhtHIrdBJk1cGh39PogdRMD_SmFAYop70M%3D)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

Friend, a Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c354c3786cdb42c29d2dd541e2415236&_e=ceSPNLBPC2odROS4TP6YQcDhXUGkvuKW-QbitGAWDoQXDDxc8yh_IWuD1TuQcdovBwJRu-3PqeT5z9bp8A25I7S4pNd2fXDoI87TWjh09ZH8A92OiYowmCAD4DOQs_ELgqKqaTMKdobhKqatSy_8WInVIKrB1I-nxtOeOHfb3eJsPFvB0VGQAMrC0CNxmUk8C6UL86JLWSZE2r6QgH8HsAq92TIh8CN29hMWwdTbIfRR2amEo53Hpvemy9EbQLU5yNbTuFPc5PVyoz6M8NqmD0WymWa5lc0u-BmFy_Evr9hzm4z-cYbf0u1YnvuzHUQShCc_DAfwu1E7-JNCbkFofm0AfB6pvwFd6y5dBQJqUMqTFuVibt4DXODTCCA6FmrGu8wfNe1y-ir3OOujH86v750s2IuB3MlQriOc0W9MP7MkUgzLG0_gVb727MxVo5lUGSZH_-DBRZ2mLqsulBszgg%3D%3D "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power? _I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c354c3786cdb42c29d2dd541e2415236&_e=ceSPNLBPC2odROS4TP6YQcDhXUGkvuKW-QbitGAWDoQXDDxc8yh_IWuD1TuQcdovNFbUeYk8odahxsiJG14rxzOH8zZ0sZAkpYPRrC7mZBjCk7JL28PyIECDAom4PO7cF9melnMP62YgJZq1SiAjta6WKPhXZCkWGcaVn49UTJ5FAs1HDJYDrsVhMkPOAp20kVhS8B-AYX8a6cnwaEnDtsQIG6ditlk33Qofs9RRXw1f4JLZha31uhBDdDJMLrFFox3AW41IHFIgjZSUgqXPIKJY4rQ_om5cpTsWRWsv-U6sJeBs5un0qm59nl6-lcZOGGnm_u7j6EL4bzv7WNCdTSRPJuzSATZRvVjPbJYMDUDe0ebAlVn4pT0jqIM_gGX1-6KY2DHlpmKXdQLGRme7t1DzG3mTB0qqthpUw0jBcQrZ8_MFreqp6mGsO-xcYV2h "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

Thank you,

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

From: Speaker McCarthy
Subject: It's urgent that I hear from you.

This is Speaker McCarthy and it's urgent that I hear from you.

I promised that when we took back the House and FIRED Nancy Pelosi, things would change, and we would deliver results.

We are now in a position to do so. I'm reaching out to my top patriots for their priorities, input, and feedback.

You are part of an extremely select group that I'm reaching out to. What you have to say will determine the next steps we take. Please complete this survey by midnight tonight.

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: This high-profile Democrat just suffered a humiliating defeat
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 19, 2023

This high-profile
Democrat just suffered a humiliating defeat
Politics can be a firestorm
for some. But for others, it can get even worse than that.

And this high-profile Democrat
just suffered a humiliating defeat.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Dan Bongino shares tragic
news with his audience

Podcast host Dan
Bongino is a beloved voice for conservatives. It's with a heavy
heart that he opened up about this.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden made this
bald-faced lie that will fill you with rage

It seems nearly
impossible for the President to keep his foot out of his mouth.
But no one expected him to say this.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump's possible pick for
Vice President will leave you speechless

Running side by side
with a leading candidate like former President Trump is no easy
task. But this politician believes they have what it takes.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Please help us protect women’s sports!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11571015?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,

**Top athlete, Riley Gaines, recently came to Mississippi to highlight the risks to women’s sports. **Speaking at an event we hosted, Riley shared her experience of being forced to compete against a man.
---
| Riley explained how she has made it her mission to highlight the absurdity of allowing biological males to be able to participate in women’s sports. **As a top swimmer, she spoke movingly about the awfulness of having to share not just swimming competitions, but changing rooms, with biological males. **

Like millions of Americans, we believe that forcing women to compete against biological males is blatantly unfair and harmful to females.
---
| **We need your help to change the law here in Mississippi!**

Over fifty years ago, Congress enacted Title IX, a crucial piece of legislation aimed at ensuring equal opportunities for women in all aspects of education, including athletics. Thanks to Title IX, women have been able to participate on equal terms in sports at all levels.

The Title IX protections women have long enjoyed are under attack. Women’s private spaces are being erased. Allowing biological males access to women’s sports risks undermining the entire rationale for single-sex competition.
---
|
---
| **The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is at the forefront of efforts to pass legislation in this state that codifies the definition of a “woman.”

_We aim to raise $12,000 to help cover the costs of this campaign.

Can you contribute to preserve the integrity of women's sports?_**

A donation of $10, $50, $100, $500 or even $1,000 would really help us raise awareness, influence policymakers, and stand firm against the misguided push for "inclusion" that sacrifices female rights.

**Can you make a donation today? Please help us make a difference today!**
---
| [Donate Here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=aeadf41720&e=5703353baa "Donate Here!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| P.S. MCPP is 100% funded by donations. Every dollar helps us change our state for the better.
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6bc488bce8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6bc488bce8).

name: Membership Services
subject: Your status: SUSPENDED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your final notice that your Republican Membership has been suspended.

|
---
| | |

---

**YOUR REPUBLICAN MEMBERSHIP HAS BEEN SUSPENDED**

---

Friend,

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e19f1d2eb4074ad88a4ddf7826b2c6e0&_e=_gXnh7V7VvSoDxO8xAcdmzAak1r57rlT-2dJoYrRnSQ-MIp3yMO7nwox0Fe-q69gzmDLXzrWjidUzGiIUiT7UIhkisVBx8jxTUovMDj57ZPF70H4l7z2qbJrFjIqln94nlMP6LP-8M0MqeBBD1zzIg3OK2J_Ok3PR9uuuZwTYWFFEn2-cnLQrBKSzrTwIypzTNAMKV66Ak1YacCVwz_o-TGXQc8HJ_qg8i1XaDPoIfc67TmBjK08Kps2ixh1WiA9bq3dbXKiet7ag4NAKY3QOGZUGtRbHS0fzjniGm9AYiJNw8wdwz5CQMOqTBD-Gs7_9bP86xbdsu1aN4JRrhk4UEUecae_Ni3O8rRz-yCMY5OTZGMOozO0YgGI7z_Fs5fRTQe1D1yUoqyuuFt_nHleq20Qfrjmj3n6znTZ2K-sIcg%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e19f1d2eb4074ad88a4ddf7826b2c6e0&_e=_gXnh7V7VvSoDxO8xAcdmzAak1r57rlT-2dJoYrRnSQ-MIp3yMO7nwox0Fe-q69gzmDLXzrWjidUzGiIUiT7UIhkisVBx8jxTUovMDj57ZPF70H4l7z2qbJrFjIqln94nlMP6LP-8M0MqeBBD1zzIg3OK2J_Ok3PR9uuuZwTYWFFEn2-cnLQrBKSzrTwIypzTNAMKV66Ak1YacCVwz_o-TGXQc8HJ_qg8i1XaDPoIfc67TmBjK08Kps2ixh1WiA9w1aPErsiyE_7rjfE8Al2LC7LbsZrs6k-GLfabQekC-MBDjN5FoX8PQFm0L-YiRD8zgr3xbK6Lirj-6NGkzPsjvI4Jrmvd9AtGmCO-yEzsgsjBUbFfamQhFAWXYi9tyFEHkMs7x5dMvqpZd_mEEml8BRb3h21Kmmfy5RTau6sB9A%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e19f1d2eb4074ad88a4ddf7826b2c6e0&_e=_gXnh7V7VvSoDxO8xAcdmzAak1r57rlT-2dJoYrRnSQ-MIp3yMO7nwox0Fe-q69gzmDLXzrWjidUzGiIUiT7UIhkisVBx8jxTUovMDj57ZPF70H4l7z2qbJrFjIqln94nlMP6LP-8M0MqeBBD1zzIg3OK2J_Ok3PR9uuuZwTYWFFEn2-cnLQrBKSzrTwIypzTNAMKV66Ak1YacCVwz_o-TGXQc8HJ_qg8i1XaDPoIfc67TmBjK08Kps2ixh1WiA9I-5m5afK_WSOBK3WmgHg5hTq3aTCXIjvzamRh4QpX1cUtI6qQ1ghADUqd-WfLmxnpYsJ1FckSqRqzR3Zs_cW7IfL3hskyjWBTgd7I_KASRJbvvA7NBZJTaPJKBaj-03dmaDaas1-abQzHKpgq0dgnWoXgQjIoRNYLw1J1KN_2L0%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

body:

| | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | ************** I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

But there’s also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn’t what it used to be.

I’ve been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That’s the American way.

The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That’s 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. **********

---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=93d18de55c594540be1428e6079e826b&_e=iSEZ17YsGsDzyvXGWTozRHc7f0gdnQ5FMYAJFJPXCARqUal05suxlnAjUIExy6yLnrM_TU768d4JInXW2N9-h2Jl1lze1uHUVcYEg51oV-N5j-ZuLcR414FzkCcLZRarxwGxmXRAc9igPUHRqRCKPsM8KuJ6PxQnUS74YgdZoo8FqJnp-SlKJaCM4PILNeBJOGwVdC5B8knHGesde-QyEU0Z911vtBahkUwSjUvB43KMnOExELtI8qLBNmPiyqsX8cSXpLzjyZwxpIZzXLfZGV6Etz4ZXWpArKgtp3JjpcA%3D)
---
| | ****** Please join me in the fight to restore America’s journalism.
This is one mission that our country desperately needs.**
---
| | |
---

Larry Kudlow
Columnist for The New York Sun

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there’s also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn’t what it used to be. I’ve been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That’s the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That’s 18 years before the New York Times published its first number. My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. ****** | | | | ** Please join me in the fight to restore America’s journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | | | | | | %

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Time is running out to protect bees and stop catastrophic collapse of our vital ecosystems
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
**Bad news, friend.**
**Today is National Honey Bee Day,** and we should be celebrating these tiny pollinators that are so critical to our food system. But instead, **we’re fighting to stop massive bee die-offs – part of what scientists are calling “an insect apocalypse.”**
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937015?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Last year was one of the deadliest on record for honeybees in the United States. **In total, 39% of our honey bee colonies were DECIMATED****,** and beekeepers had to work frantically to keep their struggling populations alive! We know the pesticide industry is largely to blame, and we MUST take urgent action to protect our bees before it’s too late!
Despite staggering bee losses year after year, **greedy chemical corporations are STILL****flooding our farming system with MILLIONS of pounds of bee-toxic pesticides called neonics.** Even in the tiniest doses, neonics damage bees’ nervous systems and disrupt their ability to communicate, reproduce, or forage for food. Exposure to neonics can even kill bees outright!
**The problem is that pesticide companies have our farming system totally hooked on these chemicals.** Big Ag has used so many neonics in the last three decades that our environment is now **48 TIMES MORE TOXIC** to our precious bees! Neonics pollute the soil and water and spread easily through the whole ecosystem, **POISONING our farm fields and surrounding lands that bees need for foraging! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937016?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937017?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937018?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937015?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It gets worse: **Even the seeds of major crops like soy and corn are treated with neonics. The impact is so damaging that just one coated corn seed has enough of these chemicals to KILL up to 80,000 bees****!** Neonics absorb into every part of the crop, so the plants themselves become toxic to the pollinators we rely on.**Our poor bees don’t stand a chance against such systematic contamination! ****That’s why Friends of the Earth is fighting back. **
**We set a goal to raise $107,000 before National Honey Bee Day ends – and right now, a generous group of donors will MATCH all gifts up to this goal, but only until midnight tonight![ Please: Will you make a membership gift of $27 or more now and have it DOUBLED to help Friends of the Earth protect pollinators and our fragile planet? ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937019?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937015?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Study after study shows almost NO BENEFITS to neonic seed coatings. But chemical companies are raking in profits while bees are DYING at alarming rates. ****And we're paying the price, too:** Declining pollinator populations have already caused a global decrease in fruits, vegetables and nuts. Research shows that this could mean up to **500,000 excess deaths per year from a lack of access to healthy foods! **
We can’t afford to stand aside and let the pesticide industry wreak havoc on our food system with disastrous consequences for pollinators, people and our planet. **That’s why Friends of the Earth is fighting to hold the pesticide industry accountable and transform our farming system so we can protect bees, other precious pollinators, and our planet before it’s too late to make a difference. But we need YOUR help to make the most of our rare MATCH opportunity and hit our crucial $107,000 goal.**
**National Honey Bee Day is just once a year, but our fight is more urgent than ever. So please, before our match expires at midnight TONIGHT:[ Will you make a membership gift of $27 or more now – while $27 becomes $54! – in honor of National Honey Bee Day to help Friends of the Earth protect precious pollinators and our planet?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937019?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Bad news, friend. Today is National Honey Bee Day, and we should be celebrating these tiny pollinators that are so critical to our food system. But instead, we’re fighting to stop massive bee die-offs – part of what scientists are calling “an insect apocalypse.” == Last year was one of the deadliest on record for honeybees in the United States. In total, 39% of our honey bee colonies were DECIMATED, and beekeepers had to work frantically to keep their struggling populations alive! We know the pesticide industry is largely to blame, and we MUST take urgent action to protect our bees before it’s too late! Despite staggering bee losses year after year, greedy chemical corporations are STILLflooding our farming system with MILLIONS of pounds of bee-toxic pesticides called neonics. Even in the tiniest doses, neonics damage bees’ nervous systems and disrupt their ability to communicate, reproduce, or forage for food. Exposure to neonics can even kill bees outright! The problem is that pesticide companies have our farming system totally hooked on these chemicals. Big Ag has used so many neonics in the last three decades that our environment is now 48 TIMES MORE TOXIC to our precious bees! Neonics pollute the soil and water and spread easily through the whole ecosystem, POISONING our farm fields and surrounding lands that bees need for foraging! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | | == | | == | | == It gets worse: Even the seeds of major crops like soy and corn are treated with neonics. The impact is so damaging that just one coated corn seed has enough of these chemicals to KILL up to 80,000 bees! Neonics absorb into every part of the crop, so the plants themselves become toxic to the pollinators we rely on.Our poor bees don’t stand a chance against such systematic contamination! That’s why Friends of the Earth is fighting back. We set a goal to raise $107,000 before National Honey Bee Day ends – and right now, a generous group of donors will MATCH all gifts up to this goal, but only until midnight tonight == Study after study shows almost NO BENEFITS to neonic seed coatings. But chemical companies are raking in profits while bees are DYING at alarming rates. And we're paying the price, too: Declining pollinator populations have already caused a global decrease in fruits, vegetables and nuts. Research shows that this could mean up to 500,000 excess deaths per year from a lack of access to healthy foods! We can’t afford to stand aside and let the pesticide industry wreak havoc on our food system with disastrous consequences for pollinators, people and our planet. That’s why Friends of the Earth is fighting to hold the pesticide industry accountable and transform our farming system so we can protect bees, other precious pollinators, and our planet before it’s too late to make a difference. But we need YOUR help to make the most of our rare MATCH opportunity and hit our crucial $107,000 goal. National Honey Bee Day is just once a year, but our fight is more urgent than ever. So please, before our match expires at midnight TONIGHT:== If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | | == | | == | | == Thank you for your urgent support, Kendra Klein Deputy Director of Science Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: Riley Gaines
subject: My mission to save women’s sports
body:
I knew it wouldn’t be easy

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z40qgpon960end8u9gupm5hlei2seojson79vdo8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm0o70cth2bs "New Message From: Riley Gaines")
---

_**[Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women's sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj8a0mq9kt4hgkn9jnhr02tt37arl9dorc60v9co_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm0o70cth2bs "Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women’s sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn. ")**_

I grew up swimming and was blessed to receive a scholarship to the University of Kentucky. It was all a dream come true... _Until it wasn 't._

When a 6'4 male walked into our locker room. Myself and other young women were expected to carry on business as usual, but I didn't stand for it.

I immediately left the locker room and asked a pool official how it was allowed to happen. I was told they "got around that," and it was okay. **That 's where my outrage began.**

Any man, coach, or official could have full access by making the locker rooms unisex. We weren't warned. We were subjected. And to rub salt into the wound, I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I've experienced the fear. I've experienced the sadness. I've experienced what Democrats think is "no big deal." And now, because I didn't stand for it and spoke up for women and girls everywhere, I have a target on my back.

Unfortunately for them, it has only empowered me. _**[My mission to save women's sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what's happening in women's sports is only the beginning.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1jv55qoudvjo8kghr5f7d98so28l23au8ean03g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm0o70cth2bs "My mission to save women’s sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what’s happening in women’s sports is only the beginning.")**_

The woke, transgender agenda won't stop.

I refuse to let this journey end. I refuse to bow down because they want me to. _**[I'm asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women's sports.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zck3bjof1g1svtqpor9acqg8a12khed8e2vbd260_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm0o70cth2bs "I’m asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women’s sports.")**_

Can I count on you?

Thank you,

Riley

---
| |

* * *
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbj0n9glgjpivjvudk0lkdjhscm6o4jmmb9aos38_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm0o70cth2bs "Marsha Image Footer")
---

_A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhh9hn5gij54o7q9gpiiisusi4smmp2ibvf465p8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm0o70cth2bs "please, click here to support my efforts if you can.")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter,

Marsha Blackburn

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Special Edition
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROBERTSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
An Ugly Truth!
| | | |
---
\--This is a special edition of Mark's Monday Memo from his campaign staff--
Captioned: An Ugly Truth!
It's that time of year again! No, not Labor Day. Halloween? Uh-huh. Christmas? Nice guess. No, it's time for candidates running for office to ask for donations. It is an ugly subject, but non-fiction usually is. We do need money.
Are you thinking it is too early to give money to a campaign? After all, it is 10 months until the primary in Nevada and 15 months until the general election. Like, why do we need your dollars now--sooner rather than later? Let's count the ways:
* Maybe some of you have noticed we sent this message to you through software called Constant Contact. We must pay them each month, or we lose this effective means of communication! * We also pay three cents for every text message we send out. We know, it's a bit annoying, but they are an effective campaign marketing tool. Pennies add up! * Mark's website is another expense, but again, a campaign tool we cannot do without. * Signs--you would not believe how much those signs you see on the side of the road and in people's front yards cost. Trust us, it's a lot! Yard signs, campaign banners, magnetic placards for cars, and road signs. Oh, and we also have to pay a guy to maintain the road signs. * Videographer--we have found a great one at a fantastic price to produce much needed campaign videos. We always work hard to get the best deals when spending the money you send us! * Candidate Information Cards--Well, this one is easy. These are needed for potential voters so they know Mark's principles and stand on issues. We need lots of these for campaign events, fund raisers, canvassing, wherever Mark and campaign workers are out and about. * Miscellaneous Administrative Costs. Staffers (and Mark) need business cards. We have spent money on T-shirts for workers to wear and also give away. Name tags for staffers to identify them as they attend events with Mark. We won't bore you further, but these all add up. We just gave hundreds of popsicles away to kids at the Boulder City Fourth of July parade.
Needless to say, we really hate to ask; however, we do need your help sooner rather than later. It's simple. If you are tired of the way our government works and can support Mark in this way, just click on the button below or visit our website, www.robertsonforcongress.
Mark is a fiscal conservative, a professional financial planner with an MBA in Finance. He will spend your money wisely. He does not know any other way!
We promise to be good stewards of your money!
And by the way, none of us (Mark's staff) are being paid. We are all doing this because we want to see changes in government, and we believe Mark can do just that!
---

clean_body: An Ugly Truth! | | | | \--This is a special edition of Mark's Monday Memo from his campaign staff-- Captioned: An Ugly Truth! It's that time of year again! No, not Labor Day. Halloween? Uh-huh. Christmas? Nice guess. No, it's time for candidates running for office to ask for donations. It is an ugly subject, but non-fiction usually is. We do need money. Are you thinking it is too early to give money to a campaign? After all, it is 10 months until the primary in Nevada and 15 months until the general election. Like, why do we need your dollars now--sooner rather than later? Let's count the ways: Maybe some of you have noticed we sent this message to you through software called Constant Contact. We must pay them each month, or we lose this effective means of communication! We also pay three cents for every text message we send out. We know, it's a bit annoying, but they are an effective campaign marketing tool. Pennies add up! Mark's website is another expense, but again, a campaign tool we cannot do without. Signs--you would not believe how much those signs you see on the side of the road and in people's front yards cost. Trust us, it's a lot! Yard signs, campaign banners, magnetic placards for cars, and road signs. Oh, and we also have to pay a guy to maintain the road signs. Videographer--we have found a great one at a fantastic price to produce much needed campaign videos. We always work hard to get the best deals when spending the money you send us! Candidate Information Cards--Well, this one is easy. These are needed for potential voters so they know Mark's principles and stand on issues. We need lots of these for campaign events, fund raisers, canvassing, wherever Mark and campaign workers are out and about. * Miscellaneous Administrative Costs. Staffers (and Mark) need business cards. We have spent money on T-shirts for workers to wear and also give away. Name tags for staffers to identify them as they attend events with Mark. We won't bore you further, but these all add up. We just gave hundreds of popsicles away to kids at the Boulder City Fourth of July parade. Needless to say, we really hate to ask; however, we do need your help sooner rather than later. It's simple. If you are tired of the way our government works and can support Mark in this way, just click on the button below or visit our website, www.robertsonforcongress. Mark is a fiscal conservative, a professional financial planner with an MBA in Finance. He will spend your money wisely. He does not know any other way! We promise to be good stewards of your money! And by the way, none of us (Mark's staff) are being paid. We are all doing this because we want to see changes in government, and we believe Mark can do just that! | == | == | | PAID FOR BY ROBERTSON FOR CONGRESS | | Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply an endorsement by the U.S. Military. | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/wghRw3GNzEaWhFw-anRwUA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/wghRw3GNzEaWhFw-anRwUA2]
Hey Peter, it’s Wiley!
Recently, a memory came to my mind, and I wanted to share it. In 1995, I worked in Congress as an intern. The newspaper was how you got your updates back then, and my job was to clip out articles (literally clip them!) and paste them onto a sheet for scanning. I was particularly bummed that summer to see headlines about Jerry Garcia’s last performance with the Grateful Dead. To this day, I regret missing that show.
Over the years, I’ve found one universal truth, and it’s that in a world often divided, the impact of the Grateful Dead reminds us that music has the power to bridge divides and bring people together.
The Grateful Dead’s influence inspire me. So, my question for you today is a bit different than usual, what inspires you? Is it music? Another group or musician? Your children? I’d love to hear it: [http://secure.ngpvan.com/wghRw3GNzEaWhFw-anRwUA2]
LET ME KNOW [https://secure.ngpvan.com/wghRw3GNzEaWhFw-anRwUA2]
Dead and Company's final concert happened recently, and while they may have reached their final destination, their music and spirit will live on.
Gratefully,
Wiley Nickel

body:
Because I’ve seen what life without freedom is like.| | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=54f86a5534864b73ab08c033c8eed303&_e=a76KbwVebl5F4NJs5Ez1hFGKWQ_Wp4VOIeeTfhaetUcIXpsHCVJpWAihAGSXkQh01-0Cg1gdmFiYsWuJvRDT0-6deVSXKZyvZuqhAzDrorshIR_0Z6cSfOR0FDGrPyT134WZUpuiiTHGVRdp8tmM61MCVUaP1P6vLZMoCe8bFJFAE_tEQfO6kQdKmQjScYan5ZNcJTHVxPLJ0IVSLYvU-hunR2onbAmhcBpWlYJlgH-9oIK1g5hj1s47yE0GXMFC9B7XjFSyl7isfkd1XHdIbzbIvbOv6fhpyJowvDyivJlcgu0eXj2IDg8yuaG0oeUnfw1QnH-PsPF_S2m5P_NIxqgJ3Z310qovb_-THMZRxyREqwrnwqIQbhrC4kIOV6Rl24nPbDS0lQ1JedG47kfJhA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, No one loves America like I do, and I don’t say that lightly either. Being a refugee at 4 years old after escaping communism makes you appreciate every single moment in life, **[especially here in America.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=54f86a5534864b73ab08c033c8eed303&_e=a76KbwVebl5F4NJs5Ez1hFGKWQ_Wp4VOIeeTfhaetUcIXpsHCVJpWAihAGSXkQh01-0Cg1gdmFiYsWuJvRDT0-6deVSXKZyvZuqhAzDrorshIR_0Z6cSfOR0FDGrPyT134WZUpuiiTHGVRdp8tmM61MCVUaP1P6vLZMoCe8bFJFAE_tEQfO6kQdKmQjScYan5ZNcJTHVxPLJ0IVSLYvU-hunR2onbAmhcBpWlYJlgH-9oIK1g5hj1s47yE0GXMFC2Y-OP_uvHFlNVVC8-f-NNrXCkxrUbgGAxsnnnWNU9n9LhD0_boVLLQE4W0giktcD0oM9siSFF19x6G6fHa9TQPnQZUQM-4QyWeWB0UAlNLlDzhGJnxJm3-Xms6N_UXuJMFKJwFPgKSaTRLEq5MhHCA%3D%3D)**

In a place like America, you’re not put on a kill list for having a different opinion like my father was in Vietnam, and his only crime was working in the South Vietnamese Government when the Communists took over.

**Sadly, that’s the same thing the Taliban did when Joe Biden let them retake Afghanistan, they murdered thousands of people just for supporting the American government.**
---
[**STAND FOR FREEDOM >> SUPPORT HUNG CAO FOR SENATE**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=54f86a5534864b73ab08c033c8eed303&_e=a76KbwVebl5F4NJs5Ez1hFGKWQ_Wp4VOIeeTfhaetUcIXpsHCVJpWAihAGSXkQh01-0Cg1gdmFiYsWuJvRDT0-6deVSXKZyvZuqhAzDrorshIR_0Z6cSfOR0FDGrPyT134WZUpuiiTHGVRdp8tmM61MCVUaP1P6vLZMoCe8bFJFAE_tEQfO6kQdKmQjScYan5ZNcJTHVxPLJ0IVSLYvU-hunR2onbAmhcBpWlYJlgH-9oIK1g5hj1s47yE0GXMFCaQT_nJEUWT5QJb78cr8aithiWyBUT-3aT5JKHvnysd185XcSM-YohM3Bz0vmaIA3kimpeDSEk-V9DTLl0-npIy8IwO1pKSvw6WmlzpFHD4kmNuBGP-5GSLYWUs6o0GmJz_HzckaLYdjUhLLq1GkYTQ%3D%3D)
---
Now, I didn’t serve in Combat operations fighting terrorism throughout Afghanistan, Iraq, and Somalia just to sit by watching Joe Biden and the Washington Democrats turn their backs on American Values.

My family didn’t escape communists and their brutal dictatorship just to watch America be torn apart from the inside by those same radical ideals that are now being forced on us today. [**That is why I’m running for Senate, and why I need your support.**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=54f86a5534864b73ab08c033c8eed303&_e=a76KbwVebl5F4NJs5Ez1hFGKWQ_Wp4VOIeeTfhaetUcIXpsHCVJpWAihAGSXkQh01-0Cg1gdmFiYsWuJvRDT0-6deVSXKZyvZuqhAzDrorshIR_0Z6cSfOR0FDGrPyT134WZUpuiiTHGVRdp8tmM61MCVUaP1P6vLZMoCe8bFJFAE_tEQfO6kQdKmQjScYan5ZNcJTHVxPLJ0IVSLYvU-hunR2onbAmhcBpWlYJlgH-9oIK1g5hj1s47yE0GXMFC1U043zTwfx3Qn6CqvJvu7-wSZi-LnYfrMZ6aaCfRCcXajgDFcwCpanQRk7FxEb1lbNL0ppvztLD5GiHLmffPq9mVweqHYyN3M5r1NsLf8yJRLPNBqRlA8rOJgMaVXKpSJ3EFHhARJoZ1tn-jtw0abA%3D%3D)
---
[**STAND FOR FREEDOM >> SUPPORT HUNG CAO FOR SENATE**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=54f86a5534864b73ab08c033c8eed303&_e=a76KbwVebl5F4NJs5Ez1hFGKWQ_Wp4VOIeeTfhaetUcIXpsHCVJpWAihAGSXkQh01-0Cg1gdmFiYsWuJvRDT0-6deVSXKZyvZuqhAzDrorshIR_0Z6cSfOR0FDGrPyT134WZUpuiiTHGVRdp8tmM61MCVUaP1P6vLZMoCe8bFJFAE_tEQfO6kQdKmQjScYan5ZNcJTHVxPLJ0IVSLYvU-hunR2onbAmhcBpWlYJlgH-9oIK1g5hj1s47yE0GXMFC9TXkuCsn8-eUUjeIRqp1V_-ntwWtlrpyhHK0Kdrr16q580oXrWVwf1m8ZIZ8HybDN7mxceiTSf6U9xSwASKHhBWgkY8XJpu19XMwX945ffH2w_8OSwDoWdsSiNjAL0b6_VltAKN3ZN0-iusp3vS1Lg%3D%3D)
---
The America we know and love is under attack from woke radicalism that is determined to silence anyone who opposes them, and that’s exactly why we need to do everything we can to stop their radicalism before it’s too late.
**[Can I count on your support to help fight for the American values that so many in this world look to for hope and as a sign of what freedom means?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=54f86a5534864b73ab08c033c8eed303&_e=a76KbwVebl5F4NJs5Ez1hFGKWQ_Wp4VOIeeTfhaetUcIXpsHCVJpWAihAGSXkQh01-0Cg1gdmFiYsWuJvRDT0-6deVSXKZyvZuqhAzDrorshIR_0Z6cSfOR0FDGrPyT134WZUpuiiTHGVRdp8tmM61MCVUaP1P6vLZMoCe8bFJFAE_tEQfO6kQdKmQjScYan5ZNcJTHVxPLJ0IVSLYvU-hunR2onbAmhcBpWlYJlgH-9oIK1g5hj1s47yE0GXMFCSmBpk6xySBEAEH4EAIVKAqOb_HGXT-PwRNVWF1tULs-cijJybcFsH-5M8ECPXGDAUNk4wFvvQNErxx1mMKoyuCdKOmYTfFA5GW4QerLShtRmmHf15jdQ5CyGBAzJPZ-6-nIkfFL6_-wxRRd-Lm6grA%3D%3D)**
I can’t win this battle for Senate without you, so please let me know ASAP if I can count on your help to save America.

Non sibi sed patriae,

Being a refugee at 4 years old after escaping communism makes you appreciate every single moment in life, In a place like America, you’re not put on a kill list for having a different opinion like my father was in Vietnam, and his only crime was working in the South Vietnamese Government when the Communists took over. Sadly, that’s the same thing the Taliban did when Joe Biden let them retake Afghanistan, they murdered thousands of people just for supporting the American government. Now, I didn’t serve in Combat operations fighting terrorism throughout Afghanistan, Iraq, and Somalia just to sit by watching Joe Biden and the Washington Democrats turn their backs on American Values. My family didn’t escape communists and their brutal dictatorship just to watch America be torn apart from the inside by those same radical ideals that are now being forced on us today. The America we know and love is under attack from woke radicalism that is determined to silence anyone who opposes them, and that’s exactly why we need to do everything we can to stop their radicalism before it’s too late. I can’t win this battle for Senate without you, so please let me know ASAP if I can count on your help to save America. Non sibi sed patriae, Captain Hung Cao (USN Retired)Republican for VA | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hung Cao for Virginia

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** August 19, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com)
**Round 10 Of Tell It Like It Is PAC’s 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid to Debate**
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released the final ad in a ten-part video series highlighting why Donald Trump is afraid to commit to the first Republican National Committee (RNC) debate on August 23rd.
Round Ten takes Trump to task for previous behavior on the debate stage. Trump’s conduct has been summed up well by Governor Chris Christie, as “[juvenile](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=8ae713a7cd&e=d0a9afa930).”
As Governor Christie likes to remind voters, if Trump shows up to the first debate, there is the possibility that he could be out on bail in four different jurisdictions. Trump [does not have](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=bc977823cd&e=d0a9afa930) the temperament or character to serve as president.
The underlying message behind the digital campaign is clear: Donald Trump is afraid to debate because he knows that Governor Christie will bring the fight directly to him. Unlike the other candidates in the race, Governor Christie is not afraid to prosecute his failures and disqualifying behavior.
**Round 10: Child**

name: Full Mag News
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4a780b7385f4e2fa7a5b57a38dcd569&_e=18HJdpfyYoQTXHyH0L3XvOVzlxyypPXsevVsx4Bb6aDgWrYrMrpm89VuWF2ZGbWVrP_Nh7_lrQIK7wmItCs0ZyhGshsmt1i1q4ZKOIiqivsF0SNV3quFgFh12KBe5Ct8P796c5aA-_SfOD2p7SVRsvUuFKvJp_V_kO_Z8LDMKaFdWRFfSHgXQ8BmDRVCui4ShabGg-bhcj_myFmSmSWUsKjBvdY1wxJmTcmUuKJ7RndgEFMAfH1j0_JFYrLoea1fPV_6LvEvfTXR6muxgHfLDuNiVDOM28nFAjGSiO-X1yow2I4IsvQFFnrzy_97rFxJEt2bMaiq3KiGzGZQLyn6mfs_7jXhR8IIaWp5jdFGCfrXU53JavZNOArIwvJhnCxclbBV4u0ZbXVgfxLZIdBMnHuU6P0g9x_PJFChG1loqkQ%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4a780b7385f4e2fa7a5b57a38dcd569&_e=18HJdpfyYoQTXHyH0L3XvOVzlxyypPXsevVsx4Bb6aDgWrYrMrpm89VuWF2ZGbWVrP_Nh7_lrQIK7wmItCs0ZyhGshsmt1i1q4ZKOIiqivsF0SNV3quFgFh12KBe5Ct8P796c5aA-_SfOD2p7SVRsvUuFKvJp_V_kO_Z8LDMKaFdWRFfSHgXQ8BmDRVCui4ShabGg-bhcj_myFmSmSWUsKjBvdY1wxJmTcmUuKJ7RndgEFMAfH1j0_JFYrLoea1fxVUzFb7JeVaqXTjwK53QAWpPEWztOt_hsDRht8EB0V6aFOSf8cwQoIWI3dsT95755gAg5KwmaILTocDi1WdHlz-rUToX1XGeHLWU8On46uYkcbFT0Kl9hAQlTDqDm3JmkmPIKTtGBdkjqr1ARFZzIucNaONCdida6JTQRbY1jnA%3D)

Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4a780b7385f4e2fa7a5b57a38dcd569&_e=18HJdpfyYoQTXHyH0L3XvOVzlxyypPXsevVsx4Bb6aDgWrYrMrpm89VuWF2ZGbWVrP_Nh7_lrQIK7wmItCs0ZyhGshsmt1i1q4ZKOIiqivsF0SNV3quFgFh12KBe5Ct8P796c5aA-_SfOD2p7SVRsvUuFKvJp_V_kO_Z8LDMKaFdWRFfSHgXQ8BmDRVCui4ShabGg-bhcj_myFmSmSWUsKjBvdY1wxJmTcmUuKJ7RndgEFMAfH1j0_JFYrLoea1fkULI4mryXRuJStW5h2enDSVg6o6b-5N6MRPeBCZxNsEkbvQDD3OcH5DrW6rRzgqFHVHvFaK4wiaZW5Uc4g-1m3bdtWixH4AGIsV34aqk1Ghtwui6s194yS5yvq82atICJ4e92Om-RsPaCtPBsjxKbFu1h1kvPTf3UQcD64Y0IfA%3D)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: DC Statehood Bill introduced with OVERWHELMING SUPPORT from Dem Senators!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---

Tom Carper (D-Del.)

Ron Wyden (D-Ore.)._

---
| | [STOP DC STATEHOOD](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zctfsp4bamct4s4qq69ml0tp4b03083kjmdqpag0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm2ob2chh2bs "STOP DC STATEHOOD")
---
The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

Friend, a Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt3sgjpa16sglajc2a47v8fkpuk0rujdqn3pg0no_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm2ob2chh2bs "Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?")**

---
Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy
---
| |

* * *

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3khdj6vsvbncfs52d3rn1ullo1h13vionq0llng_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm2ob2chh2bs "Never Give Up: Donate now!")
_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsqctk3rv9mhd6dk6r3ngq7kc78j62cfnjk9e5q8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm2ob2chh2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

Thank you,

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: The most important race in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The outcome will determine control of the Senate, and probably control of the White House as well.
#

Peter -
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate. Please let us explain why this request is so important.
Here is the truth:
Arizona's Senate race is probably the most important race in the country.
The outcome will determine control of the Senate, and probably control of the White House as well.
Every poll shows that Kyrsten Sinema has no path to victory. But if Sinema pulls enough votes off of Ruben she can help Kari Lake win. And if Lake wins Democrats have no hope of holding control in the Senate. **
Now, if Kari Lake wins in Arizona her best buddy Trump could win, too. And if Trump wins in Arizona, it's likely he'll take back the White House.
Those are the stakes.
What that means is that **Ruben has to win.** And we have a plan to do it.
But we can't put it into action without you, and we definitely can’t if we don’t hit our goals. So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego's campaign to help us hit our goals? These goals aren’t arbitrary — they are what we need to raise to WIN. So please, help us hit ours and donate today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-aug23.91DAaM&refcode=em230819-1-d&t=1&akid=968%2E734936%2E049L63)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-aug23.7Jwrcb&refcode=em230819-1-d&t=20&akid=968%2E734936%2E049L63)**

clean_body: The outcome will determine control of the Senate, and probably control of the White House as well. Peter - In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate. Please let us explain why this request is so important. Here is the truth: Arizona's Senate race is probably the most important race in the country. The outcome will determine control of the Senate, and probably control of the White House as well. Every poll shows that Kyrsten Sinema has no path to victory. But if Sinema pulls enough votes off of Ruben she can help Kari Lake win. And if Lake wins Democrats have no hope of holding control in the Senate. Now, if Kari Lake wins in Arizona her best buddy Trump could win, too. And if Trump wins in Arizona, it's likely he'll take back the White House. Those are the stakes. What that means is that Ruben has to win. And we have a plan to do it. But we can't put it into action without you, and we definitely can’t if we don’t hit our goals. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Ruben Gallego for Arizona Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
