name: Riley Gaines
subject: Can I loop you in?
body:
I knew it wouldn't be easy

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b81dbb4ee61e47ae88d0ef3bdb428e24&_e=6MfQpzMkUI7uW_Oi4sPeT33s7kpis54FMf-pOAMZJNAxRwe2e3pczCibssrmbJCPVxIR6DFac_djO5Bo4vGDXCL5XZG6lZAs_UHpJ57zCIHVMykyeIKYgq9QTENW0jylPPs81KGlDAGxr2beQcu9NwFCpBsQ7iIfrhlo3GIrSyQ9J6Hvb_JvtHoQm3v-FBs4D_06b4Y--6WMOeSoD4UOFEwcp0CdFeU19AncLzVsr6o95N20fRliO3319ClCK20WCY5p-NftaUR4z2tPiGeAIHE072SPVSYd4iVad6uQmBnn-2NbXu2hzTu4dXor9GEqgs_FfbaghnAWoECJbb4xwtfv0ejI8FWpr0h-3ta_ZMqeJwEAlQ6igOKoZa1iPGUq19h-UOM74Sk20717rRw79CXwcj7yyrY8PcBVc5eMLHD4HZa8avWQ7ZHXwIuvGcyY "New Message From: Riley Gaines")
---

_**[Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women's sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b81dbb4ee61e47ae88d0ef3bdb428e24&_e=6MfQpzMkUI7uW_Oi4sPeT33s7kpis54FMf-pOAMZJNAxRwe2e3pczCibssrmbJCPVxIR6DFac_djO5Bo4vGDXCL5XZG6lZAs_UHpJ57zCIHVMykyeIKYgq9QTENW0jylPPs81KGlDAGxr2beQcu9NwFCpBsQ7iIfrhlo3GIrSyQ9J6Hvb_JvtHoQm3v-FBs4D_06b4Y--6WMOeSoD4UOFEwcp0CdFeU19AncLzVsr6o95N20fRliO3319ClCK20WCY5p-NftaUR4z2tPiGeAIHE072SPVSYd4iVad6uQmBlCmV0PhaEOvUhN5Fc3G9oliS8Cf8XJOwxq6i90jmZIkPjzO49BIr-0l1h6m_JRk04rEmUiYT8Z267xe7cKvlAU8LBEQI3Ebajqj66FH9JMyTezIUhNGxcQt-mc_jpR6obvkL4b4OPA3RWiaYJ1g4in "Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women’s sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn. ")**_

I grew up swimming and was blessed to receive a scholarship to the University of Kentucky. It was all a dream come true... _Until it wasn 't._

When a 6'4 male walked into our locker room. Myself and other young women were expected to carry on business as usual, but I didn't stand for it.

I immediately left the locker room and asked a pool official how it was allowed to happen. I was told they "got around that," and it was okay. **That 's where my outrage began.**

Any man, coach, or official could have full access by making the locker rooms unisex. We weren't warned. We were subjected. And to rub salt into the wound, I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I've experienced the fear. I've experienced the sadness. I've experienced what Democrats think is "no big deal." And now, because I didn't stand for it and spoke up for women and girls everywhere, I have a target on my back.

Unfortunately for them, it has only empowered me. _**[My mission to save women's sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what's happening in women's sports is only the beginning.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b81dbb4ee61e47ae88d0ef3bdb428e24&_e=6MfQpzMkUI7uW_Oi4sPeT33s7kpis54FMf-pOAMZJNAxRwe2e3pczCibssrmbJCPVxIR6DFac_djO5Bo4vGDXCL5XZG6lZAs_UHpJ57zCIHVMykyeIKYgq9QTENW0jylPPs81KGlDAGxr2beQcu9NwFCpBsQ7iIfrhlo3GIrSyQ9J6Hvb_JvtHoQm3v-FBs4D_06b4Y--6WMOeSoD4UOFEwcp0CdFeU19AncLzVsr6o95N20fRliO3319ClCK20WCY5p-NftaUR4z2tPiGeAIHE072SPVSYd4iVad6uQmBmvowM2hymFiq8k-GeC81Ityb0pPVIK0K3hP4ZhrlcggOgmROAovb2qNfaqT03kf6bLGKZsqTiiVlEQevZwIk3VItUyr3Zf-0ecVgHGH4Ci6LLrCaMEuJAFB5GuQU_ZqgsUeYFO9j0zP1A7aQLE-jyG "My mission to save women’s sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what’s happening in women’s sports is only the beginning.")**_

The woke, transgender agenda won't stop.

I refuse to let this journey end. I refuse to bow down because they want me to. _**[I'm asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women's sports.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b81dbb4ee61e47ae88d0ef3bdb428e24&_e=6MfQpzMkUI7uW_Oi4sPeT33s7kpis54FMf-pOAMZJNAxRwe2e3pczCibssrmbJCPVxIR6DFac_djO5Bo4vGDXCL5XZG6lZAs_UHpJ57zCIHVMykyeIKYgq9QTENW0jylPPs81KGlDAGxr2beQcu9NwFCpBsQ7iIfrhlo3GIrSyQ9J6Hvb_JvtHoQm3v-FBs4D_06b4Y--6WMOeSoD4UOFEwcp0CdFeU19AncLzVsr6o95N20fRliO3319ClCK20WCY5p-NftaUR4z2tPiGeAIHE072SPVSYd4iVad6uQmBl4QSCJhZvcZ-m76dstELiNJDBuKJFd822OqJIkX1Hj1OCRNpc6JmpLQGSXlUKsOCFQq6Kxqkio3xZHuL3VygCjutbWkc5YiCooEMZU0UTqvPfEMc3zdJ3SQqVGnkjv_r8LFgpYQCAS8M-XubZD2jPy "I’m asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women’s sports.")**_

Can I count on you?

Thank you,

Riley

---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvlm1re5fbtjd03akor7h2e7t299dt78q10j7vp0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm6oj2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztpe96hqmu7k9cqfhfs57ddjuqo25bmmsvf4oilo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm6oj2cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbkdc7qgitche0kkf9ts8h8pmi7i33ksu8dn2ur0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c5hm6oj2cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: Ending this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=09b481f6bdaf4ca88e3ac33d6e1a3051&_e=EjUvWPv0qE0kbx5YnNc4MgWQAHBmykhFJHIPvhmEaN9K0lDEwiIFfiJ0gHXteXeK9UKo2wqZESV6WbE_2qDglYPS01XWBhgcDeJaw31H6WhbrgV22V4WvGKBNR3iim4ZYWPlL6ElPv7uoKv1EsgLpPNQS0yHfDKOsV3Ot1fOxWRHNWsTDXGUA0y1mbbsV4tGuX-PkelwxaAUA0a76OArjk7pIO7yRGVqqOilShUJVZNbtU5STlsLMJxHqJXLztu1e6kcyUxp01gsmBXH8GLkaN3Q4_ffobFGAjjU5ZKIaw1O9SlEIIkNAcINdW-lda_22YmoNeDSLYRZcR27FlKdtJv0dv_sM9bXChH_d9plvvoq9UfumJeuejS67bhMB1uGWyWr9YQszGrdFDtW5rde93u4vFlhMdX4qMLc9p-k5oK1KAjzehnuAFX7SJ0FZ9jKEQAsa6JWdkEnH_X6fvROzR88cJ_QpEQkpipACR30Jc4%3D)
---

Friend --

My name is Morgan Luttrell.

I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

I've seen things I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. Things I will never be able to unsee.

In 2009, I survived a helicopter crash that should've taken my life but, by the grace of God, I was given a second chance.

No matter how tough or brave you are, nothing is fully in your control. That's why we put our faith in God.

**But -- there are some things we CAN control, and that 's why I'm running for Congress. **

I have to just say it: Biden and the Radical Democrats want me GONE, they want me DEFEATED, they want to END my campaign for good.

But unlike the spineless career politicians, **I 'm not someone who EVER gives up.**

You see, the career DC politicians are living each day by their own agenda -- not thinking about those suffering the consequences.

After my time in the military, I knew that each day that I woke up in America was a gift.

_**The land of the free and home of the brave.**_

But the Biden regime has stripped our nation of our core values and turned us down a path that is leading us toward a dark future.

**So, Friend, I want to humbly ask you right now if you 'll stand with me in my fight for the America we all once knew and loved. **

It is patriots like yourself that have helped change the direction of our country before, but we still need you. Maybe now more than ever.

Please, stand up for America's liberties and freedoms by chipping in just a few bucks today?

---

Thank you,

Morgan Luttrell

| | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | ************** I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

But there’s also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn’t what it used to be.

I’ve been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That’s the American way.

The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That’s 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. **********

---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8082167c4ac74730ba43f6389d9d085a&_e=-3nvvVvMlMAmidwuu99xvOJLoH3PYxA0NbuEycTq09xuKXma_QaEwUyMVTx_Ej_tSJRcYEzcYB5fUwdgXr7cm6plaM6fOCYkEOg27dWhUHrQ2leJ7jadMu5BQEXEqunp87b1ErRuOcXW2b1ji79Kzvt_fNDer6JB2UDdoRwpHlr6Q9lBxcu6TqCX8Ac7A42iq_lsVR7t_T8pLoILDnI41lW-GaikoyIOm7ra1w9ZDKk2xzv0s40bW2PpMC9vzDLyb_95I8sZlCUSA8EkqCPQD5JFctqMJ2b2hmuIsJC6Cx0%3D)
---
| | ****** Please join me in the fight to restore America’s journalism.
This is one mission that our country desperately needs.**
---
| | |
---

Larry Kudlow
Columnist for The New York Sun

clean_body: As you know, journalism isn’t what it used to be. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Dear Sun Reader, | | ************ I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there’s also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn’t what it used to be. I’ve been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That’s the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That’s 18 years before the New York Times published its first number. My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. ****** | | | | ** Please join me in the fight to restore America’s journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | | | | | | %

Peter, By now you’ve probably seen photos and videos of the aftermath of the tragic wildfires in Maui that killed over 100 people. So I don’t have to explain to you how horrific this event was. **Here’s the reality: thousands of Hawaiians have lost everything, and they need our help rebuilding.** Times like this require everyone to step up and do their part to help struggling fellow Americans recover. **[That’s why my team and I are asking our supporters to contribute to the Hawai'i Community Foundation. Will you send in whatever you can today to help victims of the unprecedented wildfires?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68329466/422709893/1595807645?refcode=em-8.19.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQ4NjViMC05ODNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SnaKs4GJGM13-WlxgyL58dabaBZ9OZ8KBBMUYVAGoyg=)** | | **[Donate to the Hawai'i Community Foundation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68329467/422709895/1595807645?refcode=em-8.19.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQ4NjViMC05ODNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SnaKs4GJGM13-WlxgyL58dabaBZ9OZ8KBBMUYVAGoyg=)**

Your dollars will be used to:
* provide food, water and emergency medical supplies
* support first responders and firefighters on the frontlines
* bolster long-term recovery efforts in low-income, historically marginalized communities

FEMA and other relief groups are on the ground delivering supplies, but with the situation as dire as it is, they need all the help they can get.
[**Let’s help Hawaiians rebuild and recover. name: John Kasich
subject: Tune in Wednesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
A lot can change very quickly in American politics, and these Republican candidates will have a real opportunity to inform us about their qualifications and vision for our country.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a0a9b6b0552d4bcc976b8fa54fd64f67&_e=HlY2vwGfG7GdfaBuh8pu5RyvpaVYAc498EmwYCQenATJnX2Ved1P97BoG34iqktQ7hQraBz52t1Bwl1E0IpEzzJYPt0REVfvbEcs2RXDaz0xJnggIiBR5_-dXrWHPqbtelIPIooBUrU49w_6av-7zE6ProPlpGBC7y_pSo3fNzZbn-sA5xbM3XGa97lUHUphCQ5Bithw4m1lK0-Vvh0neQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, I'm reaching out today to encourage you to make a plan to tune in at 9:00 pm ET next Wednesday for the first GOP Presidential debate.

A lot can change quickly in American politics, and these Republican candidates will have a real opportunity to inform us about their qualifications and vision for our country.

The GOP has been adrift for years now, seemingly without any comprehensive plan, and I believe that the candidate who can articulate a common sense, conservative policy agenda and hopeful vision has a real chance to break through.

While it may seem like an unlikely possibility today that Trump drops out to focus on his legal troubles, or that his supporters become turned off by the seriousness of these indictments, it's more likely to happen if voters hear directly from candidates about what they would do differently.

Not long ago, the Republican Party was the party of ideas, and the party that offered hope to Americans.

Will one of these candidates have their moment in the debate? Will one of them have the courage to pull us away from Trump's baggage and offer an alternate pathway toward a better future?

Time will tell, but it's important that we all stay engaged in our democracy and give each candidate a fair chance to make their case. The best way to do that is to watch next Wednesday and hear what they have to say.

Please consider shooting me a note afterward to let me know what you think. I remain hopeful that someone will step up to the challenge.
---
I'm so appreciative for your ongoing support. Thank you! -John
---
| | |
---

clean_body: A lot can change very quickly in American politics, and these Republican candidates will have a real opportunity to inform us about their qualifications and vision for our country.| | | Peter, I'm reaching out today to encourage you to make a plan to tune in at 9:00 pm ET next Wednesday for the first GOP Presidential debate. A lot can change quickly in American politics, and these Republican candidates will have a real opportunity to inform us about their qualifications and vision for our country. The GOP has been adrift for years now, seemingly without any comprehensive plan, and I believe that the candidate who can articulate a common sense, conservative policy agenda and hopeful vision has a real chance to break through. While it may seem like an unlikely possibility today that Trump drops out to focus on his legal troubles, or that his supporters become turned off by the seriousness of these indictments, it's more likely to happen if voters hear directly from candidates about what they would do differently. Not long ago, the Republican Party was the party of ideas, and the party that offered hope to Americans. Will one of these candidates have their moment in the debate? Will one of them have the courage to pull us away from Trump's baggage and offer an alternate pathway toward a better future? Time will tell, but it's important that we all stay engaged in our democracy and give each candidate a fair chance to make their case. The best way to do that is to watch next Wednesday and hear what they have to say. Please consider shooting me a note afterward to let me know what you think. I remain hopeful that someone will step up to the challenge. I'm so appreciative for your ongoing support. Thank you! -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac8d481c0bad4b978556e5ea40ad6a6c&_e=m4A5N5zRNqgyxml9ywAGwZWwoViUILhIKy5lwMGPH5Zev90M4ZiSw26CO0NfWi-X1LqxodHG84A4iOJ9lcaeADIrHBMBmlukS6OEo12cYO79kI54mrusJFhWbV7_UXYX7zrIu9HMFUiCJoqEXRPbgUJ3efjUUbwymQPaVIC7C3VtdZYWvgnYlT7Z0SIKvDGLO4zT9vTj9hJSlT5NgYkZDRCN1BTuccQeSLEFdcL4eR343dC7GszlU0ZvlKC5UflDODrJFVn9Tr5TMFrQkT_EV1AA7ck5rsg5ojihp_caaNnIIsLKsciL_Q-sFJwkbWFJ-wtGWu7sPWJJALuypUQp9GsO22oulvK2UbkiNANa74uUnCTlnf4dINLUfX8dL2u5_CJ4MOp4M858JVZ13bFh3tU_DesuZlPt9ARSo8LzxfY%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac8d481c0bad4b978556e5ea40ad6a6c&_e=m4A5N5zRNqgyxml9ywAGwZWwoViUILhIKy5lwMGPH5Zev90M4ZiSw26CO0NfWi-X1LqxodHG84A4iOJ9lcaeADIrHBMBmlukS6OEo12cYO79kI54mrusJFhWbV7_UXYX7zrIu9HMFUiCJoqEXRPbgUJ3efjUUbwymQPaVIC7C3VtdZYWvgnYlT7Z0SIKvDGLO4zT9vTj9hJSlT5NgYkZDRCN1BTuccQeSLEFdcL4eR343dC7GszlU0ZvlKC5UflDXmU3PiCm29Fb9TBSFH1Mo4TixqFCBmgcBcVAtettAdkHIA0nK6H00Qd4kEtI_4ABJQ0OVq3_u8u8bpJ-r86DcyvuuOdmJJwPhYX1c_XXG2680qreQbLp7_JqrK5k57LIHXLMktYh0yYtplMhWJvBdpNxfczp4kUmTfFs7jJmhHw%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac8d481c0bad4b978556e5ea40ad6a6c&_e=m4A5N5zRNqgyxml9ywAGwZWwoViUILhIKy5lwMGPH5Zev90M4ZiSw26CO0NfWi-X1LqxodHG84A4iOJ9lcaeADIrHBMBmlukS6OEo12cYO79kI54mrusJFhWbV7_UXYX7zrIu9HMFUiCJoqEXRPbgUJ3efjUUbwymQPaVIC7C3VtdZYWvgnYlT7Z0SIKvDGLO4zT9vTj9hJSlT5NgYkZDRCN1BTuccQeSLEFdcL4eR343dC7GszlU0ZvlKC5UflDulUackuP1jf_JaPTkokU2dini6Vpv2DCJQpJ4D8k4NKfp3y2th7o_bYMe7ty0CtYxHyrFQVq6oDicxdQx6F0Pgg1R_nt9WXHYgQcd99BOmh2b-ijiK8SREES0kPq63zxaJR_d7FdrWA1fJQcm3124Qf72cxM8hdDvCVJGiQ6vR4%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Letitia James
subject: I'm disappointed, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, I don't even know what happened here.
---
A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my mid-month deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight.
From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for August.
I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I _refuse _to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $1,472 left with only hours to go.**
Peter**, I’m counting on** _you_ to be one of the people I need to make a donation, so please: [**Will you donate any amount before 11:59 p.m. to support our fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68330518/422713455/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzE2ZDE1ZS05OTNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AEFSPd8BX8IJGPawfR9HRAsXUrq4Pa6SjXJnuSkUOs=)

**Peter, for millions of Americans, 2023 has been a devastating year.**

More than 400 communities have been ravaged by mass shootings, attacks against reproductive rights have been rampant around the country, a _record_ number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced and enacted across the nation, and the climate crisis has continued to sprawl further out of control.
Our wounded nation needs progress – _now_.
**That's why I'm counting on a _massive_ surge of grassroots support during my mid-month fundraising campaign so I can continue my tireless fight for progress. But, with only two days left to hit this goal, it looks like your donation still hasn't come in. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you donate any amount****before 11:59 p.m. on Saturday to help me meet my deadline? I'm counting on 1,000 people to step up now so I can continue my fight against the powerful and corrupt.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68330521/422713460/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzE2ZDE1ZS05OTNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AEFSPd8BX8IJGPawfR9HRAsXUrq4Pa6SjXJnuSkUOs=)

clean_body: Peter, I don't even know what happened here. A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my mid-month deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight. From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for August. I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I refuse to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $1,472 left with only hours to go. Peter, I’m counting on you to be one of the people I need to make a donation, so please: = | | = Thank you. Letitia \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Fri, Aug 17, 2023 Subject: Why I need this team | | | = Peter, for millions of Americans, 2023 has been a devastating year. More than 400 communities have been ravaged by mass shootings, attacks against reproductive rights have been rampant around the country, a record number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced and enacted across the nation, and the climate crisis has continued to sprawl further out of control. Our wounded nation needs progress – now. That's why I'm counting on a massive surge of grassroots support during my mid-month fundraising campaign so I can continue my tireless fight for progress. But, with only two days left to hit this goal, it looks like your donation still hasn't come in. ">So, if you can spare it, a donation of $5, $10, or ANY amount goes a long way to help Nikki reach more voters! >> P.S. If you don’t have $5 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time toText NIKKI to 48324 and share this with 5 friends today! PITCH IN NOW! name: VoteVets HQ
subject: You're going to want to read this.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Another poll dropped
#
Winning campaigns is an art and a science, Derek.
This email is about the science.
Polls aren't perfect. Believe us, we know. But they're still one of the best ways we have to figure out what's important to people.
We wrote to you a few days ago about a poll that showed voters in Alabama, Tommy Tuberville's home state, don't support his hold on Military promotions.
Well, another poll just came out. This one was nationwide. It's from GQR, a respected and reputable pollster.
Take a look at what they found out:
**68% of likely voters believe Tommy Tuberville and his hold on hundreds of senior Military promotions is dangerous, and that he is harming Military Families.**
**69% of Independent voters agree.**
**51% of REPUBLICAN voters agree.**
These are HUGE numbers. Nationwide, Tuberville's hold has the potential to be a HUGE anchor on the GOP.
We took on this fight because it's the right thing to do, both for our country and our National Security. But it just might be THE issue that wins back the House, holds the Senate, and helps President Biden stay in the White House.
We just put out an ad in Florida, widening our field of targets and hitting Rick Scott for doing nothing to stop Tommy Tuberville.
We want to do more. There are tons of swing races on the map this year. And this poll tells us that it will work.
So please: **[If you care about winning around the country in 2024, chip in $3 and help us run more ads. If winning back the House and holding the Senate is important to you, chip in $3. And if you want to help re-elect President Biden, chip in $3.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-aug23.Xufu26&refcode=em230819-1-15&t=1&akid=15694%2E3013755%2E2CEKck)**

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: We must reject extremism ❌
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-mifepristone-2308 [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-mifepristone-2308] Rather than trust science and doctors, far-right extremists continue to insert themselves into women’s personal and private medical decisions by any means necessary.

No one should stand between a woman, her doctor, and her faith when making health care decisions. That’s why I’m working to pass the Freedom to Decide Act — to protect doctor-prescribed access to the abortion pill and support telemedicine across state lines.

Our legislation is essential to protecting the fundamental right for all women to make personal, private health care decisions about their own bodies, lives, and futures, and reaffirms what we all know to be true: access to mifepristone does not violate federal law.

We have to show the right-wing extremists waging war on a woman's right to choose that they are outnumbered. Will you add your name to show your support for the Freedom to Decide Act and my fight to protect reproductive freedom? [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-mifepristone-2308]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-mifepristone-2308]

As your Congressman, I have fought to ensure that every individual can make their own decisions about their health. Now that attacks on reproductive freedom are escalating, our fight intensifies.

I’m not backing down.

Thank you for standing with me in this fight,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Carole King
subject: I really want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi -- It’s Carole King. I hope this email finds you well.

I’ve been lucky that my voice has had a wide reach. Today I’m using my voice to let you know that your voice can help determine the future of our country.

Elections hinge on the opinions of everyday people. Yet many Americans think their voices will be drowned out by the shouting matches at public meetings and cable news, trolling on social media, and scary, negative ads on TV.

**But Senate Democrats and the DSCC believe it’s deeply important that we listen to each other so we can lift up each other's voices and stories and make sure that every one of us is heard!**

And that’s why I’m inviting you to share your story. Democrats need your help to build a winning message to protect all the progress we’ve made and fight for all the progress still to come.

[**Will you join my personal focus group right now by answering this survey?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15378?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230819-CaroleKing-CaroleKingLongFormFG-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230819-CaroleKing-CaroleKingLongFormFG-ETG-sl1&akid=11589%2E9716520%2EVuV2zY)

Your support made it possible for families to afford insulin without having to make heartbreaking decisions about what they could go without.

Your engagement empowered our government to take historic steps toward meaningful climate action.

And your feedback will help my friends at the DSCC focus on the issues that matter to voters the most and expand our Senate majority.

[**Will you join my personal Democratic focus group right now by completing a quick survey?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15378?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230819-CaroleKing-CaroleKingLongFormFG-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230819-CaroleKing-CaroleKingLongFormFG-ETG-sl1&akid=11589%2E9716520%2EVuV2zY)

I hear you, and I thank you.
Be well and stay cool this summer.

– Carole

| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/15378?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230819-CaroleKing-CaroleKingLongFormFG-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230819-CaroleKing-CaroleKingLongFormFG-ETG-sl1&akid=11589%2E9716520%2EVuV2zY)Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center Honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority. And yes, Carole really did write this email.
| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/15462?c0=5.rAAwMT&t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230819-CaroleKing-CaroleKingLongFormFG-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230819-CaroleKing-CaroleKingLongFormFG-ETG-sl1&akid=11589%2E9716520%2EVuV2zY)
---
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q3-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=2&refcode2=11589_9716520_VuV2zY&akid=11589%2E9716520%2EVuV2zY)

name: Democrats Win Seats
subject: BIG win in Ohio!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| Peter, did you hear the news about Ohio's special election?

**_Ohio voters rejected a GOP-supported ballot measure that would make it harder to amend the state constitution._**

Issue 1’s failure is a victory for working families against special interests. Democracy won—and will remain where it belongs: in the hands of voters, not the rich and powerful.

It’s also a crucial victory for abortion rights ahead of a November vote on enshrining reproductive rights in the Ohio Constitution.

Now, the rest is up to us. All over this country, the GOP has been trying to eliminate abortion rights since Roe was overturned. It’s only going to get worse. That is why we’re writing to you today.

GOP politicians are the ones who pushed for this ballot measure and for abortion bans across the country, which is why we must ensure they lose in 2024. Electing more pro-choice Democrats at all levels of government means action will be taken on protecting our reproductive rights.

It all starts with ensuring our Democrats in tough races—including Frontliners in bellwether races—have the resources they need to win.

clean_body: | Peter, did you hear the news about Ohio's special election? Ohio voters rejected a GOP-supported ballot measure that would make it harder to amend the state constitution. Issue 1’s failure is a victory for working families against special interests. Democracy won—and will remain where it belongs: in the hands of voters, not the rich and powerful. It’s also a crucial victory for abortion rights ahead of a November vote on enshrining reproductive rights in the Ohio Constitution. Now, the rest is up to us. All over this country, the GOP has been trying to eliminate abortion rights since Roe was overturned. It’s only going to get worse. That is why we’re writing to you today. GOP politicians are the ones who pushed for this ballot measure and for abortion bans across the country, which is why we must ensure they lose in 2024. Electing more pro-choice Democrats at all levels of government means action will be taken on protecting our reproductive rights. name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Defending democracy and eliminating extremism
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Each August, Congress typically adjourns so that members can come home to our districts to meet with constituents and prepare for important legislative work to be done in the fall. Of course, we all know that there is still plenty happening in Washington right now while Congress is not in session. And what we are seeing now reminds us of the stakes for our country, and the importance of electing people who are committed to protecting our rights and our democracy.
You’ve probably seen reports in the news about the spending bills and challenges facing Congress when we get back in the fall. The House, under the strong influence of the extreme Freedom Caucus, is struggling with efforts to perform one of its fundamental responsibilities: to direct Congressional spending and fund the government. When the House reconvenes in September, it will take up these bills, but there is reason for deep concern.
And we look to our recent experience to see the challenges ahead. Last month, the House took up the annual defense authorization bill, the NDAA. Congress has passed the NDAA with broad bipartisan support for more than 60 years, but this year, it became a deeply partisan and problematic piece of legislation once it came before the full House. Although it passed out of committee nearly unanimously, House Republicans added so many extreme amendments that it was unrecognizable when it came to the House floor for a vote that it passed only by the narrowest of margins and along party lines.
Among the many troublesome amendments, one that reversed the Department of Defense’s policy to make it possible for service members stationed in states where abortion is illegal—states like Texas—to travel to get reproductive health care in a state where abortion is still legal.
It is time for us to use our votes to protect the rights of others to cast theirs and to engage people across our country to exercise this precious right.

JOIN THE FIGHT FOR OUR DEMOCRACY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9g2EOyRU2EKB0jTwDNJ2CA2]

https://secure.ngpvan.com/9g2EOyRU2EKB0jTwDNJ2CA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9g2EOyRU2EKB0jTwDNJ2CA2]

Extreme provisions like these are what we can expect from this House. We know it’s already happening, in the annual spending bills and in other traditionally bipartisan bills. That’s why our work to take back the House and elect thoughtful policymakers rather than extreme ideologues is vital. That’s what all of us deserve.
And our political system gives us important tools for fighting back: Organize. March. Knock on doors. Make phone calls. Donate. Vote. Each of us can do some or all of these things. And in 2024, we will need to do all we can.
We must stay focused on defending our democracy and eliminating extremism from now to next November (and beyond). If you are committed to doing so, please add your name here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9g2EOyRU2EKB0jTwDNJ2CA2]
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie_signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230818pet?refcode=folf230818pet]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=OXcoSC3e%2FR2ntwcBfg75vPIz3KkIYFL%2BuW4gthqivdjK3c2MKnA32Hy7lJJ0hZnJ4NnQ5vPSzEQK1yG7RcLIdU7d%2F%2FE3fRduFfv3afWLutrcuVmiBrS2NxZjxu4SvUgpdPS2FCvV%2BXMUP5hvyf4lo8kNqWuMafTSNwIEL3CGqis9iyOX3HqsbnS9yNy7%2Fr75DojrhYWzHsXZSLVCNamXdE%2BRrUINUWd9IrsFvkb25zkhmc9fIDEalzknEWGGIM5QSC0d5DqttxKwfMXm00vdCXAVEvHLiZ5%2By%2FQvsX1bKZeQK2dylH2xLvBRjFVLV%2FRZRDjE6Kzj9fxntIkwRgofRYGc2nkCuQfdx9KSbnHp%2F1i1UqukmE1tNu%2FVPAyCdCsUgkoqKQ3XbvqJnfPqFQtxZSsaVtBNga7T4NllA1DkMYYJD5%2FIN%2F7iNO7zFIKCE52Z www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]

subject: He’s laser-focused

body:
| | | **_[Florida Finance Alert](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=90d89683559243ad9f6f7d17007da6dd&_e=iFQGfyH9GDoXbzKv94Ek7nFsZ_UrOEOo0GlXAGaRtkgDy7okXiugIyHJoL7wIOJg0lNlg3onosBDVr9m1nC27WEiwoLCPTaIZdv8wfylrJwp9yzrxeTTR9p3R8UgTeD3MCeujZH9FlYvKtq6APQG3EKsHDHeKz7udOGo_lE3ZMiKik1zBsOZDx6CcciVkw8flTIYHBdIzmdCFvVBkeLyt9XcS6_HTnez6aXsk2twNUBA9RaFRccsrMyWWHzHrRhFm_QAumMOJrIv5L3U-aw5W02VpKg8DFfZnQB_zcRRDuoIFJYn_Rn_dFg3lG0EBrqn9czlXBpI6FbafQh34vENA8yfXzQDEye-UIg-sSEXXOANR4xOSqfgzyPYlCeI8hAB)_**

Big money is going to be coming into Florida, and it could be coming from one of the biggest donors in Democrat politics: **George Soros.**

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: 10 (fun!) facts about Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28444%2E3422442%2El76IVT)
Derek, last week we shared ten things you may not know about Katie Porter— _like that Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money._ **But this week, we’re making it a little more fun:**
1. As a kid, Katie was an active member of 4-H.

2. In college, Katie was an intern for Senator Chuck Grassley. While their politics differ, she respected that his office took the time to reply to everyone who wrote in. She’s brought that same goal of listening to constituents to her own Congressional office.
3. Katie studied consumer protection under Elizabeth Warren in law school.

4. Katie’s daughter Betsy is named after Elizabeth Warren.

5. Her go-to drink is a diet Dr. Pepper.

6. Katie’s grocery store of choice is Albertsons (the workers there are unionized!).

7. A single mom of three, Katie served as her kids’ Cub Scout leader.

8. Her mom is a quilter, and you can see some of her work in the background of Katie’s Zooms or TV interviews.

9. She’s a huge fan of fiction and reads several books a week.

10. After graduating from college, Katie taught English to 8th graders in Hong Kong.

Here’s the deal, Katie isn't a career politician. She’s a working parent who ran for office after Trump was elected and flipped a red seat blue. [**In the Senate she’ll fight everyday to protect workers and families and hold power to account. Can you pitch in and help send her to the United States Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230819-1?refcode=EMAK19_1_TEN_20230819_V1_F&refcode2=28444_3422442_l76IVT&akid=28444%2E3422442%2El76IVT)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230819-1?refcode=EMAK19_1_TEN_20230819_V1_F&refcode2=28444_3422442_l76IVT&akid=28444%2E3422442%2El76IVT)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK19_1_TEN_20230819_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28444_3422442_l76IVT&akid=28444%2E3422442%2El76IVT)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=28444%2E3422442%2El76IVT)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: What Josh Hawley said about abortion this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
He knows his extreme views on abortion are a serious liability for his campaign — so now, he's lying to us.
#
Peter,
Earlier this year, Josh Hawley, his wife, and the federal judge who donated to Hawley’s 2018 Senate campaign, Matthew Kacsmaryk, worked together to ban the most commonly used abortion medication in all 50 states, without exception.
**They set their plan to ban abortion into motion long ago.** But now that Hawley is facing the pressure of re-election, he’s lying about where he stands — and he thinks all of us are going to let him get away with it:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35675?refcode=em20230819-3589&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3589%2E614464%2ErDBqd-)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35675?refcode=em20230819-3589&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3589%2E614464%2ErDBqd-)**
**IN 2017:** Matthew Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court. His confirmation stalled for years.
**IN 2018:** While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made a donation to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**IN 2019:** Once he got to the Senate, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge. He confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
**IN 2022:** A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.
**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35675?refcode=em20230819-3589&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3589%2E614464%2ErDBqd-)
**APRIL 7, 2023:** Hawley’s DONOR judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s WIFE, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.
**AND NOW:** After the Supreme Court overturned Kacsmaryk’s ruling and a major win for reproductive freedom advocates in Ohio, Hawley knows his own extreme views on abortion are a serious liability for his re-election campaign — so he’s lying to us.

clean_body: He knows his extreme views on abortion are a serious liability for his campaign — so now, he's lying to us. Peter, Earlier this year, Josh Hawley, his wife, and the federal judge who donated to Hawley’s 2018 Senate campaign, Matthew Kacsmaryk, worked together to ban the most commonly used abortion medication in all 50 states, without exception. They set their plan to ban abortion into motion long ago. But now that Hawley is facing the pressure of re-election, he’s lying about where he stands — and he thinks all of us are going to let him get away with it: - - IN 2017: Matthew Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court. His confirmation stalled for years. IN 2018: While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made a donation to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs. IN 2019: Once he got to the Senate, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge. He confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms. IN 2022: A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions. Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge. - APRIL 7, 2023: Hawley’s DONOR judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s WIFE, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states. AND NOW: After the Supreme Court overturned Kacsmaryk’s ruling and a major win for reproductive freedom advocates in Ohio, Hawley knows his own extreme views on abortion are a serious liability for his re-election campaign — so he’s lying to us. Josh Hawley is a fraud and a coward — and we can’t afford another six years of him representing Missouri in the U.S. Senate.- If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: - - - - - - - Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will actually stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve. name: Shawn Wilson
subject: The greatest governor Louisiana has ever seen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
is exactly what our state deserves.

Peter, I didn’t just qualify to be your next governor — I qualified to be the greatest governor Louisiana has ever seen. Because that’s what the people of our state deserve! Working folks in Shreveport looking to lower their healthcare premiums, parents in Baton Rouge hoping to give their kids a better education, and everyone in between — they’re counting on someone who will fight for their priorities. **And that’s why I jumped in this race: to build bridges to progress and tackle Louisiana’s toughest challenges at the community level.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68334083/422726311/218720461?refcode=ea.bf38260f-a13e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bf38260f-a13e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmYzODI2MGYtYTEzZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mVgqooZGNSNqPFoUtnh3Akg8TXDDCj8i3H21380m5yg=) But Peter, I’ll need your support more than ever as we get closer to Election Day. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Not on my watch.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends -
There are plenty of real issues where we need our government to take action. Like child care. And housing. And climate change.
But instead of getting to work for the American people, Republican House members have been advancing their out-of-touch agenda. Here are just a few of their recent big ideas:
* Handing more tax breaks to giant corporations — just weeks after they tried to cut vital programs like Meals on Wheels in the name of “fiscal responsibility.”
* Making it illegal to get mifepristone — a medication used for one of the most common methods of abortion — in the mail, anywhere in the country.
* Restricting the right to vote nationwide with the harshest anti-voting rights bill in decades.

I’ve got four words for them: Not on my watch.
**I’m pushing back against MAGA Republicans to protect our basic freedoms and put our government on the side of working people, not just the rich and powerful. And I’m running for re-election to stay in the fight. But I can’t do it alone.**
[**If it makes sense for you right now, can you split $5 between my re-election campaign and The Long Run? Your contribution will help us fight back against the GOP’s extremist agenda, and make our government work for working people.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em230818-1-t2&t=1&akid=4750%2E196590%2EdYiGl7)
Side by side, we can hold the line against GOP extremism.
We’ll fight to retake the House from the Republican wrecking-ball crew, protect and expand our Senate majority, and hold onto the White House.
But we won’t stop there. We’ll keep fighting to push our country forward and deliver the big, bold action that working families need — from universal child care to affordable housing to building on our progress against the climate crisis.
[**I’m running for re-election to get all this done — and much more. And I’m asking if you can split a donation between my campaign and The Long Run to power this fight. Any amount makes a real difference.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em230818-1-t2&t=2&akid=4750%2E196590%2EdYiGl7)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4750%2E196590%2EdYiGl7). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=4750%2E196590%2EdYiGl7)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=4750_196590_dYiGl7&akid=4750%2E196590%2EdYiGl7)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4750%2E196590%2EdYiGl7)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Jake Ellzey
subject: A Navy Fighter Pilot needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,[](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=330309f0f72646189c35360822461610&_e=kl2NM_jyjkLsdp9i4XcESotQugK4tuLP2DJpU6T0qaH9s2iYu16GTf8P0GhHydNrk_ZiKKTefliKhbHqnXzGMGg8VIGiL2Az1PRGZ1BgPj9t22indHFjZvYTEJXXFsvGoEJv0FNh7muoRqAJFQbDiOsgzYuMiT_crdYLYzUagyiUF4xpuFOq1mbaBknELS9VA2-VvTXMnTWSH_LX_evrQT81z17duDL6A19gLY3tmT-t69dEgLkdsocChX2DOXzITu-q3iadftr090-1F-qyApbRhe7j5ZiS5CpuUKv4f5-2yGj0rFafXWLR8NUC1zv23lA2Z5DZzVxYJoj9qesP0i3p2tNz91a4O3ATL69E0d_PdfGcZ0WsTNFadkDSS569vgyAFxyBMR2w4_X2qSKm5nhFPAz6iqoylq3YxCvJu9r18e3Fw9u5kQ6Gx3KYt3jUSYBFZ2abbx_NzuGLI8-T5xlLM--ETSw4PLPP4THNWvg%3D) This is Jake Ellzey. You may not have heard of me, so let me tell you a little about myself. I grew up in Texas — and like any kid, I didn’t know what I wanted to do with my life, but after my dad took me for a plane ride when I was 7 years old, I knew I wanted to fly. So, I joined the Navy, and became a fighter pilot. I served on the USS Ronald Reagan, was deployed nine times, including to Afghanistan and Iraq — and did five combat tours by air and one on the ground with SEAL Team 5. Serving our nation in the skies was the greatest honor of my life. But then things changed. I realized that the rhetoric from the radical left started getting completely out of hand. Once I saw that they were pushing a political agenda fueled by trans-ideology and Critical Race Theory in schools, I couldn’t stand by and let it happen - I had to run as a conservative for Congress. **And as a father, the thought of someone indoctrinating my child against my will enrages me. ** But I’ve run into a roadblock: the radical left doesn’t want good people speaking out against them - they’re already trying to flip my seat and resume their socialist TAKEOVER. **[That’s where you come in: I’m humbly asking if you will step up and pitch in just $12 bucks to help me keep my seat and continue to protect our children across the country.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=330309f0f72646189c35360822461610&_e=kl2NM_jyjkLsdp9i4XcESotQugK4tuLP2DJpU6T0qaHCtQpzjWEBuyVEpz5dJZzviRI_rZcHyTM5A9X4rGRrW_sd0WkaqDQ-i0JSNqYOFmrSZzNoPTl0VAJyN6ED5kbCBFoNWOVi0BAoyFE3rs-Og3MZ7MFcptteA-9UEWFg_B9hrpaCSzgVKOp3l1XB998DG4UR2l4xwLHwOkWpjIUpkmNxdupDun9hJ8fMHI223NpEitDtyNMb6Q5uVmNBJvmdqNY9aVFOENmHctwE-H35-zyabF9FTFa8JxofH5IXf7nLdATTm2w9z2hbRryEwFIYmMEMxGwjeT8UFUn7RwZB8u0VUln6EZpGAyshp_NTH64ERWqMVbM2BclAvWUlStxM)**
---
[**DONATE HERE**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=330309f0f72646189c35360822461610&_e=kl2NM_jyjkLsdp9i4XcESotQugK4tuLP2DJpU6T0qaHCtQpzjWEBuyVEpz5dJZzviRI_rZcHyTM5A9X4rGRrW_sd0WkaqDQ-i0JSNqYOFmrSZzNoPTl0VAJyN6ED5kbCBFoNWOVi0BAoyFE3rs-Og3MZ7MFcptteA-9UEWFg_B9hrpaCSzgVKOp3l1XB998DG4UR2l4xwLHwOkWpjIUpkmNxdupDun9hJ8fMHI223NqI4qriM_AwY_Kot_Iv-zUgkf7JdYaZF40oVJRsy_xN9KiylorDvCEL2rsXb2cqhxWz_9ucFVckzZQr5SAk0o-WmbUuqyQwTAuaiMAhIfHYi8gjr1F6nuLQkvbHJQhfy9480-WZ4TMbG-mG-JKJ229j)
---
Look, I’m a Navy fighter pilot. I can handle myself in a one-on-one brawl, but I’m up against a whole Mob of radicals who want me silenced. I can’t win this alone. I’m not someone who never quits. So, I’m hoping you will join me by supporting our conservative campaign by contributing just a few bucks right now.
---
[**DONATE HERE**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=330309f0f72646189c35360822461610&_e=kl2NM_jyjkLsdp9i4XcESotQugK4tuLP2DJpU6T0qaHCtQpzjWEBuyVEpz5dJZzviRI_rZcHyTM5A9X4rGRrW_sd0WkaqDQ-i0JSNqYOFmrSZzNoPTl0VAJyN6ED5kbCBFoNWOVi0BAoyFE3rs-Og3MZ7MFcptteA-9UEWFg_B9hrpaCSzgVKOp3l1XB998DG4UR2l4xwLHwOkWpjIUpkmNxdupDun9hJ8fMHI223NpWceipoLxq-NLSmsbn8Ih2n0zTZ5si16_UyUrwahqpBDFAqLZOnFsheRHfrm5hQDhkHrWHihTsyn7Yo-i3a5yHdmT_OFgLzJ8Bxts56ZICmV6DQ4KxeA7gHAEtO7Asnts4gytflZsZO7E6ECyHCmWr)

| | Thank you,

body:
| | | Fellow American, It’s Kellyanne Conway. I’ve been working with conservatives across the country to help us hold onto our House majority, and one thing we can all agree on is that we need your help.

Republicans are fired up to win. And even with Joe Biden in the White House, our Republican majority in the House is achieving success for American families while holding Biden and the Democrats accountable.

And America is listening. They’re sick and tired of the Biden White House and the Left’s extreme, woke agenda.

_But as much as we’re ready to win, the radical Left is ready to take us down._

Bigwigs in Washington are terrified - and they’re pitching in major money for Democrats to regain control of Congress back from us.

**They might try to intimidate us, but I know you’re not the kind to back down.**

_**[Will you stand up to the Democrats and join us today to defend our House majority?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=f17daaffe80a4a6fa16c839991e81e4f&_e=_uRyF-tEkA_21bPRQyiMGpKpW4cunhtA3hSuFg_t-WI9VSYRN-Yq4mNYjf5hCBq_4BrJkbCkFd3jTuPlY3-nw86AKCXeBxD1wVSokdj02aIH2mD4pqryXqY4LTmxj1JeWpgeiZZfXD1MEolp8fZBfQSzWwDsVaRcRFyqSbNWmiDtg0y0FG2im1enHuP5k15DZ54bXT3cQQSWZcLtM4iEx2j7f7-0ctmoXZnGE3y9vfuxx_bgvrd27noEzREY-E1uFdFU9GjWqI3_Nl62SdwVx3ERchWsss2TcPijow-uDjXWPWu6XSN249oanmZGGOERhGkWmTpkwCvW6f7_Ubgf9nAdRxu00P0Zl3SteqMae1SO_4mKcErBxrAAl3mZ-kff6AqT0cJ6-jf-CUaEfR2FAw%3D%3D)**_

I’m sick of the Left’s lies.

As a woman, they tell me I should be ASHAMED and give my hard-won place in the world to men.

They say that our children can change their gender without their parents even knowing!

And while they focus on their woke social agenda, our economy is failing and Communist China is growing stronger every day.

**[It’s simple: America can’t afford to lose our Republican majority. Our Republican majority is the firewall from full radical left control of our country. Our future is on the line. ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Hi, it’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running for U.S. Senate against Ted Cruz.
Everyone in Texas knows Ted Cruz is a hypocrite:
❌ Texans know Cruz left 800 people to die while he jetted off to Mexico in the middle of a winter storm.
❌ Texans know Ted Cruz sucked up to the NRA and stood in the way of bipartisan gun violence prevention – even after witnessing what happened at Robb Elementary in Uvalde.
❌ And Texans know Cruz lied about the results of the 2020 election and defended Trump – cheered on the Jan. 6 insurrection at the Capitol – even though he knew that Joe Biden won fair and square.
Now, Ted Cruz is taking hypocrisy to a new level. He’s trying to discredit Judge Tanya Chutkan, who is assigned to Trump’s latest indictment.
But here’s the thing: Cruz forgets that he voted to confirm Judge Chutkan to the District Court in 2014.
Peter, Texans are fed up with Ted Cruz – and they’re ready for a candidate who can defeat him, fight the gun violence epidemic, and protect abortion rights. I’ll be that Senator, but I need your help: Can you pitch in $25 or more to help me DEFEAT hypocrite Ted Cruz once and for all? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

body:
Will Barack and I get the chance to meet you? | | |
---
Peter -- My favorite part of campaigning is getting to talk to people all over the country about their lives, their passions, the things that keep them going. My friend Barack Obama feels the same way. So my team came up with an idea: Let’s have one special supporter (and a guest!) join us on the campaign trail and spend a little time together. We’ll even cover the costs of travel and accommodations. When you make a $25 donation to support my reelection campaign, you’ll be automatically entered for a chance to meet Barack and me:

My friend Barack Obama feels the same way. So my team came up with an idea: Let’s have one special supporter (and a guest!) join us on the campaign trail and spend a little time together. We’ll even cover the costs of travel and accommodations. clean_body: I want you to see this.| | | Friend, It can be daunting when you hear about the MILLIONS of dollars in left-wing special interest money being funneled into the 2024 election to BUY the White House. How could a contribution of $1 or $5 – even $24 – stand a chance? Well, as I always say, your $1 is NEVER ALONE. Your contribution is backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. Together, our team of grassroots donors even has the power to OUTRAISE the left-wing special interest tyrants who believe they are entitled to permanent rule over America. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tues, August 15, 2023Subject: “Why not just walk away?”To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Friend, This is no doubt a dark time for America. But I also woke up this morning to the many, many messages of support from countless patriots across the country who will NEVER give up on our noble mission. And I must say, even with this very dark cloud hanging over our nation, it’s those freedom-loving patriots like YOU who are my source of courage, hope, and my UNBREAKABLE resolve to SAVE AMERICA. But how could we ever give up on America? She is the freest and greatest country in history. She is a beacon of hope to the world that through hard work and perseverance, anything is possible. So, whenever I’m asked, “Sir, why keep fighting? Why not just walk away and never have to think about these witch hunts ever again?” My answer is simple... Even after FOUR unlawful INDICTMENTS against me as an innocent man, even with Crooked Joe and his accomplices trying to JAIL me for hundreds of years, I will remain right where I belong: between YOU and the entrenched Deep State that hates our country. Because walking away would mean condemning America to a lifetime of Third World Marxist tyranny. Not on my watch, Friend. I will NEVER**SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny! If you’re struggling due to the crooks and thugs who are running our country right now, then do not donate. I mean it! Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come roaring back. You have my word. But if you can contribute, then God knows our country needs patriots like YOU now more than ever. | | Thank you, Donald J. subject: Witch Hunt!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We are drifting towards the greatest Constitutional crisis since the 1850s.

|

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Update on my imminent ARREST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

| | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88fda1618a75419098c720e78aa16019&_e=c50QhsoHO73b_P6PnwnN23mUPHQkabiA9-2zeQMQsV2X72b2p5mgpyqPmMlL5KNnruffS0HZFBa5xyqBh2K_CHEDXGUVpguMVkPaoQvM1WnNosi5RrmgCNsroIIyDttUGzFFWeabANZI6Y0KLbPpoIdxDAv0usbYbJMnDgnPsWGxreOvw0zcxZNb1U68eh_hxLxx5WtVriF7419kSwOsatjGVbYhqyBcTls7tgcwc3XqxWn_UqP_spcm2VNHHQtnq7-TBR0_Gu8ecqCUTZwd9jpBcGpQ69A1vbGByTjzLncOVYhkIXL4n_CZks51ZAzrIeBiagUBQfv78bM4GKlK9laB9vSo-T0rVt5x8gDulcv6fFrCgHw3BJn-8CF824TLBk5ZoNId2ug5hLdSDeeTvQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
Reports indicate that my upcoming _unjust_ **ARREST** in Atlanta will be **TELEVISED** for the entire world to see.
The Sheriff publicly declared that a **MUGSHOT** will be "ready" for me.
This is just like when the FBI **RAIDED** my home and staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
And how can we forget the time when they tried to **FRAME** me as an asset of the Russian government and a traitor to our country?
_The pattern is undeniably clear._
The Deep State has done everything in their power to try and paint me as a villain - all while the _REAL_ villains, nestled deep within the Washington, D.C. swamp, quietly get away with bleeding our country dry.
And now, it's being reported that I could potentially face 1,000 YEARS in prison.
The Deep State wants to make an example out of me...
...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House.
This is ultimately about instilling **_FEAR_** in the public.
**The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. **
**The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1.**
Together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people.
No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it._
Otherwise, I don't have to tell you how critical these times are for our country. America needs you now more than ever before.
**[Please make a contribution to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts- and together, even during these darkest of times, we will prove that our movement is truly UNBREAKABLE.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88fda1618a75419098c720e78aa16019&_e=c50QhsoHO73b_P6PnwnN23mUPHQkabiA9-2zeQMQsV2X72b2p5mgpyqPmMlL5KNnruffS0HZFBa5xyqBh2K_CHEDXGUVpguMVkPaoQvM1WnNosi5RrmgCNsroIIyDttUGzFFWeabANZI6Y0KLbPpoIdxDAv0usbYbJMnDgnPsWGxreOvw0zcxZNb1U68eh_hxLxx5WtVriF7419kSwOsatjGVbYhqyBcTls7tgcwc3XqxWn_UqP_spcm2VNHHQtnOnWhnYjdugTFVmD-LSi5_E9rXRlbH4MLWW-t7_IFfbTR11Yjnh-QxtJObYI0mYCceliwMY55KgohLXifQSu9cu_choX310B6qVa9C8s0PacOdpnIhF6kT9hzZfmxfA-amaRFrHoGL1_FQR2HCDXyKA%3D%3D)**

And how can we forget the time when they tried to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government and a traitor to our country? The pattern is undeniably clear. The Deep State has done everything in their power to try and paint me as a villain - all while the REAL villains, nestled deep within the Washington, D.C. swamp, quietly get away with bleeding our country dry. And now, it's being reported that I could potentially face 1,000 YEARS in prison. The Deep State wants to make an example out of me... ...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House. This is ultimately about instilling FEAR in the public. The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1. Together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people. No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it. | Everyone from Donald Trump’s team to Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell will be watching.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3460%2E5257348%2EHgQcCV)
Derek, I need you to know how important this month's fundraising deadline really is to our campaign.
We're over halfway into the current fundraising quarter for the Federal Election Commission. Once it’s done, my campaign team will gather all of the fundraising information for this three-month period and submit it in a public report to the FEC.
Everyone from Donald Trump’s team to Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell will be watching.
With your help, we are building a strong, durable campaign throughout California to meet directly with voters, hear their concerns, and share our campaign’s message about defending our democracy, saving our environment, and building an economy that works for everyone.
**But we still need your support, so I’m asking:**
**[Can you pitch in $10 or any amount to our campaign before midnight to help us stay on track toward our FEC fundraising goal? name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Were You Aware of This?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York
body:
Dems Plan Redistricting in New York

| [ ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=5a9bd668e72a47d599aa21059f8d92af&_e=ONWu1avidanhfFvoQigcpy5Spb77u9KbzUgjN2YutocSgPg62fsmy8qoz-TBoMHESfc6I6t-qpQRJrwvH0DXTqdVNAMEl7k4kDJtxe4iIPIgXZxONmhV7bSt3Qia6R9C33wiw46p8_rAKAqQOZaOXejnaltYu-cp4I7Ma7qXGiQGpJ5-fM_tfh3NL6P3ykWW3OyEcJi-C_vGgBdAaGf6evgwZwwof7HUqXzKnwwfQKNqsO5ySFBoZF1unF3zk6ffcWTAAF_-L4QuG-s31UPN1_sC8CM867aH_Lk5ZnUjxtkPjLb-1AqLMTqDUfWwg9Ug)
---
Dear friend,

I am sure you were aware of the Democrats' sinister plans, _but let me update you on one scheme that needs attention._

The Democrats in New York want to redraw the congressional maps and that only means one thing: they are trying to give themselves an unfair advantage. If the Democrats are successful this could turn even MORE **seats over to them!**

body:
The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is. |
#
Hello folks, this is Senator Bob Casey from Pennsylvania. I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — **[but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between Tina Smith and my campaign at this link knowing how grateful I am for your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68337210/422737184/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230819_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzM4YTY5ZS1hNzNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kGZMCa4523z0QmJNYhdCFKsNBmxWXuIdcIGLUt0k7U=)** The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is. clean_body: The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is. | Hello folks, this is Senator Bob Casey from Pennsylvania. I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — = The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is. This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too. It is hard to understate the stakes: Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year. We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Bob Casey and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support, Bob Casey Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: James Carville
subject: The map guy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I’ve been at this politics ‘business’ for a long time, so believe me when I say...
Hey y'all, it's James Carville. I'm gonna ask for JUST 2 minutes of your time, okay?
Okay -- let's talk about my friend, Bob Casey. That's right, the map guy.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230819-1?refcode=em20230819-1&refcode2=468_552475_GvSPal&akid=468%2E552475%2EGvSPal)
Bob's facing the toughest re-election campaign of his career, and **folks are already saying this will be the most important race of 2024** -- seriously!! I'll explain a bit more in a moment, but if you're already on board to help Bob out:
[**Will you chip in $5 now? There's a lot on the line in this race, and we NEED to keep Bob in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230819-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230819-1&refcode2=468_552475_GvSPal&akid=468%2E552475%2EGvSPal)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230819-1?refcode=em20230819-1&refcode2=468_552475_GvSPal&akid=468%2E552475%2EGvSPal)**
Now, I've been at this politics ‘business' for a loooong time and I can safely say this: **There's no state quite like Pennsylvania.**
Just last year, Pennsylvania was home to one of the closest (and most expensive) Senate races I've seen. You had snake oil salesman Dr. Oz backed by super PACs, spending heaps of cash to flood the airwaves with nasty attack ads.
**And now, Mitch McConnell is “aggressively recruiting” this mega-millionaire hedge fund exec guy who can easily self-fund his campaign and outspend Bob.**
Not only that, but this guy has shipped American jobs overseas, has deep ties to the Saudi government, AND supports an abortion ban without exceptions for rape or incest. _I'm not kidding!! He's about as bad as they come._
That's why today we can't just make a big splash... we've gotta deliver a damn _tsunami_ of grassroots donations for Bob to show everyone just how serious we are about defending this seat and our
[**So what do you say, Peter? Can me and Bob count on you to chip in $5 right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230819-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230819-1&refcode2=468_552475_GvSPal&akid=468%2E552475%2EGvSPal)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230819-1?refcode=em20230819-1&refcode2=468_552475_GvSPal&akid=468%2E552475%2EGvSPal)**
Thanks,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230819-1?refcode=em20230819-1&refcode2=468_552475_GvSPal&akid=468%2E552475%2EGvSPal)
James Carville

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=468%2E552475%2EGvSPal)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=468%2E552475%2EGvSPal)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
