name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: There's no better time to become a poll worker. Save our elections!
body:
| | |
---
---
We believe it is the right and duty of American citizens to be involved in the process of election administration, particularly if you want to ensure that our elections are secure. [**National Poll Worker Recruitment Day**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.__UfuMJNbSXQtvip9hQxZg) is next week on Wednesday, August 23rd. The left is really good at recruiting people to work the polls. While conservatives are getting much better about filling those positions, we are still playing catch up. **_Honest poll workers make or break election security._** Various states have different laws about if they are paid positions and how much, minimum age requirements, and so on. But the crux of it is the same in every state: without patriots like you sacrificing your time, the majority of the people watching the election are radical, biased, left-wing activists. We are talking about activists who don’t care about honesty, integrity, or transparency. They will do anything to win, and the only way to stop them is by making sure America-loving patriots are in the room as well. If you want to help, or you’re just curious and possibly interested, [**please fill out the form on this page**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and we will reach out to you to answer your questions and help you get signed up. Additionally, please help recruit your friends and family to fill these roles as well! It’s worth repeating: our country will never have secure elections without patriots like you stepping up to fill poll worker roles. Your country needs you – [**sign up today!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin PS: You can sign up now and do not need to wait until August 23rd, and you can sign up after August 23rd as well. Making it a “day” is just a way the Election Assistance Commission brings attention to the need for poll workers.
---

# URGENT: Just 2,000 Donors Away!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, We’re so close to the finish line, but I need your help.We’re almost there. We’re only 2,000 donations away from reaching the RNC debate qualification. Two months ago, we were barely scratching the surface. We had only 3,000 donors. **But, now, because of PATRIOTS LIKE YOU, my campaign for President is SURGING. We’re closing in on 40,000 donors and have recently hit over 1% in a recent NATIONAL poll!**[**Please contribute what you can TODAY so that we can hit our goal before the RNC debate next week.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=fc1723239f&e=0be619cbaa)**And if you can, please FORWARD THIS EMAIL to all your friends and family who are dedicated to the America First, conservative values that you and I share.** It’s time to fight back. We can’t sit idly by as Democrats try to transform our great country into California. We can’t tolerate RINOs in Washington D.C. who are too entrenched in the DC Establishment to do anything about it.That’s why I’m running. I’m not a billionaire or a Washington insider who owes everything to special interests. I’m an independent conservative who’s fighting for you.With your help, we can usher in a new Golden Age for America. We can secure our border, put a stop to runaway spending and inflation, and usher in a new era of freedom and economic opportunity. We can work together to build a country where hardworking, law-abiding Americans can thrive once again.[**So please, contribute to my campaign – ANY AMOUNT will do – and send this to EVERYONE you know so we can make it to the debate stage next week and continue to fight for America.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=2765b12f94&e=0be619cbaa) We’re so close, and I need your **URGENT** help.Thank you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I need you to contribute to Josh Riley’s campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Friends,
Hey, it’s Adam Schiff. I’m reaching out to you personally because I want you to join me in supporting Democrat Josh Riley and Serve America. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
If you have been following my work, then you know that I am deeply concerned about the future of our Democracy and our country. We cannot allow right-wing extremists to hijack our Democracy, and undermine the values and ideals that make us who we are as Americans. We just can’t.
That’s why electing pro-Democracy, pro-Rule of Law candidates like Josh Riley to maintain our House Democratic Majority is so critical.
Friend, Josh’s race in Upstate New York is among the most competitive in the entire country. The Hill has named it one of seven races that could determine control of the House, and the Cook Political Report is naming it a TOSS-UP.
This is a monumental opportunity for Josh’s people-powered movement to prove its strength before the election. Can I count on you to split $25 between Josh’s campaign and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Thank you for stepping up at this critical moment,
Congressman Adam Schiff
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]

| | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | ************** I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

But there’s also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn’t what it used to be.

I’ve been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That’s the American way.

The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That’s 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. **********

---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e3feddaa98a94a959c6788a7ee931aa1&_e=yJOT46DCoe1Ybz1iq1j_3ncIBIPhaUKnrGrGp0qcKBltyvAztP9K6Cw9OOEGx9qej8u1D4xIJJGE8bEdrBGHGKmiU-eejn8HWsByE3r-eOWQs-w5h7EIaItQB091X0wK_OgaXDe-4h8GZZqbD9db720lRuCpFk-09A1UU9bdibedgxLoeTN8VGD1iwbs-1QDLVpYuFdkTHi91mHbMAgWk45bVVazp28VPCYomd4sOKxcddIlUSuZV4Lxt48I3LDCLjLRmdWNV0vZcUgbOZkZAFQoy6iOAAzBVNslx6XM6rsUW-Z8BhKIFxzN_KqC5555)
---
| | ****** Please join me in the fight to restore America’s journalism.
This is one mission that our country desperately needs.**
---
| | |
---

Larry Kudlow
Columnist for The New York Sun

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: It’s been crickets.
body:
We’ve heard nothing since Congress introduced the American Dream and Promise Act two months ago. | | | It’s been two months since Congress introduced the _American Dream and Promise Act_ , Peter, and since then we’ve heard crickets. 🦗 **The bipartisan _American Dream and Promise Act_** would finally create a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and those with Temporary Protected Status (TPS) or Deferred Enforced Departure. It’s past time for Congress to take action after decades of inaction, broken promises, and treating immigrants like a political bargaining chip. Now, Congress’ inaction is once again leaving DACA recipients in limbo as they wait for Judge Hanen’s ruling, which could come at any day. **We have to keep the pressure on Congress to provide ALL undocumented people with a pathway to citizenship immediately — that way, we don’t have to depend on right-wing courts to protect us.** We won’t stop our critical advocacy work until these policies become a reality. **Will you support our fight for permanent protections by making a donation today?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP87cRrEANGDGqJIDRtsWXK2wMOUV7V8xdDf_vlrZ_952dtaL4QVHR_sftdmpBOOu0RETOe9ZmKegO2Ujw8nwVYCW7W5xx3CZgockG7nnsfvwrVmKJpcmmlHFhDCWLoRLQ3YNJJsVvAaJXuOBoQyRIP76EkHwnlcugnWkXaoFLCZ_huBYmPmPgDnHO9ft4prZV1ohzqLPNU17ctHquduYMsvpOXgpMAcQOtELdcksQGzU09l6snj-jNusgTzR1rq4qQLXdPgZ3wuTctAPMGkTnVTKPiqdFl8W2P9pqyE3rSqhVuI5wWiVthqdHgrjhgT4tl-77iSZNI-d_A4r0W6aO3q6_uLGxyQWCN6ZrOrDiFlw0WeRS_FLbtWh-wV8J5VPKXV2TYi3xpJXfDlxsSd_jBdSWUfs03EFiC2G30A_dZXM4/3yv/G-hIHcm2QbuWgH8UufUuww/h0/bLMjXTPlvEA7ujvViXs-_X-noHqgrRlVazLPSyGsBGU)

subject: National Honey Bee Day alert: We are facing an insect apocalypse
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Act now before we lose vulnerable pollinators forever and the damage to our planet is irreversible: Donate $27 before midnight and help us reach our $107,000 National Honey Bee Day goal! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937113?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
An "insect apocalypse."
A "second Silent Spring."
A "catastrophic collapse of nature's ecosystems."
This is how scientists are describing the loss of bees and other insects. Neonicotinoid pesticides are a key driver of this crisis. They can impact bees' ability to navigate and reproduce, and even KILL BEES ON CONTACT. The worst part? They're also the most widely used insecticides in agriculture. **[The time to act is now: Donate $27 or more and help us meet our $107,000 National Honey Bee Day goal for pollinators and the planet! When you do, your gift will be matched, dollar for dollar -- but only until midnight TONIGHT.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937117?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
There’s no question that pollinator populations are rapidly spiraling. Last year alone, the U.S. lost nearly HALF of all honeybee colonies. And the increased usage of toxic pesticides is making things worse.
The EPA has a chance to ban neonics once and for all. Instead, it might _**approve these pesticides for another 15 years.**_ But there's still hope, Friend. Because of supporters like you, we have the chance to make real change -- change that would help protect bees, people, and the planet. Will you join us in this fight before National Honey Bee Day ends?
**Help get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system and protect our planet. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $107,000 goal before midnight TONIGHT!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937113?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937115?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937116?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees play a crucial role in their ecosystems. From fields of blooming wildflowers to rows of veggies on farms, bees and other insect pollinators aid in plant reproduction. Many of these plants support an entire web of life by offering habitat and food for other species.
We rely on bees and other pollinators for 1 in 3 bites of the food we eat, including the most nutritious -- so when we lose bees, **we also lose some of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at _**higher risk of heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer,**_ according to a recent study.
There's no mystery here. Study after study has found that the massive use of pesticides, like Bayer-Monsanto's bee-toxic neonicotinoids, are key drivers in the decimation of pollinators.
What’s worse is that pollinator-killers like Bayer-Monsanto are sweeping their lethal impact under the rug -- and the United States EPA is giving them a free pass, allowing widespread use of toxic pesticides instead of shifting away from chemicals we KNOW are killing massive numbers of bees.
**Stop the downward spiral of vulnerable pollinator populations and protect our planet. Donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth today and make DOUBLE the impact! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937113?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937115?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937116?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are a canary in the coal mine, signaling that the toxic way we produce food is on a deadly track. We must act NOW to protect our health and ensure that we are not among the last generations to share the planet with countless species of wild bees.
At Friends of the Earth, we are doing everything we can to help save pollinators, protect our health, and stop the destruction of our planet. We're working to ban toxic pesticides that are driving the decline of bees and butterflies. At the same time, we're pushing major grocery companies like Kroger to stop selling food grown with these chemicals. With your help and membership support today, we can make a difference.
But the bees are running out of time -- **and they need you.**
If we don't stand up to Big Ag now, **we could stand to lose _hundreds_ of wild bee species** in North America alone. It's up to you to help prevent a world without these vulnerable pollinators. Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet.
**Act now to give pollinators and our planet a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation while it can still be matched, and help us reach our $107,000 Honey Bee Day goal before the clock strikes midnight. **

Kendra Klein

Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet. Act now to give pollinators and our planet a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation while it can still be matched, and help us reach our $107,000 Honey Bee Day goal before the clock strikes midnight. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Kendra Klein Deputy director of science, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ee65cad87314375b4cf2e5a822d361d&_e=JcdIb_Hp3sXeeX2WBAvoVCECPZ9U6dWz0HKaV8ji_avP4Pjop-yPcRWe8MgYxAJSHl3xC5gjaRHuMNJ1_1eQN-8Vzlv87LU_YFo6gIU0FWcjbuSyHl6C46utFovU6G6tIITru7XMNqjXl8dGATcZhZVVuz-ZhnwmAWpY8WQDNxlHKAdulNwXPOox7BVkOOXtUxSON1bwIuutsXC6DfusB9-T2_oVePkykAd4RmVqtpkB5GXjdRC6dSC2oC6kSeAjpHP5ojtZ77PpIsAeMu3cFysIAWU3O6CZy0Cm3xZMYYe8Kc-ieQ75gRV2v8xDjtYeC3NOBToy9FFlceW75SfCBDS1IhAh9XQsUGzRH9cTjz-ZJo4EdssXoevdWlkpX9UA5QG-0nIzD9bpOqb-ZTV60AtBok-zcdnUgzuqXprWqvo%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ee65cad87314375b4cf2e5a822d361d&_e=JcdIb_Hp3sXeeX2WBAvoVCECPZ9U6dWz0HKaV8ji_avP4Pjop-yPcRWe8MgYxAJSHl3xC5gjaRHuMNJ1_1eQN-8Vzlv87LU_YFo6gIU0FWcjbuSyHl6C46utFovU6G6tIITru7XMNqjXl8dGATcZhZVVuz-ZhnwmAWpY8WQDNxlHKAdulNwXPOox7BVkOOXtUxSON1bwIuutsXC6DfusB9-T2_oVePkykAd4RmVqtpkB5GXjdRC6dSC2oC6kSeAjpHP5ojtZ77PpIsAeMu3cF1vo2wAqHdhHfV8_J-Lwg4qt8VJfXZ56PId-wO4WCf_sL7JaAWNyEPf-iuaZ1tU_gUcmsl0J7gQevbW1ylZ5LVsJ1yPzamF11mRM9jwEeVQfGlsVdhNC5oRTNMY3To08a0-kG5ILKGfhyZES8gkpNTY%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7ee65cad87314375b4cf2e5a822d361d&_e=JcdIb_Hp3sXeeX2WBAvoVCECPZ9U6dWz0HKaV8ji_avP4Pjop-yPcRWe8MgYxAJSHl3xC5gjaRHuMNJ1_1eQN-8Vzlv87LU_YFo6gIU0FWcjbuSyHl6C46utFovU6G6tIITru7XMNqjXl8dGATcZhZVVuz-ZhnwmAWpY8WQDNxlHKAdulNwXPOox7BVkOOXtUxSON1bwIuutsXC6DfusB9-T2_oVePkykAd4RmVqtpkB5GXjdRC6dSC2oC6kSeAjpHP5ojtZ77PpIsAeMu3cF41U03dBf5FCE4zu7yJql3uD42DbT342CDf4FNrXu5jH2eLsRtq7flQw3fpr7mNqCVAp3etDaLeBRa0v5kVjO5ipS0KWl8Hs6ym1QryELlQqDFG35xhmYwci1gpVSwfLjK2pjCrmDclUPgxpNFohKMo%3D)

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

Friend,
Reports indicate that my upcoming _unjust_ **ARREST** in Atlanta will be **TELEVISED** for the entire world to see.
The Sheriff publicly declared that a **MUGSHOT** will be "ready" for me.
This is just like when the FBI **RAIDED** my home and staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
And how can we forget the time when they tried to **FRAME** me as an asset of the Russian government and a traitor to our country?
_The pattern is undeniably clear._
The Deep State has done everything in their power to try and paint me as a villain - all while the _REAL_ villains, nestled deep within the Washington, D.C. swamp, quietly get away with bleeding our country dry.
And now, it's being reported that I could potentially face 1,000 YEARS in prison.
The Deep State wants to make an example out of me...
...They want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House.
This is ultimately about instilling **_FEAR_** in the public.
**The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. **
**The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their Public Enemy #1.**
Together, we will PEACEFULLY show the Deep State that their intimidation tactics cannot work on the American people.
No matter how much they attack our movement, we will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_If you are doing poorly due to the very sinister and corrupt people running Washington right now, please do not donate. I mean it._
Otherwise, I don't have to tell you how critical these times are for our country. America needs you now more than ever before.

And how can we forget the time when they tried to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government and a traitor to our country? The pattern is undeniably clear. The Deep State has done everything in their power to try and paint me as a villain - all while the REAL villains, nestled deep within the Washington, D.C. swamp, quietly get away with bleeding our country dry. name: COURIER
subject: Legitimate third party or right-wing front group?
body:
No Labels present themselves as a legitimate, centrist third party option, but the truth is much darker.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1418%2E120351%2ElbsJuF)
**The "No Labels" party is not what it claims to be, Peter.**
They’ve been a hot topic lately as Senator Joe Manchin of West Virginia considers a third party presidential bid. And while they present themselves as a legitimate, centrist option — the Goldilocks party that’s not too hot and not too cold, but just right — the truth is much darker.
[**We'll get into the details below, but if you don't have time and want to make a donation to support reliable, fact-based journalism that isn't afraid to challenge misinformation directly, you can pitch in $5 here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230819?refcode=em20230819&amount=5&refcode2=1418_120351_lbsJuF&akid=1418%2E120351%2ElbsJuF)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230819?refcode=em20230819&amount=5&refcode2=1418_120351_lbsJuF&akid=1418%2E120351%2ElbsJuF)**
Here are three key facts that explain why No Labels is **_not_** a centrist party, why **_no_** third party can win the White House, and who's _**really**_ behind these efforts.
**First, the group's basic premise doesn't comport with reality.** They claim that Trump and Biden represent equally extreme ends of the political spectrum, ignoring the fact that Trump openly sought the end of American democracy and is now promising his base "retribution" over the election he falsely claims was stolen. An equivalent extreme simply does not exist on the American left.
**Second, the Electoral College makes a third party victory virtually impossible.** In 1912, 1992, 2000, and 2016, third party candidates siphoned enough votes to tip the scales in favor of one of the major party candidates.
And in 2024, Trump’s core base will support him no matter what — a third party candidate would only serve to siphon traditionally conservative voters concerned with the state of our democracy away from President Biden.
**Third, No Labels is a dark money group financed by far-right donors.** Although they've repeatedly refused to disclose their major donors, Politico, Mother Jones, and the Lincoln Project have reported that they include:
* **Harlan Crow** , the right-wing billionaire who has lavished Justice Clarence Thomas with gifts and free vacations.
* **Michael Smith** , a fossil fuel billionaire who has backed a Mitch McConnell super PAC and Virginia’s Republican governor Glenn Youngkin.
* **Allan Keen** , a Florida real estate mogul and longtime Republican donor who spent at least $135,000 to elect Trump in 2020.

These donors and others have spent huge sums to launder their talking points through a purportedly “centrist” organization, but a little digging reveals exactly what No Labels really is: just another cog in the right-wing disinformation machine.
**Courier was founded to call this kind of misinformation out and provide fact-based reporting to communities in battleground states across the country. And _none_ of our work is locked behind a paywall — which means we count exclusively on donors like you to help us accomplish our mission.**
[**So if you want to support our network of newsrooms across the country, will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can afford today? As the 2024 election approaches, our work is going to get busier, and your donations will be critical to helping us keep it up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230819?refcode=em20230819&amount=5&refcode2=1418_120351_lbsJuF&akid=1418%2E120351%2ElbsJuF)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230819?refcode=em20230819&amount=5&refcode2=1418_120351_lbsJuF&akid=1418%2E120351%2ElbsJuF)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1418&t=2&refcode2=1418_120351_lbsJuF&akid=1418%2E120351%2ElbsJuF)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1418%2E120351%2ElbsJuF)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Jon Kaiman

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Supporting survivors of the wildfires in Hawai’i
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Any amount you’re able to give today will make an impact.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=985%2E35263%2EB8PDd7)
Peter, the scenes coming from Hawai’i are devastating. The deadliest U.S. wildfire in over 100 years has destroyed entire communities on the island of Maui, including the town of Lāhainā. Thousands have lost their homes and businesses. More than a hundred lives have been lost, and thousands more are still unaccounted for. My heart is with the victims, their families and loved ones, and the entire Maui community. The road to recovery will be a long one, but one of the best ways we can help right now is by supporting organizations providing relief for those impacted by these catastrophic wildfires. The **Hawai‘i Community Foundation** set up the Maui Strong Fund to provide financial resources that can be deployed quickly, with a focus on rapid response and recovery efforts. **Aloha United Way** has also established a relief fund to help meet the Maui community’s most urgent needs. **[If you can, Peter, I hope you’ll join me in supporting the Maui community today with a donation to the Hawai’i Community Foundation and Aloha United Way. Any amount you’re able to give today will make an impact.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-hawaii.YrKcaM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20230819_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=985%2E35263%2EB8PDd7)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2256?c0=tbe-em-hawaii.gzVSLg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20230819_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=985%2E35263%2EB8PDd7)
---
Thank you for giving, if you can.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=985%2E35263%2EB8PDd7) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=985%2E35263%2EB8PDd7)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Paul Begala
subject: this is a tricky tossup race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The odds are stacked against Democrats this cycle, and Senate control could very well come down to Nevada.

| Hey Peter, it’s Paul Begala.

I’m no stranger to competitive elections. I know how to fight against ruthless Republican opponents – and I know what it takes to win tricky tossup races like Jacky Rosen’s in Nevada.

_**Here’s my expert analysis on Nevada’s Senate race so far:**_
* The odds are stacked against Democrats this cycle, and Senate control could very well come down to Nevada. We’re defending a fragile Senate majority, and McConnell is taking every chance he can get to flip vulnerable seats and take back control.

* Republicans spent over $55 MILLION to try to flip Nevada last cycle – and they were only defeated by a NARROW .77% margin.

* **Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate is outraising Jacky.** I’ve been around the block enough times to know that early resources can make or break battleground elections like Nevada’s. **Simply put, if you can’t raise the money to compete, you lose.**

* **Even worse? A new poll shows her 2 points down.** If she can’t raise the resources to fight back, Jacky risks falling too far behind to ever catch up.

**Here’s the bottom line: this isn’t where you want to be in a tossup race like this. But I’m not sounding the alarm just yet. Because if we act now, we can turn this around.** **If Jacky can raise another $35,000 before midnight, she can make up the gap and reach her midnight fundraising goal. That comes down to you, Peter.[_Can you please chip in $25 to Jacky’s campaign and Fight for Progress to help keep Nevada and the Senate blue?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68339241/422744770/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230819-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMmIzMmI5LWFiM2UtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ObqfUxirU29aB9SwoQQGiyZL8-Vo6R2yZOgTosJlTRY=)**

Paul Begala

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68339263/422744796/608298858?sourceid=1051747&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM0NjA4OC1hYjNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hzspHK5FFot7U3obsTozQUnWU-yfIHXPyWx6T4Qk3o=&emci=837e89f4-083e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3c346088-ab3e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

EMILYs List could be headed to the 2024 South by Southwest (SXSW) Conference, but we need your help!

**Vote for our SXSW panel, "Get in Voters. We're Saving Abortion!"** with EMILYs List President Laphonza Butler, Biden pollster John Anzalone, abortion rights activist and political strategist Olivia Julianna, and an EMILYs List-endorsed candidate special guest. body:
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxskL1u5CAURp8GSgsuP4aCYot1sSvtaKOJkm6E4Rpj4Z_YRKN5-8hTpUh7dXSuvhNuOTp-mdK_5fr2RxZ8h0lM198vNDqupemRouPagtSgraI4-1xu9bGhC37efE7Lt9sp0xJZVL4HZfrAmGU6DDJySUcnlJFoGGc-eERrFQNkOra90mYYrKbZAQPBDLdcCy5UY3oeDfgeWoUBIRLJ5tTUHZd6VJ_S0YR1psWNtW4HEb8IdAS6o667T9ikdU0F_ZafGIFuPtKxxJ1Ax9TjYy__x_vnOHlj_z7M6-UEMGZPoDuXyxat50MrhOBCyNB6jc22JFrWZ7WfFHR3cbvnUvKhWyJZOtOcz78CAAD__3ixcXw]

Happy August, my friend!

As summer winds down and another school year begins, I wish the best of luck to you and your families this year.

My family is very optimistic about the new school year. Similarly, we are very optimistic about our campaign!

Since I last wrote I have been blessed to hold town halls in places like Brigham City, South Jordan and Salem. The campaign has
also gotten coverage from NewsMax [https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxckL1u5CAcxJ8GOlbwB2MoKK44F3dSVok2SroVX4ttYewYR47fPtqkiVLOjDSj-fnrEAw7j-mhXF7-iRxfYeTj5e8TDoZJoVzE0TCpQUiQusFxskO-bscSjbfTYodUfnj3MikiDY110CjnKdVU-psITODe3ALnTgEDS5XzLbRtYNQKRTUobS3gwQAFThXTTHLGm5NyLCiwDtom-ggBCTql07bGstXNplRPfp5wNv22LRXxPwg6BN2vHEH3LchcSIl7newHWeepxIP0thIXYyF1Jvs6l4Sgw3n-wkKb423Nj_3-3o9W6f-Hej7j1YRlH3IeqmyRoOn-_T7yGQAA___XPmnH], One American News
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxMkM1q9CAYRq9Gdwn6Ro0uXHyLL4sWOrRMaXeD0TeJwfw0sQ1z9yWFQrfngefA8bcYLL-M_dN8fXsQCd9hrMbr_xcaLFdCt0jRcmVAKFBGUpxcTLd8X9F6N60u9vMfdp4pgSxI14LUrWfMMOU7Ebigg3WSVyhlbaQ2hnctVwh18F6FutOdCjRaYFAxzQ1XFa9kqVseNLgWaokeIRDBpr7MG855z67v99IvE012yHndSfWPQEOgOY6jXNw8nyOB5isGXAg0G7pUuAm36F3xC72bQwwuY7GvS06xH3IBBBqalp82TN4_tvQ8HJ_D6LR5vOvXC91sWI-YUtxVTQTrzwCn7DsAAP__5UVq9Q], the Federalist
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxM0M8OlDAQx_GnaW_dtNM_wKEHD3LQxI1mjd42pR2g2AKWmg1vb1gvXieTT375-mcMVtyX6cv6-PFJJfwJi1weH7_RYIVR7YAUrTAdKAOm0xSzi-lZzx2td3l3cVr_u12YUciDdgPodvCcd9z4UQWh6GxH0zVeuyBVI0Yp1OhFNzaD1nJsJBqk0QIHyVvRCSOF1Ld2EKEFN0Cj0SMEoniebrXgWo_qpum4-S3TZOda94PIDwR6An2dccSAxaV41OuDQH_BBHreEOilINBnxMreEvtHsTojy-7cCntt5VdcJ1Y3tpeYXTlZjrWysuUVTwI9Tdu7HNfn75K-zq8_8-La7vPZfr_TYsP-iinFwzRE8enKc634GwAA__-N03TZ] and Town Hall
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxMkE_v1CAQQD8NvbGB4U_h0IMHe9DEXzQ_o7cNhVlKQ6G2rM1-e1O9eJ2XNzN5_p7CwN-W-KW8__gkM_6ERSzvH791YeBamgk7HLi2IDVoqzpcXcr39tpw8G7dXIrlv9m1TEtkQbkJlJk8Y5Zp_5CBy24eeitMr5RUVgUB_cMxyw17WKWV8MB8lwZgIJjhlmvBhbqZiQcDboJeoUcIRLI13tqOpR3NxXjcfF27PMytbQcRHwiMBMZWzzK7nC9IYPQ1P9eSjnZc7HLpP5nAeN0jMDJDYORAYNzrWvBFZ3fQCbHQc68l0lro8gwRD3oiLYiBtkp33LLzSOe00gJXH64IiFhrzHj_nWLB1rDL9W9kpl6_9vx1Pp_z4oz9_DLf37p9CNuZck6H7olk8Sp5ff0nAAD__xVSgfo].
It has been my distinct pleasure to give voice to the problems that everyday Utahns face such as inflation, high energy prices and
the woke plague that is preying upon our children.

I always get asked by our volunteers, “Trent, what is the best way for me to help out your campaign?” To that I would say that the
best ways to help the campaign right now are:

* Donations: Large donations (over $1000) are of course helpful, however even if you can donate $25 or $50 a month throughout
this campaign, it will be significant and help put an authentic Utahn and proven conservative in the Senate to represent you.

* Spread the word: Share our posts on social media [https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxMj7tO7DAURb_GLiOf48c4hYtb3BQgMQINgm7kx5k8cCYhMYry9yhU027ttaQVr31ycB7al_vl40ll-sRBDpf_bzw5MMoG4uTA1KgMmlpzGn2fr2WfyUU_zr5v7w_bITOKRNI-oLYhClELE28qgeKdUz4ZBSEhgQWjLWgQOoRENskkDfHeoUApLNRgJEhd2QDJog940hQJE1NibKuy0L2sxbftWsVp5Nl1pcwrk_8YNgybbduqm48UpunrODBsRr9PywPHsOF5-qsXev9e8mu3_XSDt_Xzbt_PfHFp3vqc-9WcmBLtkXiofgMAAP__DH5g-w] - let your friends and family
know that you are supporting our campaign and encourage them to do likewise

* Volunteer: If you would like to make phone calls to delegates, or host a town hall event of your own, please respond to our
campaign team and let us know so we can get you set up for calls and/or scheduled for a town hall.

Thanks for your support,

Trent

Paid for by Trent Staggs for Utah

If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxskctu2zAQRb-G2tUghxRNLbQoqgpFX-nDhdtVwMeYokIqikjbcL6-UNyFC2R7cXHn4Iy9D65ld6P_Ou32H0XE3zDycff-R-VaJoUyWGHLZANCgmzqCpMO8b5cZmytTrMOfrrJ1jEpkLpaG6iVsZQ2VNqDcExUQ6u3BymEFFQ6RTUThwYkcFB6K2vaOF6FFihwqljDJGe83ijDnAJtYFujRXBE0OQ3ZcGp5KK9zxv7mKrYDqXMmfC3BHoCfcblFCzmTco-T25ZSwT6F85MoDfHEB0uBPrjlI8m2yUYfHMKeCbQ0_rytMTvw_k4jFo1ny7q1x2B_hIe2PAtpwO32b_784Rd6gi_bhLeufkcYgxZbgnUgvo1vp6VBdMcdVnlEN79r0eAuOqRBGTCnLX_1_vZjR925vOyfyjptPvyvH8uUxUfX_71GmK1tDcMNwR_AwAA___EM5vC],
Trent Staggs for Senate

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Donald Trump’s campaign gets dealt a devastating blow
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 19, 2023

Donald Trump's
campaign gets dealt a devastating blow
So far, former President
Trump has been dodging bullets. But he's finally been caught.

And now the Donald Trump campaign
has been dealt a devastating blow.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

This high-profile Democrat
just suffered a humiliating defeat

Politics can be a
firestorm for some. But for others, it can get even worse than
that.
➞ Continue Reading

Dan Bongino shares tragic
news with his audience

Podcast host Dan
Bongino is a beloved voice for conservatives. It's with a heavy
heart that he opened up about this.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden made this
bald-faced lie that will fill you with rage

It seems nearly
impossible for the President to keep his foot out of his mouth.
But no one expected him to say this.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

Peter,

**Some candidates in Ohio are desperate to secure an endorsement that they think will win them the race.**

I will never beg for someone to do all the work for me. I'm always going to put the people first. **I will NEVER abandon the ones with the most to lose in this election -- the people of Ohio.**

This campaign has always, and will always, put Ohio first. I promise you that.

I'm on the campaign trail every day, fighting for every vote because we need to focus on our state and finally get rid of Sherrod Brown, whose unwavering loyalty to the Biden administration has disconnected himself from the hearts and minds in the Buckeye state.

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQRn_NsYHss7FhYGiL6FCpe6bK2CY44mJiICj_viKKsr736e4ZmqcwPBrQn4A4BrcAIogPQLyddkrbhX6-81M75zf1S-Uh8QsQ18fs38vXkcKTCdNBdZu5xigzeJf5hqsapZIlqmxsnJLclE46rbFyvK4GIbHURtaODcawLDTIULCK11wzZKLglbOqsnWpre95b0Cy56PC8N2kFCMVNlI2NeO6zsuzqAPshuS9i7Sb1Y5F8vd7YSNgZ8-XvA_OX3Pq80ggum2lvyVuyXoQ7VsDqkOQd2EjEG2kF7GGZhPOVxAt9S-2-nRs9sQBlaG4XVcQLZZZaty8h2kKi9Ig2fnZbSP9BwAA__8kWnTI)Friend,

The persecution of Donald Trump by the evil, vile, gestapo-like Justice Department and its FBI under the direction of the corrupt criminal Joe Biden makes it clear what America needs to do . . .

We must**indict, fairly try, and once convicted have arrested and imprisoned Joe Biden and his accomplices** who are using Banana Republic tactics to charge, convict and imprison his primary political opponent, President Donald J. Trump! God only knows, Biden has had The Donald unjustly indicted and arrested on multiple occasions! Now it will be Biden’s turn!

**[Help Freedom Watch do just that by supporting our efforts to bring justice to our nation.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQRn_NsYHss7FhYGiL6FCpe6bK2CY44mJiICj_viKKsr736e4ZmqcwPBrQn4A4BrcAIogPQLyddkrbhX6-81M75zf1S-Uh8QsQ18fs38vXkcKTCdNBdZu5xigzeJf5hqsapZIlqmxsnJLclE46rbFyvK4GIbHURtaODcawLDTIULCK11wzZKLglbOqsnWpre95b0Cy56PC8N2kFCMVNlI2NeO6zsuzqAPshuS9i7Sb1Y5F8vd7YSNgZ8-XvA_OX3Pq80ggum2lvyVuyXoQ7VsDqkOQd2EjEG2kF7GGZhPOVxAt9S-2-nRs9sQBlaG4XVcQLZZZaty8h2kKi9Ig2fnZbSP9BwAA__8kWnTI)**

Under the Constitution, we can form Citizen Grand Juries to investigate and charge individuals and organizations.

Our Citizen Grand Jury will investigate Joe Biden and his administration for illegal election interference, racketeering, and fraud, among other crimes. If evidence is found to confirm the allegations, we will charge Biden for his crimes and then try and fry him in a people’s court, since the establishment’s legal system will otherwise do nothing.

The work will be voluminous and intensive, and the judge, judges and/or juries we present the evidence will be convinced, once Biden is convicted, to issue an arrest warrant and provide Biden **with a speedy and fair trial**.

This won't be easy and will require a mountain of evidence to be presented quickly. If we don't move soon, Biden and his criminal cronies will steal another election by locking up their opponent, among other criminal dirty tricks!

This is outrageous; my friend, I've seen it all.

**[Will you help us move quickly to start our investigations?](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQRn_NsYHss7FhYGiL6FCpe6bK2CY44mJiICj_viKKsr736e4ZmqcwPBrQn4A4BrcAIogPQLyddkrbhX6-81M75zf1S-Uh8QsQ18fs38vXkcKTCdNBdZu5xigzeJf5hqsapZIlqmxsnJLclE46rbFyvK4GIbHURtaODcawLDTIULCK11wzZKLglbOqsnWpre95b0Cy56PC8N2kFCMVNlI2NeO6zsuzqAPshuS9i7Sb1Y5F8vd7YSNgZ8-XvA_OX3Pq80ggum2lvyVuyXoQ7VsDqkOQd2EjEG2kF7GGZhPOVxAt9S-2-nRs9sQBlaG4XVcQLZZZaty8h2kKi9Ig2fnZbSP9BwAA__8kWnTI)**

As the founder of Judicial Watch and now Freedom Watch, I’ve been fighting court battles against corrupt politicians and government officials for nearly 30 years.

I have been a thorn in the side of Bill and Hillary Clinton and held their corrupt organizations accountable for their crimes, time and time again.

I have investigated and sued Obama and his henchman for their fraud against America.

And now, I'm taking on the most egregious abuse of power by an evil President willing to fabricate crimes to imprison his political opposition.

This is both our future and our past . . . and it is sick and more importantly dangerous!

During the Civil Rights movement, you may recall racist Dixicrat leaders who repeatedly fabricated charges against men like Martin Luther King, Jr. to lock up outspoken activists.

And like today, they used the corrupt FBI to collect dirt on everyone who challenged them.

Let's face it. Our government is corrupt to the core, and it will take the efforts of the citizens of America to clean house and set things right. This can’t happen with elections – because those in power manipulate our elections – and now, in the most obscene ways! By imprisoning the opposition!

Help me act fast by convening a Citizen Grand Jury in multiple states to deliver criminal charges.

We must use the People’s Court of Justice to accomplish our vital mission.

**[Your strong financial support is vital to help us begin this work!](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQRn_NsYHss7FhYGiL6FCpe6bK2CY44mJiICj_viKKsr736e4ZmqcwPBrQn4A4BrcAIogPQLyddkrbhX6-81M75zf1S-Uh8QsQ18fs38vXkcKTCdNBdZu5xigzeJf5hqsapZIlqmxsnJLclE46rbFyvK4GIbHURtaODcawLDTIULCK11wzZKLglbOqsnWpre95b0Cy56PC8N2kFCMVNlI2NeO6zsuzqAPshuS9i7Sb1Y5F8vd7YSNgZ8-XvA_OX3Pq80ggum2lvyVuyXoQ7VsDqkOQd2EjEG2kF7GGZhPOVxAt9S-2-nRs9sQBlaG4XVcQLZZZaty8h2kKi9Ig2fnZbSP9BwAA__8kWnTI)**

Are you in? If not, you will have abandoned you and your loved ones who will be forced to live in the socialist and atheist hellhole foisted upon us by Joe Biden and his commie and other subversive friends and colleagues.

As a communist, Biden is godless; and as one example he pushes the killing of the unborn, and sexual perversion on our children. He not a Catholic as he claims, but instead a rabid leftist dictator and predator who knows no bounds of Judeo-Christian morality. He is a master criminal who must be legally brought down and sent to prison where he can spend his last miserable days alone in a cellblock!

**[Donate today and help Freedom Watch investigate, charge, try, convict, have arrested this disciple of the devil Joe Biden!](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJw8jjFvgzAQRn_NsYHss7FhYGiL6FCpe6bK2CY44mJiICj_viKKsr736e4ZmqcwPBrQn4A4BrcAIogPQLyddkrbhX6-81M75zf1S-Uh8QsQ18fs38vXkcKTCdNBdZu5xigzeJf5hqsapZIlqmxsnJLclE46rbFyvK4GIbHURtaODcawLDTIULCK11wzZKLglbOqsnWpre95b0Cy56PC8N2kFCMVNlI2NeO6zsuzqAPshuS9i7Sb1Y5F8vd7YSNgZ8-XvA_OX3Pq80ggum2lvyVuyXoQ7VsDqkOQd2EjEG2kF7GGZhPOVxAt9S-2-nRs9sQBlaG4XVcQLZZZaty8h2kKi9Ig2fnZbSP9BwAA__8kWnTI)**

Thanks for all that you do and please strongly support Freedom Watch in its quest to legally bring Joe Biden to justice before We the People.

In the Name of Justice and the Preservation of Our Freedom and Liberty,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300
Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter,
Here in Congressman Williams's office, we often talk about the crisis currently happening on our Southern Border, especially since it’s an issue that hits so close to home with the Congressman.

But now, we want your input.

_**Will you take this quick 1 question survey to tell us what you think the state of the U.S.-Mexico border is? **_

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

Thank you for your input, Williams Outreach Team | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. name: Team Gillibrand
subject: Kirsten is leading the change for paid family leave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Friend, America is the _only_ industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family leave for working families.** As a mom, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand knows it's far past time for that to change — and she's leading the fight to do it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68341959/422753419/1423499192?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4372-su-nd&refcode=jtk4372-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU1MWQ4NC1iMjNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxtGsscm-3WSwT0-e1oRxHHtq5_Xi9WzTMyk5pGdwfs=&emci=b334b6d0-183d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ff551d84-b23e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
Today, millions of Americans don't have the basic protection of paid leave. Instead, they're forced to make impossible decisions. No working American should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one, between their job security and taking the time to recover from a serious illness.
**That's why, 10 years ago, Kirsten first introduced a bill to create guaranteed paid leave for _every single American_. **And she'll keep on fighting for this legislation until she gets the job done.
**Kirsten has introduced the FAMILY Act again — and she's counting on grassroots Americans like you to stand with her.[_Please, will you add your name to Kirsten's petition before midnight tonight to show your support for paid family leave?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68341960/422753420/1423499192?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4372-su-nd&refcode=jtk4372-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU1MWQ4NC1iMjNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxtGsscm-3WSwT0-e1oRxHHtq5_Xi9WzTMyk5pGdwfs=&emci=b334b6d0-183d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ff551d84-b23e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68341962/422753421/1423499192?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4372-su-nd&refcode=jtk4372-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU1MWQ4NC1iMjNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxtGsscm-3WSwT0-e1oRxHHtq5_Xi9WzTMyk5pGdwfs=&emci=b334b6d0-183d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ff551d84-b23e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
Kirsten knows that we need a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with ample support for family or medical leave. Parents shouldn't have to decide between their paycheck and staying home with their sick child. Workers deserve job security, even if they need to take time off for themselves or care for a loved one.
But that's not all: Studies have shown over and over that paid family leave would actually _benefit_ our economy, making life better for _all_ of us.
**Paid leave should be a national priority. And Kirsten won't rest until it becomes a reality.[_Please, will you join me by adding your name to her petition before midnight tonight? She's counting on 5,000 engaged Democrats to sign on, so act now to stand with her!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68341964/422753422/1423499192?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4372-su-nd&refcode=jtk4372-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU1MWQ4NC1iMjNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxtGsscm-3WSwT0-e1oRxHHtq5_Xi9WzTMyk5pGdwfs=&emci=b334b6d0-183d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ff551d84-b23e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68341968/422753426/1575385346?code=jtk4372-su-nd&refcode=jtk4372-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU1MWQ4NC1iMjNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxtGsscm-3WSwT0-e1oRxHHtq5_Xi9WzTMyk5pGdwfs=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68341970/422753428/1575385346?code=jtk4372-su-nd&refcode=jtk4372-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU1MWQ4NC1iMjNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxtGsscm-3WSwT0-e1oRxHHtq5_Xi9WzTMyk5pGdwfs=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68341972/422753430/1575385346?code=jtk4372-su-nd&refcode=jtk4372-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjU1MWQ4NC1iMjNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxtGsscm-3WSwT0-e1oRxHHtq5_Xi9WzTMyk5pGdwfs=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | Friend, America is the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family leave for working families. As a mom, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand knows it's far past time for that to change — and she's leading the fight to do it. Today, millions of Americans don't have the basic protection of paid leave. Instead, they're forced to make impossible decisions. No working American should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one, between their job security and taking the time to recover from a serious illness. That's why, 10 years ago, Kirsten first introduced a bill to create guaranteed paid leave for every single American. And she'll keep on fighting for this legislation until she gets the job done. Kirsten has introduced the FAMILY Act again — and she's counting on grassroots Americans like you to stand with her. | | Kirsten knows that we need a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with ample support for family or medical leave. Parents shouldn't have to decide between their paycheck and staying home with their sick child. Workers deserve job security, even if they need to take time off for themselves or care for a loved one. But that's not all: Studies have shown over and over that paid family leave would actually benefit our economy, making life better for all of us. Paid leave should be a national priority. And Kirsten won't rest until it becomes a reality. | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

We can all feel it, Peter.

Whether you’re a driver, a nurse, a teacher, a construction worker, or a business owner, **you’re not truly represented in Washington.**

Now, I’m not a politician. But when I see that D.C. politicians are delivering for special interests — instead of everyday people — it’s clear we need a system overhaul in Washington. And that means we need representatives who'll get money out of politics, and make our government work for _us_ again.

**That’s why I’m running to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate! I’m going to need your help to take on and defeat the special interests, so I’m personally asking:**

[Peter, can I count on you to split a $5 donation between our campaign and The Collective PAC right now to help us get off to a strong start? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_05XxXXfUUOrPF7Tpg-sZNNatxmoTEjSD8w47k5ZbpkQRI8ig5q4y_GW5R_xSLk0Duewif9jIkCCH-nxNN503q6oWYD6ttO0fwDkAaz9eYXRQZBeCC4KWzpAaCigTLEyXG9qUDkd0F6HgVoQCwJ31c8r6jjxdIyGdLmSp9sN529Bzd6_YeXlPKGBAu6LlUwv9iQ8hkCZ92j5NRReXe80JId7B8ftzHEPOQZKUQ5kuyRnJy8RcTBKyyjmAKKbR1wqkUUFJx9yq8ZkOchbttG8EuTCD8YQrqzmcYd09ES3pC9N7jUbLe82AoqObvO8Z6w6p2gf35sOSe6-fsEN5rLYbiyZqvNFaQDoicdi_6-ZAwuRhqLbUBzpYK2xTYNh41_yKv/3yv/BIu-eZZHSa2Pdf6utXygJw/h2/ymcLpCF-VWLJsAwvUDZzZn1bD5-R5A_I2yFkt4vTCRs)

| [Donate $5 today →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_05XxXXfUUOrPF7Tpg-sZNNatxmoTEjSD8w47k5ZbpkQRI8ig5q4y_GW5R_xSLk0Duewif9jIkCCH-nxNN503q6oWYD6ttO0fwDkAaz9eYXRQZBeCC4KWzpAaCigTLEyXG3Nteiv7qi_VgwCM-VysmwuApCn8w8UgjAJGb_TKFgpq4JcT3p5a1v4gyHA2_hs0Z6mGPHitzdXSrG3rqJ_L5UpbBabyQ72O390BIOx_XQOi5nzUaps_zY6DWQw2BiHJDGz2Q5zb5JqXjY7eWD0nvAgBcz3O1la682T9l8N6jTUFUXP1xSoMGywapIDklz9mUWWv3eT2RKdLO67VaGYNdZhVm20f5gwioeUTFU1rrLvZdon_QqOs4YZMQTrjFowLY/3yv/BIu-eZZHSa2Pdf6utXygJw/h3/1mPN-VT5dcrCxS4WJFfxUma7aUqloDwZyEKZQ0mhi0w)

As a union organizer, activist, single father, and the owner of a small business in Detroit, I understand the pressures Michiganders are facing right now:
* We pay **14 times more for a vial of insulin** than our neighbors to the north.
* We’re **49th in the nation for growth**.
* We rank **41st in the nation for teacher pay**.
* In the last three years, more small businesses **closed their doors for good** here than in _any other state._

These challenges are not any single politician’s fault — it’s the system that’s broken. To change that, we need a new voice and a new perspective.

I believe that our government should work for the people, be a force for good, and protect our freedoms — not take them away. **But that won’t happen if we keep electing the same career politicians to office who will just uphold the status quo.**

And that’s what this campaign is all about — fighting for the future of ALL of our communities and our democracy.

**As a political outsider, I’m accountable to you from day one.** We won’t have the most endorsements from DC insiders, but we’ll have something better: A movement of everyday folks who are tired of our broken politics and ready to vote for dynamic change.

[So if you believe in better, join me. Split a donation of $5, $15, or anything you can between our campaign and The Collective PAC to help us build the resources we’ll need to win.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_05XxXXfUUOrPF7Tpg-sZNNQI9I0ETf85tCqsEO3Qa-IOK8FO84vxkjDy91dYMPS6EjarQadPiZfmPfiXKZMy-3HcLiA_Ioz52-Espq_jDGy2p3zJG-WVl1r9IWKmxz-jrAaATw2iY0Gq2KrAp5_N0MCWAxXWaozRIzdFzIfLO2kZBwjdr3oNw52jrhVP-TfqpLyshAG6LMoiqSlEvySjofGqX4PrbsH41e3rylvnxto_DlnusRbrtgot3dhysj99J_d0Gsmreka_ZsNK7SpC-tRRWNXwIF9ng7V-jkqlnbIXAcrMdWDzgcMCYNZ2fnJEm8_6WHOWWUJd-NKC7g__lNalq3Y0FOoUjNtUCWH11juBn_0o4mlQGRpglKHK9-cJs/3yv/BIu-eZZHSa2Pdf6utXygJw/h4/EQhuY_upiJIEYKBZV89JHxTtUnU0u3Jbd4gNC50jh7I)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | We can all feel it, Peter. Whether you’re a driver, a nurse, a teacher, a construction worker, or a business owner, you’re not truly represented in Washington. Now, I’m not a politician. But when I see that D.C. politicians are delivering for special interests — instead of everyday people — it’s clear we need a system overhaul in Washington. And that means we need representatives who'll get money out of politics, and make our government work for us again. That’s why I’m running to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate! I’m going to need your help to take on and defeat the special interests, so I’m personally asking: | As a union organizer, activist, single father, and the owner of a small business in Detroit, I understand the pressures Michiganders are facing right now: We pay 14 times more for a vial of insulin than our neighbors to the north. We’re 49th in the nation for growth. We rank 41st in the nation for teacher pay. In the last three years, more small businesses closed their doors for good here than in any other state. These challenges are not any single politician’s fault — it’s the system that’s broken. To change that, we need a new voice and a new perspective. I believe that our government should work for the people, be a force for good, and protect our freedoms — not take them away. But that won’t happen if we keep electing the same career politicians to office who will just uphold the status quo. And that’s what this campaign is all about — fighting for the future of ALL of our communities and our democracy. As a political outsider, I’m accountable to you from day one. We won’t have the most endorsements from DC insiders, but we’ll have something better: A movement of everyday folks who are tired of our broken politics and ready to vote for dynamic change. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Hill Harper and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Hill Harper The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . clean_body: another concerning headline... | | | The legislative elections in Virginia are getting a lot of national media attention, Derek. Folks are noticing that Virginia Republicans are raising record amounts of money and pushing out misleading ads earlier than ever. Check out this latest headline from The Wall Street Journal: = **= The GOP is looking for a resurgence in the Commonwealth, Derek. And oh boy, are they eager. The Wall Street Journal reminds us that the GOP hasn't controlled both General Assembly houses and the governorship in 10 years. No wonder they’re working so hard to raise unprecedented amounts of cash and investing in their new early-voting operation. If they take complete control of Virginia, there’s no stopping them from importing misguided policies from other Republican-led states. And with Democrats only controlling the Virginia Senate by a 4 seat margin, the GOP knows they have a real chance of achieving this renaissance they’re dreaming of. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Mark Warner = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

# **SEPTEMBER MONTHLY MEETING**
**Tuesday, September 12th, 2023
5:30 PM - 8:00 PM
Red Rock Country Club**
The Active Republican Women of Las Vegas (ARW) invites you to the September monthly meeting. We are off to a fresh start with all new leadership, but we maintain the same passion and commitment that has allowed ARW to be the longest standing Republican Women's Club in Las Vegas (since 1970!).

Who is speaking? We are, and we hope you will, too! We are calling this first meeting our "Town Hall" meeting because we want to hear from you: our members and supporters! We have an exciting lineup of speakers starting with our October meeting, but this meeting is about ARW, its mission, and our vision going forward.

Get your ticket now, as there are _**only 50 spots**_ available!
---

name: Schiff HQ
subject: Is there anything we can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
What if we told you that your donations help support our voter outreach efforts across all 58 counties in California?
| Friend, is there _anything_ we can say to convince you to split a donation of $10 to the Voter Protection Project and Adam’s campaign before our midnight deadline?

What if we told you that your donations help support our voter outreach efforts across all 58 counties in California?

What if we told you that a Senate campaign with the resources to turn out millions of motivated California voters could help drive the turnout to **win the House majority back for Democrats?**

**Or what if we told you that Trump threatened to primary _any_ Republican who refused to go along with the sham vote to censure Adam,** and that he has continued to attack Adam on _Fox News_ since? And now Adam is counting on this grassroots team to help him fight back?

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are desperate to stop Adam from reaching the Senate because they’re afraid of how relentlessly he will work to hold them accountable.**

[If you’re convinced why your support for Adam matters — and we hope you are — please chip in a split donation of $10 or any amount before our deadline:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51596?t=6&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51597?t=7&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51598?t=8&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51599?t=9&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51600?t=10&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51596?t=11&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf)
Adam really means it when he says that our work wouldn’t be possible without your support. Thanks for everything you do to support our campaign.

— Schiff HQ
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9944%2E878179%2E2QlSUf)

---
| | Friend,

---
At the beginning of August – _right as the Biden DOJ wrongfully INDICTED me_ – it was leaked that Barack Obama privately warned Crooked Joe that he could very well **LOSE** to me.

---
But now, Biden and Obama have even more reason to panic...

---
** _...Obama’s personal pollster just released a poll showing that Biden can’t beat me._**

---
During their private talk, Obama promised Crooked Joe that he would do EVERYTHING in his power to stop us from winning.

---
Make no mistake: the entire Democrat machine will mobilize to try and crush our movement in its last-ditch effort to stop the _people_ of our country from having a voice in our nation’s capital.

---
They will spend over $1 BILLION, they will force me to stand trial FOUR TIMES throughout the election, they will concoct and leak slanderous stories through the Fake News, and they will not hesitate to collude with corporations to control the flow of information online and censor YOUR free speech.

---
Even with nearly every powerful tool at their disposal, Democrats are _still_ panicking, because they don’t have access to my secret weapon... _**YOU**._

---
There’s only one thing that scares a tyrant – and that’s a free and united PEOPLE.

---
As a grassroots donor, your $1 donation truly has the power to prevail against tyranny.

---
So, at this pivotal moment in our nation’s history, I’m asking you to peacefully unite with your fellow patriots and give just $1 to stand against tyranny.

---

clean_body: But GOOD news for us!| | | | | Friend, At the beginning of August – right as the Biden DOJ wrongfully INDICTED me – it was leaked that Barack Obama privately warned Crooked Joe that he could very well LOSE to me. But now, Biden and Obama have even more reason to panic... ...Obama’s personal pollster just released a poll showing that Biden can’t beat me. During their private talk, Obama promised Crooked Joe that he would do EVERYTHING in his power to stop us from winning. Make no mistake: the entire Democrat machine will mobilize to try and crush our movement in its last-ditch effort to stop the people of our country from having a voice in our nation’s capital. They will spend over $1 BILLION, they will force me to stand trial FOUR TIMES throughout the election, they will concoct and leak slanderous stories through the Fake News, and they will not hesitate to collude with corporations to control the flow of information online and censor YOUR free speech. Even with nearly every powerful tool at their disposal, Democrats are still panicking, because they don’t have access to my secret weapon... YOU. There’s only one thing that scares a tyrant – and that’s a free and united PEOPLE. As a grassroots donor, your $1 donation truly has the power to prevail against tyranny. So, at this pivotal moment in our nation’s history, I’m asking you to peacefully unite with your fellow patriots and give just $1 to stand against tyranny. | | Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: It’s time to get ready for more reproductive battles ahead >> | | Team, Today we are THRILLED to share that our 2024 campaign slate includes our newest fight to protect reproductive rights. = = Here’s the strategy: After the Dobbs decision last year, we’ve needed to turn our focus on protecting reproductive freedom across the country the best way we know how — through direct democracy. And we’ve already proven in Vermont and Michigan that when the decision is left to the voters – abortion rights win. Now, we’re getting ready to keep our win streak going over the next two years in states like Ohio and Arizona to keep abortion access safe and legal for everyone. So what do you say, team? = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We hope you’ll seize this opportunity to act and join us.
