name: Dr. Shawn Wilson for Governor
subject: Full steam ahead
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
TEAM WILSON WEEKLY UPDATES
Peter,
Fresh off of an exciting week surrounding the qualifying period, Team Wilson has kept right on chugging, full steam ahead.
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL
Shreveport
This race for Governor is about our future.
It's about what we can do to take care of all Louisianans, and we do that by making investments and commitments to improving education, healthcare, and economic development.
Election day is October 14th and you can vote early September 30th through October 7th .
Join us at wilsonforla.com [http://wilsonforla.com] !
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QNN-q9ZlXq8 [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QNN-q9ZlXq8]
Lafayette & Iberia
I had the opportunity to join Black Voters Matter Fund to help fire up voters and get to work! From Abbeville to Lafayette, the people of Louisiana are ready to get out and VOTE.
There was standing room only in the room! People are being registered, people are being energized, and they are ready to VOTE in the October 14th election!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/BeFunky-collage%20%284%29.jpg]
New Iberia
The other day I visited New Iberia, a small city with a big history!
Thanks Dr. Phebe Hayes , a Professor and Dean during my days as a student University of Louisiana at Lafayette . They have an amazing partnership with Shadows-on-the-Teche that is telling an inclusive history.
I also chatted with Emily Robertson Etienne Wright , a life long resident of New Iberia that understands first-hand why Louisiana needs a Governor with compassion, competence, and concern for all people!
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Shreveport
Sunday's Build a Better Louisiana rally in Shreveport was a roaring success!
The outpouring of strong support for our campaign has me amped up for what we can accomplish during a Wilson administration.
I have the experience, the solutions, and the vision to build a better Louisiana.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/BeFunky-collage%20%286%29.jpg]
Improving healthcare for our rural communities will be one of my top priorities as Governor! 🏥
I shared my views on this and more during a forum with the Louisiana Primary Care Association .
Check out my plan for a healthier and stronger Louisiana at wilsonforla.com/healthcare [http://wilsonforla.com/healthcare] !
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PCmAxgcted4 [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PCmAxgcted4]
Baton Rouge
At today’s forum with the Louisiana Association of Health Plans , I talked about my plan to lower the cost of prescriptions for everyday people.
Transparency in pricing and incentivizing patient services to improve health outcomes is the way.
Life-saving medications like insulin should be affordable.
I will remain engaged with health plans, providers, and patients to make healthy lifestyles accessible & affordable... always putting people first.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/BeFunky-collage%20%288%29.jpg]
Tangipahoa Parish
Thank you to everyone who came out to the Tangipahoa Parish Democratic Executive Committee meet & greet. It quickly became a standing-room-only event!
I was grateful to share how I will work with stakeholders from across our state to deliver the necessary resources to improve our education, healthcare, and public safety.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/BeFunky-collage%20%2810%29.jpg]
Before hitting the road this week, I stopped by UPS to greet drivers before they head out to their route.
Because of organized representation, this is a successful company with long-term employees enjoying benefits like sick leave and wage raises.
Like you, I see them in my neighborhood regularly, delivering goods and spurring our economy forward... Thank you Big Brown!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/BeFunky-collage%20%2811%29.jpg]
One of the hallmarks of my leadership is my commitment to working with everyone to get things accomplished for everyday Louisianans.
I'm grateful to have a strong working relationship with the unions throughout our state, and proud to have stood with members of International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers L.U.995 , Ironworkers Local 623 , Amalgamated Transit Union Local 1546 , the National Association of Letter Carriers Local 136 and many more earlier this week.
As Governor I will always stand with workers and fight for safer worker conditions, better wages, and better benefits.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/BeFunky-collage%20%2812%29.jpg]
GIVING PRAISE
Abbeville
A guiding light on my path to the Governor’s mansion has been my Pastor of 36 years, Lloyd Joiner . He even accompanied me to qualify earlier this week.
He took me to his hometown of Abbeville to visit with Minister Irving Simpson , a former member of Progressive Baptist Church , and a college classmate and former State Trooper, Pastor Willie Williams .
These faith leaders are actively involved in voter education and mobilization!
wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com]
Shreveport
Sunday morning I heard the good word in two great sermons in one city, visiting Morning Star Baptist Church of Shreveport and Pleasant Hill Baptist Church .
It's always a blessing to start your day thinking of what good you can do for those around you.
WILSONFORLA.COM [WILSONFORLA.COM]
ENDORSEMENTS
Louisiana AFL-CIO
I am honored to be unanimously endorsed by the Louisiana AFL-CIO , a democratically elected body dedicated to represent the interests of working people at the state and local level.
“Shawn Wilson has a strong, reliable record supporting the hard working men and women of Louisiana. Right now, the people of this state need a leader who is going to stand up for them and their families, and that's Shawn Wilson," said Louisiana AFL-CIO President Louis Reine . "We are proud to endorse Shawn Wilson to be the next governor of the great state of Louisiana."
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/Shawn%20Wilson%20%20AFLCIO%20%281%29.png]
UPCOMING EVENTS
New Orleans
New Orleans - Please join me at Zulu Social Aid & Pleasure Club, Inc. on Thursday, August 24th for an evening of food, music and fun. King Zulu-elect 2024 Marvin Labat will be in attendance.
This event is open to all Zulu members, family, and friends.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/Shawn%20Wilson%20%20Zulu%20Flyer-High-Quality.jpg]
HOST SHAWN AT AN EVENT [events@wilsonforla.com?subject=Host%20Shawn%20At%20An%20Event]
To learn more about my candidacy visit wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com] .
With hope,
Shawn Wilson
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
ENDORSE [https://www.wilsonforla.com/endorse]
LEARN MORE [WILSONFORLA.COM]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Wilson for Louisiana
P.O. Box 4572
Baton Rouge, LA 70821
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/408Tlfh_cUKqKl0Yd-tKBw2?unsubscribedata=0D8oNhFzm%2FQz40xFaH%2Bb3sZpuBSqzbDZAVwjO7e%2Bda033K%2FKEmwdEaPRlhpRzF1pKZk%2FYbY%2BqD7elRcEYTM05koEdN9B2ueA2BcD3PypZXH3ighsCTUPPWEd6jJmWXn%2FnViTsLZNNUC1nLGGNcl6xvVH0OZTgfnq0VknWLNK4PsKFZTE0hDQaJhKtEEW%2Fx5O2CCPQ2TYsjVZTYLZ6ugHCH1tbw7fYxmHry1G96Xa%2Fo%2FnZ%2BdXoLFOgQ8smDL3O%2BMZwEae1Nb64u3LX5BioupX71oebkKG%2F8onMxwfpBoh9SPeLLpRWHUV7xlnaop%2F2spbI5f09ydIEihRgVDTuB0dzme4EDzfUMlhrAj1jbYzMH19AKFwVr4NHXA43wUecmqitwUiHjtHBCGzZWIWerlPN1yFo2NMg5kVtTaExZUBcpv38oJW8uiospc08fZfyOD9 .

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Not to sound like a broken record but…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
If the mindless MAGA mob hasn’t abandoned ship yet, they never will. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68352056/422761659/163070490?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGU1MDMwNC1iYzNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj0HVZsNeFJor7iAyThSd374AYWeledUXbbvNs-YerY=)
Donald Trump is _quite_ the overachiever, friend. I mean, come on. Four indictments for a failed former president in less than a year? _What a record! 🙄_ At this point, I think _everyone_ sounds a bit like a broken record on the matter. But like clockwork, Jim Jordan and Kevin McCarthy rushed to our former insurrectionist-in-chief’s defense, and they sound as monotonous as ever. _“Justice should be blind”_ this, and _“Democrats’ latest witch hunt”_ that. Seriously, guys. It’s time to get a new line — or maybe just a leader who doesn’t make you fall on his sword every other week! Look, friend: We know there are _still_ potential indictments coming down the line, and we know that if the mindless MAGA mob hasn’t abandoned ship yet, **they never will.** **[The circus has _way_ overstayed its welcome, and it’s high time we clear them out for good. Chip in so we can make sure these debased extremists don’t have a shot at re-election in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68352057/422761660/-493221992?refcode=E3798-20230819-Indictment4-SL-StopGOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGU1MDMwNC1iYzNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj0HVZsNeFJor7iAyThSd374AYWeledUXbbvNs-YerY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68352058/422761661/-493221992?express_lane=true&refcode=E3798-20230819-Indictment4-EG-StopGOP&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGU1MDMwNC1iYzNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj0HVZsNeFJor7iAyThSd374AYWeledUXbbvNs-YerY=)

clean_body: If Pennsylvania and New Hampshire Republicans win these critical seats, there will be dire consequences. | | | | | In one month, Democrats are facing two all-important special elections – one in New Hampshire and one in Pennsylvania – that could determine control of the chambers this year! Here’s what we’re up against: ❌ Our NH opponent, Jim Guzofski,is an ultra-conservative, anti-LGBTQ+, anti-abortion extremist who is hell-bent on pushing his right-wing agenda onto the people of New Hampshire. ❌ Our PA opponent, Erin Autenreith,is a QAnon enthusiast who was proudly in D.C. during the January 6th insurrection. Our candidates, Hal Rafter and Lindsay Powell MUST win to ensure that these Republican extremists are kept out of office so state Democrats can continue fighting for working families. That’s why we’re asking: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | These special elections could be even more expensive than anticipated because they could help determine control of these critical chambers – Republicans are pouring money into the states, and we can't fall behind. Here’s the truth: State Republicans consistently outraised us cycle after cycle, and they're fired up to do everything they can to win these races and push their far-right candidates across the finish line. And, with special elections being more costly than ever, we can’t afford to lose momentum. If Pennsylvania and New Hampshire Republicans gain these critical seats, there will be dire consequences. We need every one of our grassroots donors to support us in these special election fights. Can we count on you? Thanks for all you do – your support has a huge impact at this moment. name: Colin Allred
subject: sorry to email again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19009?t=1001&akid=3503%2E346206%2EAkbrPy ][IMG]

Peter, I know I already emailed you about our massive voter
outreach operation we're launching to retire Ted Cruz.

But my finance director just called to let me know we're still falling
$7,650 short of our strict fundraising goal and need to pick up the pace
before our strict deadline.

Voter suppression is no joke, especially in Texas.

It's already one of the hardest states to cast your ballot in, and the GOP
is trying to make it even tougher. But here's the thing: Republicans
wouldn't be trying so hard to stop people from voting if they weren't
seriously worried about movements like ours.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19009?t=1002&akid=3503%2E346206%2EAkbrPy ]Texas is a battleground state, Peter – Ted Cruz won his last
race by barely 2% of the vote. And our voter outreach efforts will make
all the difference in our race to defeat Ted Cruz. That's why me and
Charles Booker urgently need your help: Please, will you rush $5, $15, or
any amount to make sure we hit our $100,000 goal tomorrow to reach voters
and flip Texas blue? →

Every dollar makes a difference. Thank you so much.

Colin

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230819-3503-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3503_346206_AkbrPy&akid=3503%2E346206%2EAkbrPy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3503%2E346206%2EAkbrPy

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Team Engel
subject: Let's flip this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
This week marked the one-year anniversary of the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act.
This law lowered the cost of prescription drugs for seniors, raised taxes on the wealthiest corporations, and invested billions of dollars into clean energy projects and conservation efforts. Arizona alone is receiving $4 billion to put into fighting the climate crisis, creating green energy jobs, and improving our infrastructure — including $44 million for Tucson.
The Inflation Reduction Act has strengthened our economy and given our working families the breathing room they need.
But every single Republican in Congress voted against it — and after taking office, Kirsten's opponent voted to roll back key provisions.
Democrats were only able to pass the Inflation Reduction Act because we had majorities in the House and the Senate. If we want to win back our majority in the House, we need to elect Kirsten.
Arizona's Sixth Congressional District has been identified as one of the most flippable seats in the country [https://wapo.st/45hPE40] . It's one of only eighteen districts currently held by a Republican that President Biden won in 2020. And Kirsten lost by one of the smallest margins in 2022.
Kirsten can flip this seat blue, take back our House majority, and bring home big wins for Southern Arizona. But we'll need your grassroots support to get it done. With Republican PACs and special interests already targeting Kirsten, can we count on you to chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_081923_Biden18_act]

subject: moving up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
In the latest national polling, we’ve had the biggest bump.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=aa4f149c695f484a9a609bb5498a9e0d&_t=XC9fKA2UUX-Nr12DiIHkGzMg_IZlY0RUo1IU6BiWGfEatM9snK6KL-7_MRfen5L00xDhW1dt3-d6MH6H5lFQGWQZhWZO1TWehQughWliAvM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=aa4f149c695f484a9a609bb5498a9e0d&_t=XC9fKA2UUX-Nr12DiIHkGzMg_IZlY0RUo1IU6BiWGfEatM9snK6KL-7_MRfen5L00xDhW1dt3-d6MH6H5lFQGWQZhWZO1TWehQughWliAvM%3D)

|
Fellow American, our message is working.

Americans are HUNGRY for a purpose.

That's why we've seen the largest bump this summer in polling. In fact, the latest national polling has me up SIX POINTS, and now statistically tied for second place. We're polling ahead of career politicians and the DC establishment.

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=aa4f149c695f484a9a609bb5498a9e0d&_e=fNkN5YtWpc3gG632SxfGzHBm-yuseX74rdJ5L7toamoJCBmwxtoFNrQkb7jFmXcvOBTR_svELh3LGpgeAc9K0dOVN4KogqSqYS48dAIFshdt_YlBtdiLJCuawG2oy2SAz62KF_CPfbntryRYKJkEB6vk99UDQ7Hq3ZLmTQMCosbDdn2jdejU28BdSKyzGK0hC2c23Gy4bfWy7m1EjY1NLfPQB2jnJ8r63Guk2WwP1GWKqqkRiEdquXy930tIP_1EQYx9-F1RrAHjWSG_vtlFR7MBeMSth5SX2f9BISsVjzhUk7waWYRG7n-tO3XFwcQkebP06PxtvFU6mWDDy3KX6WHGxIt0xgc9CP5T0IHw4EWa2UyV-AMBmuQOOFpjxrbLussAC9_eP7GqgXBCN5-KMTBh30OOyWN1nhQlURwAeZE%3D)
**This is our chance, Fellow American.** I'm running to revive our American national identity, but I need your help to make sure we stay on track.

Washington doesn't like that we're bucking against what's expected from a candidate or a presidential campaign. I am not a career politician. I am not bought and sold by a Super PAC. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Prove that no amount of phony charges will EVER break our movement!| | | Friend – our once free Republic is no doubt on the brink of absolute tyranny... As Mark Levin recently reported, after what is now FOUR sham indictments , your favorite president is potentially facing a total maximum sentence of 1,000 YEARS in prison as an INNOCENT man. The Left’s disgusting weaponization of our justice system is their attempt to instill FEAR into the hearts of the American people like a Third World tin-pot dictatorship. The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU too could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU too could be made their Public Enemy #1. But what these communists, crooks, and thugs never could’ve imagined was just how many Americans would stand up for TRUE JUSTICE and NEVER SURRENDER their country to tyranny! Which is why while Crooked Joe and the Deep State are trying to JAIL President Trump for 1,000 years, we’ve set a NEW GOAL to raise just $1 from 1,000 GRASSROOTS PATRIOTS every hour to peacefully defend our movement. (Of course, if you’re struggling right now and even $1 is too much because of how badly Crooked Joe and these tyrants are harming our country – the President doesn’t want you to even think about donating!) Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tue, August 15, 2023Subject: RE: “1,000 YEARS” MAXIMUM SENTENCETo: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Friend, As Mark Levin reported, I’m now potentially facing a total MAXIMUM SENTENCE of 1,000 YEARS in prison as an innocent man. As I write those words, it almost doesn’t feel real. Just 8 years ago, the Deep State didn’t even care about who I was. The Fake News had never said a mean thing about me. I had a perfectly nice life. But as soon as I chose to run for president as a complete political outsider, a target was placed on my back. The Crooked Biden Regime is attempting to turn me into a political prisoner all because I dared to challenge the political ruling class and defend the interests of the hardworking citizens of our country. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what’s happened to our once Free Republic. America has never been in such a dark place. But this is the price to pay to save our country – and I believe with all of my heart that in nearly one year from now, we will be celebrating our triumph over tyranny and beginning to write the greatest chapter of American history. If you’re doing poorly due to the Crook in the White House who is destroying our country, don’t even think about donating. | | Thank you, Donald J. subject: Drove through 🔥🔥🔥, sprayed with 💧💧💧
body:
Seattle is throwing everything at us. | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a81b8ae1c42741fd93173b5a87a89b49&_e=CEpFSOXPdNB5JO7t1qIjBB0Kk4q3ZVugG-qwRBpn3XTI_H_KECgNst_GKUrDTwb_dAg0Yi8qN8U6btgG7vW23J7mmq2gmZBa24W4bq2DX9tS_O1rWQXvYJu5ODw3bGjgZRtDNnHGIACHKfLzRAgvMvK6t22JX2NIoCfJ53X9Bd8wZH5vHmG1w2r8in-be0vQ_kI9JJ7o3wt5XsshS6r7ddQ7zCLuRuPBrkZyPyVlR330_ffuOWkHSizM8JlsEiqTb5O5Rx-akU36eq2miwnBS3Outy_by7HF6OmzjsztlxOj6KlKB40hVgj8uRDMGym_)

Dear Friend,
---
Seattle never makes it easy on us, but this time may take the cake. Just to get here, our tour bus drove through four fires. When we did arrive, our production team completed our setup in the park, only to have all of our equipment soaked. The City of Seattle had sprinklers timed to go off and soak all of our gear. This was a PERMITTED legal event so they knew we were coming. It just never ends with this city! _**WATCH THE UPDATE FROM THE GROUND ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_
---

---
Pray for this revival—some forces are trying to silence the sound of worship! I believe there is a massive move of God coming, and the enemy is doing everything to stop it, but have no fear, we aren't deterred!__
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

body:
2023-2024 school year begins Monday, August 21! | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
August 19, 2023
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=62ca689752&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b164b12200&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=bec43b077c&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **2023-2024 school year begins Monday, August 21!** Best of luck to all SLPS students, parents, teachers, and staff as we enter another school year in St. Louis.

For information regarding educational options, after-school programs, and more, please visit: [St. Louis-MO.gov/Education](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=72cc0c6d7a&e=a088917f89)

For the SLPS Academic Calendar, please visit: [slps.org/calendar](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=15c100b510&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
|
---
| **FY 2024 begins with net general revenue down 7.4 percent** Net state general revenue collections for the first month of the 2024 fiscal year decreased 7.4 percent compared to the first month of FY 2023, going from $970.3 million last year to $898.7 million this year. FY 2023 ended June 30 with net collections up 2.7 percent over FY 2022.

The anticipated decline was largely due to a substantial income tax cut the Republican-controlled Missouri General Assembly enacted last fall that took effect in January. Comparing July 2023 to July 2022, individual income tax collections dropped 19.5 percent while corporate income and franchise tax collections were down 17.6 percent.
---
|
---
| **Supreme Court revives case over public health regulations** The Missouri Supreme Court on Aug. 15 unanimously ruled Jackson and St. Louis counties have the legal right to intervene in a case invalidating some state regulations relating to pandemic responses that the state’s former attorney general invoked in an attempt to browbeat local governments into rescinding their COVID-19 mitigation measures.

In late 2021, a Cole County Judge Dan Green ruled unconstitutional several Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services regulations authorizing local officials to respond to public health emergencies. Although then-Attorney General Eric Schmitt, a Republican, was representing the department in the case, he went against his client’s wishes and refused to appeal. Schmitt then falsely claimed Green’s decision also invalidated any and all coronavirus restrictions, including those based on state laws not challenged in the case – an assertion rejected by a Jackson County judge earlier this year in another case.

Jackson and St. Louis counties attempted to intervene in order to appeal in the Cole County case following Schmitt’s refusal, but Green said it was too late for them to get involved. The Missouri Court of Appeals Western District subsequently agreed, holding the counties couldn’t join the case after Green had already ruled, even though they couldn’t anticipate Schmitt, now a U.S. senator, would prevent the health department from appealing.

However, the Supreme Court took the opposite view. Writing for the court, Judge Patricia Breckenridge said “it would not be reasonable to hold the counties should have known the attorney general, in his capacity as counsel for DHSS, would not continue to defend the regulations on appeal.”

The court vacated Green’s original ruling and ordered him to allow the counties to intervene in the case,_Shannon Robinson, et al., v. Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services, et al._ , going forward.

Pictured: Sen. Steven Roberts (top-right podium) joins other Black Caucus legislators for a picture with St. Louis students during a Legislative Day trip.
|

| **State auditor investigating state's marijuana regulators** State Auditor Scott Fitzpatrick has quietly launched an audit of the Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services over its implementation of the state’s medical and recreational marijuana programs. The audit was neither regularly scheduled nor publicly announced but is listed on the office’s website among audits currently in progress, the Missouri Independent reported on Aug. 15.

Missouri voters ratified a constitutional amendment legalizing marijuana for medical use in 2018 before authorizing it for recreational purposes with a follow up amendment in 2022. The health department has faced substantial criticism over its role in regulating the state’s legal marijuana industry, including allegations of inconsistency and political favoritism in how it awarded the limited number of licenses it chose to issue for marijuana growers, distributors and retailers.

---
Friend,
**Have you heard of the recent hit movie Sound of Freedom?** Our campaign has an exciting opportunity for our top supporters and especially new donors!
**We’re giving away 50 tickets to the movie Sound of Freedom - THE Conservative Movie of the Summer that Hollywood DOES NOT want you to see!**
The tragedy of human trafficking is not discussed enough in the mainstream media. Sound of Freedom details the heroic acts by a few patriotic Americans to save children from the clutches of dangerous and evil human traffickers.
This movie impacted me and our campaign so much that we wanted to give our supporters the chance to watch it for free!
**Contribute $1 right now and enter our contest to win free tickets to the Sound of Freedom movie at a theater near you!**
[**CONTRIBUTE $1 TO ENTER NOW!**](https://asa2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=803b747a2e50e008bc15a2eaf&id=bada2c797d&e=2798306028)

Asa Hutchinson

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Double your impact: Your National Honey Bee Day supporter record enclosed
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | | **National Honey Bee Day Status: FALLING SHORT** | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s23_aug_honeybeedaymatch-supprec_efundraiser_27_c3?refcode=fs-2022)
---
Today is National Honey Bee Day. There’s never been a more powerful moment to stand up for the future of our pollinators and our planet. But time is running out for you to make a difference _**before our rare match opportunity expires!**_
Bee-killing pesticides are WIPING OUT vulnerable pollinators and driving them toward EXTINCTION. Corporations are still prioritizing profits over the future of vital insect pollinators and our Earth. This is a key driver of the destruction of the fragile ecosystems that sustain us.
We're part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network fighting Big Polluters for a just, sustainable future. **That’s why, today only, a group of generous donors will match every gift -- dollar for dollar -- up to our $107,000 National Honey Bee Day goal. We’re counting on you to help make the most of this opportunity.** **We pulled your supporter record, and here’s what we found: **
| **NATIONAL HONEY BEE DAY SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**MATCH EXPIRING: **11:59 p.m. on August 19
**YOUR DONATION: ****NOT YET. [Give Now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s23_aug_honeybeedaymatch-supprec_efundraiser_27_c3?refcode=fs-2022)** **SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED: 4 MORE **
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s23_aug_honeybeedaymatch-supprec_efundraiser_27_c3?refcode=fs-2022)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. 11:59 p.m. deadline._
---
Neonics have already made agriculture _**nearly 48 TIMES more toxic to bees**_ in the past three decades. At the same time, pollinator populations are plummeting. And the EPA has the chance to ban these dangerous chemicals, but they could __**approve them for another 15 years**__ instead! We can’t let it come to that.
We set our ambitious $107,000 goal because our planet and our very future are in a dire situation. But right now, we’re falling dangerously short of our goal, and this match expires at midnight tonight.
Falling short means limiting our fight to protect our planet and defend vulnerable species --**including bees and other insect pollinators we depend on to sustain our fragile food system.** That's why we're counting on your support today.
Time is running out to secure a sustainable future, Friend -- and the stakes are simply too high to just wait and see. Please, don’t waste this opportunity: [**Rush a membership contribution of $27 or more now before National Honey Bee Day ends to DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT before our rare match opportunity expires.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937257?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | National Honey Bee Day Status: FALLING SHORT | Today is National Honey Bee Day. There’s never been a more powerful moment to stand up for the future of our pollinators and our planet. But time is running out for you to make a difference before our rare match opportunity expires! Bee-killing pesticides are WIPING OUT vulnerable pollinators and driving them toward EXTINCTION. Corporations are still prioritizing profits over the future of vital insect pollinators and our Earth. This is a key driver of the destruction of the fragile ecosystems that sustain us. We're part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network fighting Big Polluters for a just, sustainable future. That’s why, today only, a group of generous donors will match every gift -- dollar for dollar -- up to our $107,000 National Honey Bee Day goal. We’re counting on you to help make the most of this opportunity. We pulled your supporter record, and here’s what we found: | NATIONAL HONEY BEE DAY SUPPORTER RECORD EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com MATCH EXPIRING: 11:59 p.m. on August 19 YOUR DONATION: NOT YET. SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED: 4 MORE | | Records reflect most recent available data. 11:59 p.m. deadline. Neonics have already made agriculture nearly 48 TIMES more toxic to bees in the past three decades. At the same time, pollinator populations are plummeting. And the EPA has the chance to ban these dangerous chemicals, but they could approve them for another 15 years instead! We can’t let it come to that. We set our ambitious $107,000 goal because our planet and our very future are in a dire situation. But right now, we’re falling dangerously short of our goal, and this match expires at midnight tonight. Falling short means limiting our fight to protect our planet and defend vulnerable species --including bees and other insect pollinators we depend on to sustain our fragile food system. That's why we're counting on your support today. Time is running out to secure a sustainable future, Friend -- and the stakes are simply too high to just wait and see. Please, don’t waste this opportunity: == If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Kendra Klein Deputy director of science, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

[] [180x150x2] [] Tom Fitton's Weekly Update: CIA Helped Biden Campaign!? [] [180x150x2] [] FITTON to Congress: "SHUT DOWN" Corrupt Trump Prosecutions! [] BEST OF THE REST [282x280x1] [] Maxine Waters Commemorates Hip Hop Anniversary; Music Promotes Violence, Misogyny, Drugs [] [282x280x1] [] Judicial Watch Sues CIA for Records about Its Role in Intel Letter Attacking Hunter Laptop Story Just Before Election [] [Twitter] [] [Facebook] [] SATURDAY & SUNDAY--Tune in at 2pmEast/11AMPac for the "Weekly Briefing”- Featuring Judicial Watch's Director of Investigations & Research Chris Farrell. [Twitter] [] [Twitter] [] Chris Farrell's On Watch: Sarah Bedford Re: Latest Biden Corruption @sarahcbedford [Instagram] [] [Instagram] [] @TomFitton: @JudicialWatch just found out through our federal court hearing yesterday that US Capitol Police (and Speaker McCarthy appointee on its oversight board) set to keep ALL 14,000 Jan 6 vids secret under law as "security information." clean_body: | | | | Can you make sure of that? Peter, Jamie McLeod-Skinner is back for another round. Let's not forget what happened last time - the voters of our district spoke loud and clear. Actions speak louder than words, Peter. It's easy to make promises, but it's much harder to deliver results. | With your help, we can let Jamie and the Radical Left know that we are not going anywhere , and we're not letting anyone reverse the progress we've worked so hard to achieve. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

Friend, our August slowdown would be bad enough on its own, but knowing now that a Kevin McCarthy-aligned super PAC is spending mountains of dark money dollars to target blue states, our situation just got a whole heck of a lot more dire.

**It cannot be overstated just how far Kevin McCarthy and his extreme caucus will go if they expand their fragile Majority.
**
They’ve already passed extreme abortion bans, threatened to impeach President Biden, and set their sights on rolling back voting rights all across the country.

[**So it’s not hyperbole to say that we need your urgent support. We’re falling well short of the fundraising goal necessary to fight back against MAGA aggression and flip the House Majority blue. clean_body: (sending this immediately after our latest finance meeting) | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, our team just had an all-hands finance meeting, and the outlook is pretty grim. We’re more than halfway through August, and we’re sitting at just 21% of our August goal. | Friend, our August slowdown would be bad enough on its own, but knowing now that a Kevin McCarthy-aligned super PAC is spending mountains of dark money dollars to target blue states, our situation just got a whole heck of a lot more dire. It cannot be overstated just how far Kevin McCarthy and his extreme caucus will go if they expand their fragile Majority. They’ve already passed extreme abortion bans, threatened to impeach President Biden, and set their sights on rolling back voting rights all across the country. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you! — Team Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Ron DeSantis' Super PAC released a memo with plans to come after me at the debate. We need your help to build our rapid response. | | Peter - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate. Peter, DeSantis is going to come out swinging. | | | ---|---|--- | | Peter, take a look at the memo the DeSantis Super PAC released today for yourself. The "hammer" is coming down, so we must be ready. I've been approaching debate prep in an unconventional manner, but we must be ready to respond to the attacks on debate night. I wouldn't ask if this wasn't important, Peter. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

clean_body: We’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum | Peter, We’re so excited! Every top Democrat is rallying around gun violence prevention legislation and passing an assault weapons ban → ✅ President Joe Biden ✅ Senator Chris Murphy ✅ Senator Amy Klobuchar ✅ Senator Raphael Warnock ✅ Congresswoman Lucy McBeth! This is GREAT news! This is the support we need to pass gun safety legislation, Peter. But listen, we’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum and crush any gun violence prevention legislation brought to the floor. That’s why we’re working to do everything in our power to ensure a gun violence prevention majority in the House and Senate in 2024. Stop Gun Violence PAC is committed to electing gun violence prevention champions at all levels of government, but the NRA is already building a massive war chest ahead of the 2024 elections, so we need your help. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Stop Gun Violence PAC * | | = PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC Stop Gun Violence PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | = If you do not wish to receive emails about this important movement to end gun violence, please

body:
It’s pathetic. It’s embarrassing. But it’s also dangerous.
#

Kari Lake is running. It’s just a question of when.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230819-2-f&t=1&akid=969%2E734936%2EhhXJJZ)
When it happens, she’ll be surrounded and supported by the whole cast of far-right crazies like the pillow guy and Michael Flynn.
It’s pathetic. It’s embarrassing. But it’s also dangerous. Just know you need to be ready.
\- Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Hey Peter, Here on Team Frost, we believe in organizing year-round. This means going beyond election seasons and engaging in different activities such as door-knocking, phone banking, park cleanups, and even fun events (stay tuned for details on our upcoming four-square tournament, it's going to be a blast!) In just a few months since the launch of our year-round organizing program, we have already achieved remarkable milestones together. Here are some of our proudest accomplishments: \- Collecting over 1,900 petitions to support getting abortion rights on the ballot
\- Welcoming a dedicated team of 9 high school and college student fellows
\- Making over 17,000 calls to voters in the district
\- Knocking on hundreds of doors to connect with our community
[](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/0fcrKpmt29Gud7TJvqeENg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRmw7yeP0SkaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvZnJvc3Rmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy9ldmVudC81NjI2MzgvP2NkbWM9MlVBYU9IRzhjZVNaN1Q3VTNiZzY4ZGRGOHp5JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJVQWFPSEc4Y2VTWjdUN1UzYmc2OGRkRjh6eSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVUFhT0hHOGNlU1o3VDdVM2JnNjhkZEY4enlXA3NwY0IKZNueN-Fk0r-BbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) These achievements are just the beginning of our collective journey. We have a lot more we hope to accomplish and we can not do it without your help. Scroll down on this email to see our upcoming volunteer opportunities! We are so thrilled to have you on this team and we look forward to continuing to build power here in Central Florida, together. **Upcoming Events:** [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/0fcrKpmt29Gud7TJvqeENg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRmw7yeP0SkaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9iaWxpemUudXMvZnJvc3Rmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy9ldmVudC81NjI2MzgvP2NkbWM9MlVBYU9IRzhjZVNaN1Q3VTNiZzY4ZGRGOHp5JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJVQWFPSEc4Y2VTWjdUN1UzYmc2OGRkRjh6eSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yVUFhT0hHOGNlU1o3VDdVM2JnNjhkZEY4enlXA3NwY0IKZNueN-Fk0r-BbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

subject: Super short

body:
#
It's the weekend, Derek, so I'm gonna go ahead + keep this *super* short!
My re-election may not be for a while, but I'm hard at work supporting vulnerable Dems like my PA partner-in-crime Bob Casey, all while fighting like h*ll for working families in DC.
That means our fundraising still matters. Like, a lot.
But it's slowed down. Like, A LOT.
**[All I'm asking is that if you have $5 to spare, you kick it our way today, Derek. For the cost of a XL Sheetz coffee, you'll be helping me keep up the fight in the U.S. Senate AND defend our blue majority. $5 — that's it!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230819-1?refcode=em20230819-1-8512&refcode2=8512_434096_2yBLQi&akid=8512%2E434096%2E2yBLQi)**

Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU,
John 💛
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230819-1?refcode=em20230819-1-8512&refcode2=8512_434096_2yBLQi&akid=8512%2E434096%2E2yBLQi)

Peter — We hope that you are coming!
Our 2023 Three Star Dinner is just a week away. We have an amazing evening planned for our Tennessee Democrats.
The theme of this year's dinner is **_Lift Your Voice_**. We will be joined by California Governor Gavin Newsom who will deliver the keynote speech. We will also hear from this year's honorees, our very own Tennessee Three, State Representatives Gloria Johnson, Justin J. Pearson, and Justin Jones.
**Our Three Star dinner is the largest fundraiser that we host annually. More than 1,000 Democrats from across Tennessee will come together for an evening of entertainment and politics. With the national spotlight shining on Tennessee, this year will be even more exciting! **
[**Peter — We still have tickets and tables available. Will you help us fill every seat at this year's Dinner? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68355148/422772855/1004096531?ThreeStar2023Promo=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmE2ZGQ1OS1kYzNlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXuA3nd09tB6kCQ1X7-rYwupScbgXJjnokQvF3k-auc=)

name: Team Cori
subject: We can’t “celebrate” Trump’s real and present danger to democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Fox News is accusing Cori of “celebrating” Trump’s indictments. If it makes Fox angry, Cori must be doing something right! | |
---
Peter, This week Fox News ramped up their attacks on Representative Bush, accusing Cori and other progressives of “celebrating” and “cheering on” Trump’s fourth indictment. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zMWVTPrQHXsV9x_3ZfIDVqwmhZEjmmt1HqcOLAGZYukjMpGfEuaNb7c1wZSD1kJ1ead_juxIALnetSbNPTSbS2crnqG-yzn7tRke0hlhdHCh6nInFBrdJvvifpc4rUkyGgHoju8YtcHxFpr72HiRY6ie4QNxmFeUjt8nu03U0gQVdtgTlWUAcYPsp_hO0JypksM7NtrQNX0dBe10ZFqigNK-_HH20HGo4urCVLJzor6D0C8curaEMP9TsOD3BJVd-u_9jqqjksXXy3UlVP-RnL793twui4mslAxl1m3c_5dRQMrZ5c99jgcywxCnvNEOKBT9h_kPURdU8Az7kfehdyo-N8F2tSYIJL7cUPP2PdCJ9xa_DP72BNGkxNiDeb87lKKQSwLpues1M7869XkU86/3yv/cJZSDHuWRF2eO7P9zbXOSA/h0/FO-v6pTlhwywnDfN9DpVOQwCGHrCbKo5gKc5XZ6f6ug) **Fox host Laura Ingraham** said: “These people are sick... The sick fantasy never ends... Of course, for years, the Humiliation Squad has been itching to see not just that Trump mug shot, but also to have him behind bars.” The way we see it, **if it makes Fox hosts angry, Cori must be doing something right!** One thing we can promise, Cori doesn’t hold back. She will always tell it like it is. [**Cori will always stand up, and when she does, the right-wing will always demand she sit back down! We need you to have her back. Please contribute $5****so we will have the resources to push back on Fox News attacks now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zMWVTPrQHXsV9x_3ZfIDVqwmhZEjmmt1HqcOLAGZYukpux1kU36UWMfdvl1owzGa-JHhDUltzn1ken7tHUf8Yf_UBw_XRSDJWT-8R1bOwaEYCLBTNyqCiKRgry0GHR9Xu4ez2l1Bz_P2uYEh_BSfnvIHczUOuysLQWBk55XnB31vgMIYvMwLRSJ2vCX8wfX6UXgA_f1ulsh5pwn2qf8DiZdf7UkKys0BUoK3RrJGgXYaaL7FToVp-UX6epMZTnYxO4yuBBSoeQlaajlfKsL2fzvBVIZtnjONwoVBlaEdd7aRhKDfcLG_ElHZPCWwo0T_nDT72pdFTsGmjjqB40WL5dUbxKQkT92-yT3m4h0ZY7D7wRkcubSXtxCFYkLUJQLBBSKHzIsGYmKpl5jseK4Nn4/3yv/cJZSDHuWRF2eO7P9zbXOSA/h1/pWQtG9m15QgEN7lbq3gnxX-tUGsceS7hnEbtk2hQ3HI) **[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zMWVTPrQHXsV9x_3ZfIDVqwmhZEjmmt1HqcOLAGZYukir_eUPs1Y5PAnGixxV7jCwI2bVJSWU1K4pAZYLgd4b7hMIpGI0kHbXOa_JyiLmlzHojCzzM1z900m2jk0Bo3QMRTdFNPdSM8EUDFh8uD7Fm7uwKJvuxflmRL_aKtXO1FSGkcFuDahp9lieekqlYjMofmv3V4w76oCsnhD3lBITJBoyzCGRiAvzJ7wV4iqVDcitUdH4SrpVWe1pT9j4XD1WXtRVazHYLCN6wSV1Vu7Aq3cdlXJMnnoGUquZo06uRDGXsNSfqVwyoq5zSY13YmqPv21OcqNo8ZmjDbUvBEfBO4uMqgLmzSPUq2BmLw_vZ8z_-MIWdRrxAfHrjXKZejpoEUPQ1dJW4pQTx8v9VKA43/3yv/cJZSDHuWRF2eO7P9zbXOSA/h2/Z3wdMrFzuvMrfwFmggF5nIgcH366T9hRGAfL6BAH09o) ** What Cori actually said was: “The twice-impeached former white supremacist-in-chief now has as many indictments as he had years in office -- four. May he be held accountable for every bit of his gross misconduct. May we never experience another moment of his tyrannical, incompetent rule.” **This “celebration” shouldn’t be necessary.** Trump shouldn’t have tried to “find” the 11,780 non-existent Georgia votes, pressuring Georgia’s election officials to overturn election results. He shouldn’t have created slates of fake electors. On January 6, he shouldn’t have incited the crowd, which he knew was armed, to assault hundreds of police officers and break into the Capitol to try to stop the counting of electoral votes. **But he did. He did all of the above and more, enough to warrant 91 felony charges in total.** And his eight-year stranglehold on the far right of American politics continues to pose a real and present threat to our democracy. [**We must continue to speak the truth and build our power. Your support makes it possible for us to push back against Trump and the right-wing. clean_body: Fox News is accusing Cori of “celebrating” Trump’s indictments. If it makes Fox angry, Cori must be doing something right! | | Peter, This week Fox News ramped up their attacks on Representative Bush, accusing Cori and other progressives of “celebrating” and “cheering on” Trump’s fourth indictment. Fox host Laura Ingraham said: “These people are sick... The sick fantasy never ends... Of course, for years, the Humiliation Squad has been itching to see not just that Trump mug shot, but also to have him behind bars.” The way we see it, if it makes Fox hosts angry, Cori must be doing something right! One thing we can promise, Cori doesn’t hold back. She will always tell it like it is. What Cori actually said was: “The twice-impeached former white supremacist-in-chief now has as many indictments as he had years in office -- four. May he be held accountable for every bit of his gross misconduct. May we never experience another moment of his tyrannical, incompetent rule.” This “celebration” shouldn’t be necessary. Trump shouldn’t have tried to “find” the 11,780 non-existent Georgia votes, pressuring Georgia’s election officials to overturn election results. He shouldn’t have created slates of fake electors. On January 6, he shouldn’t have incited the crowd, which he knew was armed, to assault hundreds of police officers and break into the Capitol to try to stop the counting of electoral votes. But he did. He did all of the above and more, enough to warrant 91 felony charges in total. And his eight-year stranglehold on the far right of American politics continues to pose a real and present threat to our democracy. ** Thank you for joining us on this long journey to justice! In solidarity, Team Cori ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . ---
Friend,
**This is Rob, the campaign manager for Asa for America.** The first Republican Debate is in **4 days** and we still have not acquired the 40,000 donors required to attend the debate.
We have been making amazing progress. **Last week alone our campaign recieved over 12,000 new donors.** The more voters hear from Asa the more flock to our campaign. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we make the debate stage next week.
Right now, we need less than _**2,000**_ more donors to secure Asa a spot on the stage. **If we can repeat the success we had last week, we will have more than enough donors to qualify for the debate!**
If you have already donated to our campaign, **please ask 5 close family and friends to donate just $1 right now**. If you have not contributed yet, we only have one question.
**Will you help a Reagan conservative qualify for the debate?**
[_**< < Please donate $1 right now to ensure that Asa Hutchinson’s consistent conservative voice is heard on stage on August 23rd! >>**_](https://asa2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=803b747a2e50e008bc15a2eaf&id=b0195da823&e=2798306028)

Team, I wanted to reach out to reflect on an important anniversary we just passed: **Yesterday marked 103 years since the 19th Amendment was ratified,** and women were granted the right to vote.

While the 19th Amendment was an incredibly important victory for voting rights, it was not the end of the fight. Black women wouldn’t be granted the right to vote until almost 40 years later with the passage of the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_.

**And even today, the fight for our democracy continues.** Earlier this month, Ohioans banded together to defeat Issue 1, a radical ballot measure that would’ve taken power from our communities and given it to Big Money special interests.

**Thankfully, grassroots organizers mobilized our communities, and democracy won in Ohio.**

**And it’s that same grassroots energy that is going to restore our reproductive rights this November, and ensure Democrats take back the House Majority next year.**

Yours in the fight,

_Greg_

www.landsmanforcongress.com

body:

| | Friend,

---
First, the Biden Department of Justice called for me to STAND TRIAL just DAYS before the Iowa Caucus – when the VERY _FIRST_ VOTES are cast in the 2024 election...

---
Now, the Atlanta prosecutor, who was caught RAISING MONEY off of her illegitimate prosecution of me, is calling for a TRIAL DATE the day before “Super Tuesday” – when I will likely be officially declared the presumptive presidential nominee of the Republican Party.__

---
And let’s not forget that the trial led by the Soros-backed New York prosecutor is March 25 – and the trial surrounding the documents hoax is on May 21 – the day before the final primaries._
_
---
**_This is ELECTION INTERFERENCE – plain and simple._**
---
The Left can’t beat me in a fair fight, so their only hope of keeping the White House under their control is to weaponize the legal system to force me to stand trial during the most decisive moments of the 2024 election._
_
---
_But I have complete faith in the American people.__
_
---
The American people will see right through this disgraceful charade. _
_
---
I am convinced that this vicious act of Election Interference will mobilize voters like NEVER BEFORE in 2024._
_
---
Pollsters often say there’s a “secret Trump vote” of Americans who keep their presidential preference a secret, but mark “TRUMP” on the ballot when it’s time to vote._
_
---
After FOUR sham indictments against me, that “secret Trump vote” has probably QUADRUPLED._
_
---
_Crooked Joe has awoken the Silent Majority – and on November 5, 2024, we will take back the White House and Make America Great Again!__
_
---
_Even a contribution of $1 today will prove that you will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to save America from the tyrants who are using ELECTION INTERFERENCE to silence your voice.
_
---

* The **[Biden team was tipped off](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-i/) **to Hunter's investigation.
* This **[plan sucks](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-d/)**.
* **[Trump and 18 allies](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-h/)** have been indicted.
* We don't want your **[woke math](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-k/).**
* Young people are**[disappointed in Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-u/).**
* Biden is drowning us in a**[sea of red ink](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-o/).**
* WH Press Secretary**[made a booboo](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-x/).**
* Government-provided water in Maui is**[making people sick](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-m/).**
* **[Ford CEO gets a surprise](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-c/) **when he takes an EV on a road trip.
* **[Mortgage rates](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-q/)** reach the highest level in 20 years.

### **Only One Reason You Need an Alias**
Joe Biden's vice presidential assistant sent an email on May 26, 2016**,[ to "Robert L. Peters," one of at least three aliases used by Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-a/)**, Hunter Biden's laptop archive shows.
### **Where's The****President****?**
A Maui resident grew visibly emotional during a CNN appearance**[asking why Biden was taking so long to visit](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-f/) **and asked if Hawaiians aren't "Americans too." **Learn More About Becoming a Poll Worker** [**National Poll Worker Recruitment Day is coming up**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydklhd-trhiujldw-z/). Poll Workers help ensure voters understand the voting process by demonstrating how to use voting equipment, explain voting procedures, and are the face of the election office during voting. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: 2 hours to make a difference before National Honey Bee Day ends
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
**Bad news, friend.**
**Today is National Honey Bee Day,** and we should be celebrating these tiny pollinators that are so critical to our food system. But instead, **we’re fighting to stop massive bee die-offs – part of what scientists are calling “an insect apocalypse.”**
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937371?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Last year was one of the deadliest on record for honeybees in the United States. **In total, 39% of our honey bee colonies were DECIMATED****,** and beekeepers had to work frantically to keep their struggling populations alive! We know the pesticide industry is largely to blame, and we MUST take urgent action to protect our bees before it’s too late!
Despite staggering bee losses year after year, **greedy chemical corporations are STILL****flooding our farming system with MILLIONS of pounds of bee-toxic pesticides called neonics.** Even in the tiniest doses, neonics damage bees’ nervous systems and disrupt their ability to communicate, reproduce, or forage for food. Exposure to neonics can even kill bees outright!
**The problem is that pesticide companies have our farming system totally hooked on these chemicals.** Big Ag has used so many neonics in the last three decades that our environment is now **48 TIMES MORE TOXIC** to our precious bees! Neonics pollute the soil and water and spread easily through the whole ecosystem, **POISONING our farm fields and surrounding lands that bees need for foraging! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937372?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937373?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937374?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937371?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It gets worse: **Even the seeds of major crops like soy and corn are treated with neonics. The impact is so damaging that just one coated corn seed has enough of these chemicals to KILL up to 80,000 bees****!** Neonics absorb into every part of the crop, so the plants themselves become toxic to the pollinators we rely on.**Our poor bees don’t stand a chance against such systematic contamination! ****That’s why Friends of the Earth is fighting back. **
**We set a goal to raise $107,000 before National Honey Bee Day ends – and right now, a generous group of donors will MATCH all gifts up to this goal, but only until midnight tonight![ Please: Will you make a membership gift of $27 or more now and have it DOUBLED to help Friends of the Earth protect pollinators and our fragile planet? ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937375?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937371?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Study after study shows almost NO BENEFITS to neonic seed coatings. But chemical companies are raking in profits while bees are DYING at alarming rates. ****And we're paying the price, too:** Declining pollinator populations have already caused a global decrease in fruits, vegetables and nuts. Research shows that this could mean up to **500,000 excess deaths per year from a lack of access to healthy foods! **
We can’t afford to stand aside and let the pesticide industry wreak havoc on our food system with disastrous consequences for pollinators, people and our planet. **That’s why Friends of the Earth is fighting to hold the pesticide industry accountable and transform our farming system so we can protect bees, other precious pollinators, and our planet before it’s too late to make a difference. But we need YOUR help to make the most of our rare MATCH opportunity and hit our crucial $107,000 goal.**
**National Honey Bee Day is just once a year, but our fight is more urgent than ever. So please, before our match expires at midnight TONIGHT:[ Will you make a membership gift of $27 or more now – while $27 becomes $54! – in honor of National Honey Bee Day to help Friends of the Earth protect precious pollinators and our planet?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937375?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937372?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937373?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937374?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937371?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you for your urgent support,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science
Friends of the Earth

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.
